title: Watching The Detectives
description:
Katherine Landry left a promising legal career to marry and start a family. Sixteen months later, she is childless, not expecting, married to a man twelve years her senior, and wondering where it all went wrong. During her daily domestic routine, Kat suspects she's being tailed by a strange man. After days of discomfort and paranoia, it is confirmed. It doesn't take a detective to determine who is behind the surveillance. Kat turns the tables on the spies, pitting man against man until it all goes terribly wrong.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm an amateur fiction writer who shares his stories online and is looking for a new home. I published Watching The Detectives on Wattpad as a test drive and it received resounding crickets.  Now I'm throwing the first book of my punk series out there to see if it flies.

Detectives and Punks share no resemblance. They are of different genres and writing styles.

Sons of Providence is the first book in a series that covers more than two decades of Joe's life. With all books combined, my Punk Universe exceeds 1.3 million words. It's a long, strange trip.

I hope Joe finds an audience and a home at Wattpad.

Badcomma writing blog - https://dadadadiox.blogspot.com/

title: Nobody's Sorry You're Dead
description:
A Clean Cozy Mystery - Mountain Air and Murder

Hadley Pell, a college-educated housewife and widow, is still reeling from the loss of her beloved husband five years ago. She lives in a small town in the Southern Appalachians where nothing much happens. Nothing much, that is, until murder comes to town. And it isn't until Hadley is given the job of cleaning out the victim's house, an incredible hoarder of the first degree, that Hadley begins to unravel the mystery.

When it's discovered that Eustian Singlepenny has been poisoned and a friend is arrested for his murder, Hadley dives head first into the muddy maze, searching for clues to the killer's true identity. 

A humorous tale full of local color and wit, this is the first book in the Hadley Pell Cozy Mystery NOBODY mystery series written under the pen name of Jeri Green.

The Hadley Pell Cozy Mystery Series:
1.  Nobody's Sorry You're Dead
2.  Nobody Knows Your Secret
3.  Nobody Can Say It's You
4.  Nobody's Fool Y'all
5.  Nobody Says It's Easy
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My settings are as varied as the American landscape. My works of fiction cover a wide range of topics and themes. From ugly, racist attitudes to the humble kindness of strangers, from unavoidable tragedy and defeat to the unconquerable human spirit that rises from the ashes of chaos, from peace to war, from undying love to utter madness, I delve into the human soul and reveal glimpses of the frail and mortal character of Man.

So many choices are available when coming up with a new story. The path to completion is often filled with surprising twists and turns, for me as an author, and for you, I hope, as the reader. But the unexpected is part of what keeps writing novels an interesting, fascinating experience.

I am a self-starter with strong interpersonal skills. I seek new challenges and try to think out-of-the-box while looking for creative solutions to a given problem.

I love to follow fashion trends closely. Being a cleanliness freak, I like to keep my den and my work desk spic and span at all times. I am not an outgoing person, and love to stay indoors with a book instead of partying in a regular weekend (apart from going on a date with my other half)🙈🙈

I believe in character, values, vision, and action. I am a quick learner and believe in learning from my mistakes for I strongly feel that this virtue will take me ahead in life and career. I am a great cook too (am I????) and can stir up my favorite thirty-minute pasta dish in under fifteen minutes.

title: I Didn't Ask For A Bodyguard!
description:
"When life gives you lemons, throw them back and yell: 'I WANTED SUSHI DAMMIT!"

~~
Aria has hemophilia. That means if she loses blood that's... Not a really good thing, because she'll bleed more than a regular person does. Which isn't a really nice thought, but now that she has potential gunmen after her, she's really running out of nice thoughts. She's the sole survivor of an incident and with no other option (well, actually, there was an option of changing her name to Helga and living the rest of her life on a goat farm but that wasn't really appealing) she's left to live with her cranky grandparents and a bodyguard who's far too good looking to be real, like, seriously. How is this her life?

title: Never Alone
description:
Annie learns her best friend, Tracy is tangled in a web of secrets and danger and promises to continue the search for answers if something should happen to her dearest friend.  When Tracy's death is made to look like a suicide, Annie embarks on an investigation to bring her friend's killer to justice.  With the unwelcome help of her childhood friend turned enemy, she works tirelessly to learn what happened to Tracy.  As she finds herself in the middle of a conspiracy she never imagined, will Annie learn to trust God?  Will she realize that her enemy might just be her perfect match?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
As you will soon discover, I am absolutely terrible at talking about myself.  I have no idea what people will find interesting, but for your sakes, I will do my very best.  I am a born-again Christian and am so thankful for the salvation offered me by Jesus Christ despite the fact that I fail Him constantly.

I love cats, and when I say that, I truly mean it.  My spare time is spent either writing or volunteering at my town's animal shelter.

As far as likes and dislikes go, my favorite food is peanut butter, because it is one of the most perfect things on earth.  I'm terrified of clowns and feel it is in no way an irrational fear (look up John Wayne Gacy on Google, I dare you to invite a clown to a child's birthday party after that).

Someday, I dream of having a published book and trust the Lord to help me achieve that goal.  If you read my works, you will discover my tendency toward crime drama.  I tried cutesy and sweet, but it's not who I am.  On any given Friday night I can be found on my couch with a cat nestled on my lap watching Dateline with me.  Perhaps there is something seriously wrong with me, but true crime runs deep in my veins.

I can't wait to make some new friends through this journey I'm on.  Feel free to message me if you'd like to chat :)

title: Human

She didn't think she'd be able to find anyone here that could understand her, but then she met Garrett.
Garrett McDuffie and his family were the wealthiest people in town. Garret was freakishly handsome, incredibly smart, and a star athlete. All of these things should make him the most popular guy around, but instead he was known to be a loner. Cadence is quickly drawn to him, but the closer she gets the more she starts to wonder about him and his strange family. Are the skeletons in Garrett's closet ones like Cadence's, or are they something different entirely? Something...not human?

title: Bitter Cold Truth: A Tale of the Everburning City
description:
There is no night in the Everburning City. 

There can never be. 

Fourteen people lie dead on the platform of Billows Station, killed by fire and rage. And as the perpetrator hides within the millions of people who inhabit the City, the task of finding this murder falls to Inspector Samuel B Fraser. Aided by a grateful Bureau of Oversight, his investigation will reach deep into the mysteries that brought a young man to the madness of desperation, and beyond into secrets that some powers would rather stay buried.

Cover art by the superbly generous Narcisse Navarre @inksorcery
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'd like to start calling myself an author.

To that end, I've decided to start here, with Wattpad.

And more importantly, with you. After all, I'm not here to only express my overactive and under-utilized imagination. I'm here to learn how to tell a tale that someone else would enjoy reading. To know what makes a story matter, to learn what makes a character worth investing your time in, what makes a plot gripping.

And so, if you get a chance, and want to take a chance, let me tell you a tale.

title: Ace Attorney: Righteous Deliberation
description:
The Wright Anything Agency has finally been able to enjoy a period of peace in the aftermath of the UR-1 Incident being laid to rest. This period of peace is not set to last forever though, and a new string of cases arrives at the forefront of their minds. A mysterious figure known only as Oracle has been causing a stir in the legal world, leaving behind a strange trail of exposures and darkened deals in their wake. Oracle's identity, always a mystery, slowly draws Phoenix, Apollo, and Athena into a new set of trials that will push them to the limit. All the while, Oracle themselves sits in the background waiting for an unknown truth to rise. However, no one fully understands just what awaits them, and their shared sense of righteousness is about to hit a point of deliberation in the worst way possible.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my account! My name is Digital. I use they/them pronouns and write stories here. I've settled on six longer stories here and a few other sites. You can find all links to those sites and other social media platforms I'm on in the Linktree below!

Here's a summary of my current stories!

First, I have my Ace Attorney series, Morix. The current book, 'Web of Mistrust', is a sequel to 'Quiet after the Huricane' and 'Secrets beneath Secrets'. It revolves around a small law agency, Morix Law Offices, as they try to dispel corruption from the legal system around them. Updated Thursday.

Second, there's an original series, Alitia. The first book is 'Welcome to Millennia'. It follows a group of eight girls attending the magic academy, Alitia, while attempting to refine their powers. The sequel, 'Crown of Ash', focuses on the girls' second semester at Alitia. It's a fantasy story with elements of action and adventure. Updated Tuesday.

Third, we have another original fantasy series, Galaxy of Hyperion. 'World of New Life' is the first book. It revolves around six teenagers who are pulled into another galaxy and forced to fight in its war to get home. Updated Saturday. On hiatus until the next book, 'Mystic Heir', debuts in August.

Fourth, there's my rewrite of Fire Emblem Fates. The story is entirely different from canon and strives to improve on the original. The prologue, Birthright, Conquest, Hidden Truths, and Heirs of Fate are finished and Revelation is in progress. Updated Sunday.

Fifth, I have an alternate universe of Fire Emblem: Three Houses called Fódlan Alternative. It has characters from 50 creators in one story about an amnesiac carving their future while recovering lost memories. Updated Friday.

Last, there's my rewrite of Digimon Frontier called 'Frontiers Unexplored'. It is freeform and longer than my other stories, so it is updated on no schedule.

I hope that at least one of those stories piques your interest. Stick around, Digital Dreamer!

title: Apartment 239
description:
Abe Barrett is surrounded by ghosts - some of them are even his roommates! But now Abe's visions show something dark coming, and it wants Abe dead.
 
                                                                      ***** 
 
When Abe Barrett's family died, he started seeing ghosts. Soon he was living with three of them, and it turns out ghosts are just as eccentric as people. Abe is bothered by the ghosts constantly since he doesn't want to solve their murders, avenge them or do much of anything. He just wants to do his job and relax. His dreams, however, have been getting darker as people in town start to disappear. Soon Abe realizes there is something hunting him, and that same threat was involved with his family's deaths. A legacy of darkness is chasing Abe Barrett, and his supernatural roommates may not be enough to save him.

[[word count: 60,000-70,000 words]]

authorBio: Laura is a self-published author of LGBT novels and novellas, with a specific focus on gay male relationships. She loved reading from an early age, and decided to start writing her own stories in her early teens. She has had plots and characters filling her head ever since.

title: Cursed (Paranormal Romantic Suspense, Complete)
description:
Rania Algafari never asked to be different, and when she escaped the war in Syria and moved to the UK, her only goal was to live her life in peace. Get up, go to work, avoid talking to the dead - that sort of thing.

But not everyone dies quietly, and Rania's soon being pestered by one ghost, blackmailed by another, and distracted by a handsome private investigator who's got his own reasons for wanting to solve a particularly gruesome murder. 

While Will Lawson doesn't mind using unorthodox methods to crack a case, he's never had to contact his witnesses via a seance before. But the clock is ticking, and Will and his unlikely sidekicks need to hunt down a killer before he's dispatched to join the spirit world himself.

authorBio:
Well, I have no problem writing a novel, but a couple of sentences about myself? Pffft.

I'm a writer-slash-numbers geek from England who loves chocolate, sleep, and well-defined abs. Not mine, unfortunately. I'm owned by a horse who eats my money and three dogs who eat everything else. I tend to talk too much, and I have a peculiar affinity for chocolate and wine :)

My favourite genre to write is romantic suspense, although I love to read pure romance and thrillers too. I've published over forty novels so far, I make my living as a writer, and you can find a few of my stories on Wattpad. If you'd like to buy my other books or you fancy owning a paperback, you can find details of where they're available on my website: www.elise-noble.com

I'm also on Facebook and TikTok - feel free to pop over and say hi :)

My current Wattpad projects are The Ex Files, a romcom about a serial fake-dater; and A Devil in the Dark, an interactive novel where readers decide what happens next.

Thanks so much to all those who have taken the time to read my books and vote or comment! It means more than you could ever know.

P.S. Wattpad is not a dating site. I love to hear from readers, but if you send me a message starting with "Hello dear" I will block you instantly.

title: A Minor Technicality [Completed] *Slowly Editing*
description:
Blythe Conners was definitely in the wrong place at the wrong time. She was just a small town girl who had been taken by the shiny lights of New York City. She never expected to witness her boyfriend murdering someone, or to discover that even with a simple name like Michael Johnson, he was actually from a powerful crime conglomerate. The situation has put her life in danger, and now she is on the run, with nothing more than the clothes on her back. She only has enough money in her pocket for a child's bus ticket to get home, so she hopes her youthful appearance will finally prove useful.    

Luca Morelli is working one of the biggest cases of his career. All he needs is one breakthrough to take down the Fitzgerald crime family - just one key witness to a major crime to help him. Frustrated by the lack of movement with the case, he gives in to the demands of his long-distance fiancée, and plans to spend a week with her family. What he doesn't expect is the twelve year old girl sitting next to him on the bus. She's precocious and funny, but she's on the bus to the wrong city, alone and with no money. The least he can do is help her get home safely. There's something about her, though, that has his senses on alert. He can't help but feel she isn't what she seems, and every so often, she acts much older than twelve years old.    

***Loosely based on the classic film The Major and The Minor***
Tous Droits Réservés

title: I Was Kidnapped And... I Liked It? Boyxboy.
description:
A week. That was all it took, a week for Shane to notice that he was being stalked. 
A week too long. 

He had been getting stalked for close to a year when his soon to be kidnapper started to slip up and get cocky, but by then he had already advised a plan for stealing Shane right out of his own home. 
Did anyone notice though? No.

Shane wasn't an ordinary boy, he didn't like people very much, he only ever had one close friend who was taken away from him a year ago to the day, and his mother went crazy when his dad died. 
His life wasn't great. 

So what do you do when you get kidnapped and you like it?

Well, you fall for the incredibly sexy guy that kidnapped you of course! 

There's just one problem. He's a gang leader. A powerful gang leader, and he's dangerous. More so that any person you will ever meet. So Shane is in for a hell of a ride when he decides to let his heart do the thinking instead of his brain for once.

Because what's a boy to do when you get kidnapped and you like it?

title: Ruins (The Jewel Project #6)
description:
"There's nothing ever certain about life. Sometimes we believe we're winning when, in fact, we only trap ourselves deeper under ruins of our own making."

Everything is crumbling in a state of increased uncertainty.

Even if for the past year, life seemed to calm down, the lingering state of limbo has Sam and his team on the edge. 

There's something wrong, something about to happen, and strange vibes are coming from both the Agency, who have been quieter than usual, and Snitch Gravel who plans one final strike against the group.

The release of Snitch Gravel's right hand man is the spark needed to detonate the powder keg.

Caught helpless and unprepared, the team faces the worst of what Snitch Gravel can throw at them, and the only ones who can end it are the ones who got away. An exhausted Jessie, and a Jimmy who has no recollection of his former self.

As Sam tries to navigate the intricate corridors of Snitch Gravel's motivation, everyone must face off with what they feared most. The ghosts of past adventures and the consequences of the life they've made for themselves.

Because consequences can never be ignored, and sometimes, you need to be more vicious than the other side in order to survive.

title: The Merryweather Jewel Thefts.
description:
Can a diamond ring really disappear from a table into thin air? How can it be possible for an emerald necklace to vanish from a locked safe, the code of which only the owner knows? And how on earth does a ruby bracelet disappear from a lady's wrist while she is eating dinner? These are all questions Alianna Winter must answer, if she is to solve the mystery of the Merryweather Jewel Thefts. But, as Allie fully knows, nothing is ever as straightforward as it first appears.

title: Nocturne | ONC 2024
description:
'There was a stain on the floor that used to be a vampire, and Aaron Evans was starting to feel like he really wasn't being paid enough.'

*****

Aaron is only in Supernatural Investigations for the pay. It's stressful and dangerous, and he's certain it's aging him beyond his years. When the remains of a high-ranking vamp from London's most powerful underground gang show up on his turf, even the excellent pay seems like poor recompense for trying to prevent all-out war in his city.

All he has to work with are his wits, some stolen evidence, and an enigmatic vampire investigator who appeared seemingly out of nowhere. Nikolai Meier is surly, uncooperative, but frustratingly competent, so Aaron has no choice but to make it work. 

But Nikolai has secrets, and those secrets may prove just as deadly as failure.

***

#ONC2024 Entry for Prompt 56: 'In a world where humans and magical creatures coexist, a detective must solve a murder case that threatens to plunge the two communities into war.'

authorBio:
Hi! I'm Elinor.

Writer - Comic Artist/Illustrator - Book Hoarder - Three Woodland Gnomes in a Trenchcoat - Purveyor of Random Facts about Totally Unrelated Topics - Collector of Hobbies - Never Has Enough Time For Everything But Tries Anyway

I enjoy dark, complex worlds with characters that feel real and that's what I aim for when I write, because sometimes you need a lil magic in your life. Or a face-eating demon, as the case may be. Whatever you're into. Gods and monsters, curses, new worlds, otherworlds, hellholes and time warps are all on the cards and I have more stories than I know what to do with, so...here. Enjoy my brainchildren. I'll be writing them until a fantasy portal opens up in the real world for me to escape through, so you might as well.

^^ My profile image and banner are my own artwork. I enjoy illustrating my stories and characters and the places I love that aren't real, and am currently working on some visual storytelling projects. Watch this space, updates coming soon!

description:

Elliot was the son of the headmistress (Ms. Jones) of the boarding school. Ms. Jones always knew there was something peculiar about her son but she never questioned Elliot because she never cared. The worst part of it all Ms. Jones would get anything or anyone her son wanted just so he would leave her alone. 
When Elliot meets Blaire his life is changed. His true colors come out and he becomes obsessed with Blaire. 
Can Blaire escape a madman? Can Elliot be stopped? Read to find out.

title: Captive in Plain Sight
description:
Mila is the obsession of a dangerous man with a grudge. After a traumatic incident, she's started over in Seattle with a new job and her first serious relationship. But everything is poised to crumble when she meets Alec Laurent, a controlling psychopath set to push her limits. As she tries to keep her loved ones from danger and stay a step ahead of her captor, she realizes there's more to their relationship than he's letting on. The key to her freedom is finding out exactly what it is.

#1 Mystery/Thriller
Featured as a 💎 Mystery Gem by Wattpad Outreach

                                                          *****

Her heart skipped a beat when she saw it. High-definition surveillance footage played on the television.

Her mother talking on the phone in the grocery checkout.

Her brother playing video games with friends.

Her best friend driving her car.

Her boyfriend commuting on the bus to work.

Her dad playing basketball at the gym.

She dropped the vase, shattering what was left,  putting her hand to her mouth in horror.

"Sit down, Ms. Black." he said. "We have a lot to cover."

title: More Poison in Your Coffee?
description:
Evelyn's day couldn't get any worse, until a local news anchor drops dead in her café. If that weren't bad enough the police suspect her former drug dealing cousin as the culprit, and Evie's not someone who just sits by while her family's in trouble. Putting on her sleuth hat she's in a race to find the true killer; not an easy task considering the deceased was a total ass to just about everyone he knew. Was it his neglected wife, sick of the constant verbal abuse? His pretty assistant, tired of being sexually harassed on a daily basis? Or was it his brother, jealous of the success he could never find himself? Hell, maybe it's that strange new guy that's only a quarter-step from being a bum. If Evie thought today was a hot mess, she's in for ride of her life.

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 1

title: Sessions With Love ² ✓
description:
Holding her unconscious body in my arms. Blood soaking my clothes as I fall to my knees but I don't let her touch the ground. My hands hold her tight to my body as the anger is rising within me and the beast inside me is threatening to unleash its wrath on the world. I will not lose her. "You will not die, Leanna" I whisper to her as I hold her close to my body but like she is, I'm losing the fight of life. Like a fucking poet. That's how insanely she affects me. I would go to the ends of the world for her. Only for her.

title: The Time Traveller's Ball (The Erik Midgard Case Files Volume 1)
description:
How do you solve a murder when every single suspect has a time machine?

Time-travelling police officer Erik Midgard has a problem. He has seen his own future. His fate is set. There is no way out. There is nothing he can do to escape it. He is going to die. But in the meantime, he has a murder to solve.

On the moons of Mars, 900 years into the future, the wealthiest men and women in the solar system are arriving for the biggest night in the social calendar. The invitations are exclusively for people rich enough to own their own time machines. It is meant to be the greatest party in history. No one is supposed to die there. But when the guest of honour is found dead after the last dance, Erik and his partner Mirabi find themselves facing the greatest challenge of their careers. Trapped in a luxurious mansion and surrounded by millionaires, lovers, enemies, assassins, terrorists, robot doubles, hidden grudges, secret agendas and a criminal genius plotting his masterpiece, Erik and Mirabi must solve the case before its consequences can explode across the solar system. But as they sift through the evidence and the details of the crime start to appear, Erik finds himself beginning to wonder. Is his destiny truly written in stone? Or could there be a way for him to change it?

A Wattpad Featured Book
Selected by the BBC for their official Doctor Who reading list.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Within Her Threads- A Murder Mystery Novella
description:
Neil has dropped all communications with his sister, Shuchi for last two years. However, when one morning she turns up uninvited at his home in London, he nevertheless welcomes her. But something has changed, that he can't help noticing. Something in her appearance had changed that was creating strange vibe around her.
Before Neil could figure out, his father calls to inform him that his sister is dead. 'Shuchi is dead.' 
But how can this happen? One minute she was standing in London and another minute, her body was fished out of a lake in India. Neil couldn't believe it, until his phone blinked with the picture of his sister's dead body.
Heartbroken and shattered Neil reaches India where Inspector Bhaskara, his friend is waiting with another news. 'Your sister, might have been murdered.'

Lies, deceit and a tale lined with thrill and suspense, this is the first part of the story where Neil has to find out who killed his sister and why? In the world, where people find it hard to forgive and forget, can Neil forgive himself for cutting off his one and only sister from his life?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My real name is- Ashmi Prasad and I write by pen name- Adhya Krish and Dora Grace.
Some people decide their ambition very early in the life- they are all sorted and focused. And some people are like me- the one who discovers their true passion by trial and error method.
I discovered my passion- 'writing' at the age of 29 years and the result was my first book- ANIKAA & THE MYSTERY OF THE PAINTING. I wrote this book after I had a strange dream about a painting which is full of riddles. The vision kept on recurring and I developed a drive so strong that I had to write the book.
I am currently writing the second part of the book- Anikaa & The Escape and have written crime novella- Love is Blind and Within Her Threads with pen name- Dora Grace.
I hope you will like my creations which I attribute to my parents and almighty 'Maa'.

title: Kidnapped Book 1&2
description:
Have you ever watched the News and Seen kids Getting taken away from their Family and Friends? Yes, We all have; But do you stop and think for minute that it could happen to you? Nope, We don't. We think that we are safe and sound, But we're not. No one is safe in this world that we live in.

title: Tormenting Mr.Gangster
description:
"Or I could just slice you pretty little neck right away and end this chapter here" he whispered dangerously in her ear.

"You could, but then you would have to take care of two dead bodies instead of one, buy two coffins, two headstones, arrange for two places in the graveyard, organise two funerals etc... etc... it's kind of expensive you know especially considering the global financial crisis going on" she desperately tried to reason him, waiting for the right time to spray him and get the hell out of here.

He chuckled at her attempts to reason him. "Or I could just throw your body over the nearest bridge and save me all the trouble of the funerals as you so rightly stated " he whispered coldly  making her shudder.


***
Tormenting Mr.Gansgter is about 

A gangster with a purpose...
A lady who didn't ask for anything...
Some curses...
A little bit of shyness...
And a great deal of sarcasm !

Collab ff with the wonderful Seerat for those who know her ;)

authorBio:

title: Unchained - The Doppelganger Within
description:
2023. What would you do if you ran into your old school bully, and he tried to mess with you again? You're a boxer and he's a mob boss now. Would you square up or let it slide?

For Matt Prince, settling the score with Jacob Cobra isn't just personal. It could change the fate of Vicary City. 

The Cobra clan's pulling the strings from the shadows, running everything with corruption and exploitation, all while grinding it out in a bloody war with the Spyder gang.
But Matt's got way bigger problems than the Cobras. He's got his own dark side to fight. A devilish Doppelgänger's creeping inside that won't shut up, trying to take over his body and his life.

Is Matt alone in all this? No chance.

He's got his loyal crew by his side. A group that's tighter than blood, ready to risk everything to take down the Cobras and give the people of Vicary City a shot at breaking free from their grip.

The Doppelgänger Within is just the beginning of the Unchained trilogy. This battle's just getting started.

I will be posting this story on RoyalRoad.com
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm Dastan Blades, writer of Unchained, an ongoing thriller trilogy. The Doppelganger Within is just the beginning.
The series tackles themes like light vs. darkness, fighting for what's right, bullying, justice, revenge, and brotherhood.
Set in Vicary City, Kansas, a made-up city, it reflects the harsh realities of Naples, Italy: exploitation, corruption, and the mafia's grip.
I live there, so my mission is to shed light on these urgent issues. I will pull this off.

title: Murder on the Ballot, Myrtle Clover #17
description:
If you can't beat them, join them.

Octogenarian Myrtle Clover is so annoyed by the infighting at tiny Bradley, North Carolina's town council meetings that she decides on a radical course of action: she'll run for the open seat on the council. After all, she taught most of the elected officials-she should be able to enact some order.

But order apparently isn't in the works. This becomes clear when a fellow candidate is found . . . murdered.

Myrtle and her senior sidekick Miles must uncover the killer before someone else becomes a lame duck.

title: Hushed Up--Myrtle Clover Mystery #15
description:
Silence is golden ...unless you're permanently hushed up.

When Lillian Johnson was found dead one hot summer day, no one in the town of Bradley, North Carolina was all that surprised. Lillian had always talked about the trials of her various health problems and was sure to share with everyone exactly how much she suffered.

The townspeople were only slightly more surprised to discover that Lillian had been murdered. That's because Lillian, like most folks, had a dark side. And a fair number of people had experienced this dark side.

Myrtle Clover, octogenarian sleuth and intrepid reporter, investigates Lillian's death to discover precisely who hushed her up. . . before someone else is permanently silenced.

title: Duby's Doctor
description:
Winner The Crystal Awards 2016, Best Multimedia Story (3d Place).    
  A spinster doctor rents her spare room to a brain-damaged patient who doesn't know he is a former undercover agent targeted for execution by a powerful criminal.
  
  ~o~ ~o~ ~o~
  
  John Doe remembers nothing of his life before waking up in the hospital. He doesn't know he was a dangerous man, and he somehow has survived assassination by even more dangerous men. He doesn't even know how to speak English, or read, or count. Even after his body heals, he will need long-term supervision and care to re-learn how to live.
  
  Dr. Mitchell Oberon has been married to her surgical work for too long. So, she resists being attracted to a brain-damaged patient with the body of Adonis and the mind of a child. 
  
  Agent Frank Stone, of Homeland Security, forces the doctor to take John Doe into her own home while he recovers. Stone, who knows John Doe's past history well, says it's not safe to send him back to the place he lived before he was "killed" by his enemies. If it ever becomes known that John survives, his foes will make sure he doesn't live long.
  
  Mitchell tries to protect her heart while she protects the innocent John from a hostile world. As they live together, the two begin to teach one another how to live. Hopefully, they'll also learn how not to die -- because they'll soon be betrayed into the hands of murderers.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My goal is to provide quick, easy, fun reads when we need a vacation from current events. Laughter is healthy -- for mind and body. 

All the nonfiction we have to read each day is our broccoli. An Iris Chacon novel is pure dessert.

I write novels designed to divert our busy minds from our grimy streets, dusty houses, dirty laundry, unwashed kids and unbathed dishes -- or maybe the other way around -- and Internal Revenue forms. Grab an Iris Chacon novel! Come play with me!
 #BreakStereotypes

description:

When her husband, John, finally convinces her to sort through some of Cory's belongings, she unexpectedly finds the closure she needs in the form of a map and a journal full of cryptic notes. authorBio:
Hello, I'm Katya Kolmakov! I'm your friendly neighbourhood cosy romance, mystery & romantasy writer.

For the overview of my books, please consult THE READING GUIDE: https://www.wattpad.com/story/309624311-reading-guide-to-my-wattpad-books

For years I wrote the two protagonists who were the echoes of my original fanfiction characters, created in 2013. With time, the worlds I created in my Kindle books, my romance webserials, and my murder mysteries started merging and crossing over. To explain the similarities between them, some of my characters became distant relatives. Others started reading and publishing each other's books.

At the end, all roads lead to my fictional County of Fleckney. I hope you have fun finding these connections - just as I had creating them!

title: Path of the Necromancer - FACTION WARS
description:
All Ian has ever wanted is to live free. Free from responsibility, from prejudice, and, is it so much to ask, from persecution for being a Necromancer. After becoming the resident Mage for the Night Watch, the... magically challenged Faction in Seattle's warring supernatural underworld, Ian is beginning to believe that he has finally found a place that will accept his 'gift.'
But while undertaking a job for the Kin, thus securing his shaky position, corrupt forces step in to tear him away from his new home. With his Grimoire mentor, Succubus lover, and Flesh Golem protector in tow, Ian sets forth to show his rivals that he is willing to raise bodies from the ground to protect those he cares for. Only when a Lich, a Slayer, and a Siren - oh my! - join a growing group that look to him for guidance, Ian quickly realises that his power puts him in a unique position to make a place for not just himself, but others like him, to live free. 
Armed with the knowledge of the depraved acts those in charge are making, Ian knows he must cripple the Factions (no problem) to reveal how deep the corruption goes (little harder), without alienating his own side (no promises).
RR
* * * * *
This is the sequel to the published novel: Path of the Necromancer - ORIGINS.
Feedback is welcome.

authorBio:
Author of the White House Gardener Mystery series (Berkley Prime Crime) and the upcoming Chocolate Shop Mystery series (Crooked Lane Books), mystery author Dorothy St. James was born in New York but raised in South Carolina. She makes her home on an artsy island community in South Carolina with her husband, two crazy dogs, and fluffy cat. Though writing has always been a passion for her, she pursued an undergraduate degree in Wildlife Biology and a graduate degree in Public Administration and Urban Planning. She put her educational experience to use, having worked in all branches and all levels of government including local, regional, state, and federal. She even spent time during college working for a non-profit environmental watchdog organization.

Switching from government service and community planning to fiction writing wasn't as big of a change as some might think. Her government work was all about the stories of the people and the places where they live. As an urban planner, Dorothy loved telling the stories of the people she met. And from that, her desire to tell the tales that were so alive in her heart grew until she could not ignore it any longer. In 2001, she took a leap of faith and pursued her dream of writing fiction full-time.

* Dorothy St. James is the alter-ego of award-winning multi-published author, Dorothy McFalls. She enjoys writing in several different genres. Her works have been nominated for many awards including: Romantic Times Reviewers' Choice Award, Reviewers International Organization Award, National Reader's Choice Award, CataRomance Reviewers' Choice Award, and The Romance Reviews Today Perfect 10! Award. Reviewers have called her work: "amazing", "perfect", "filled with emotion", and "lined with danger."

title: Vendetta-Thirst for Justice
description:
A tale of shadows and secrets, Vendetta delves into the chilling underworld of crime, deception, and the relentless pursuit of justice. When a group of friends uncovers eerie connections between Deaths, an abandoned house, and a sinister network of criminals, they are thrust into a dangerous game where every revelation brings them closer to peril.

The word vendetta traditionally signifies revenge for a family member, but in this story, the group's bond transcends blood ties. To them, the world itself is a family-one they will fight for, no matter the cost.

Bound by a shared thirst for justice and haunted by the echoes of betrayal, they must navigate a web of lies spun by those they once trusted. As the truth inches closer, so does the risk of losing everything. Vendetta is not just a fight for justice-it's a battle against time, corruption, and the darkest corners of humanity.

title: Duty and Devotion
description:
Henderson Michaels possess an uncanny knack for putting bad people behind bars. Good-looking and cutthroat, he has a bright future at the NYPD, ex-military, and top of his class. He's one of the first police officers to move up in the ranks to detective in under three years. He also has a reason behind wanting to be a police officer, that reason being his late father who was killed in the line of duty when he was just a teenager.
 
            Mariah Russo is your everyday daddy's girl, always getting what she wants and that alone clouds the brain. And she's about to find out the real truth behind her father, Jionni Russo and the need that Henderson has to take him down. She never knew she would become an unlikely ally with the NYPD and Detective Michaels. But, emotions and feelings get in the way of both Henderson and Mariah, causing them to get way too close for the department's liking. The attraction is almost fatal.
 
          Years later, fate brings them together once more, but not being too kind to them. Levi Jabon, Henderson's longtime Marine buddy and good friend, runs into him at a police conference in California, happy to see Henderson. Henderson doesn't realize the connection between him and his former lover Mariah. But, things are about to spiral out of control when Henderson arrives in town.

copyright 2019
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"I choose to write because it's perfect for me. It's an escape, a place I can go to hide. It's a friend, when I feel out casted from everyone else. It's a journal, when the only story I can tell is my own. It's a book, when I need to be somewhere else. It's control, when I feel so out of control. It's healing, when everything seems pretty messed up. And it's fine, when life is just flat-out boring."
--Alysha Speer

Check out my other social medias with my tumblr below and my Instagram/Twitter: @katiesmith_11.

title: Bear of a Cowboy
description:
Second Lieutenant Avonaco (Bear) Black Feather was a reserve Army Ranger, and Deputy Sheriff. Recently returned from a mission gone bad (where he lost the use of his legs), he stays on the 3B Ranch while his physical wounds heal. Now Honorably Discharged he has little hope of ever returning to a normal life.

    Gwynevere (Gwyn) Montague is the younger sister of former-Navy SEAL and FBI Agent Nicodemus Montague. With her brother's help she gets a CNA job on the ranch, working for Dr. Rowdy Kincaid. (Her duties are to assist a war hero in his recovery.) Upon her arrival she meets the handsome Native American Cowboy, now confined to a wheelchair. Having lost his faith in both The Lord and himself, he is angry, withdrawn and flatly refusing any Therapy. 

    Can she help this true American Hero find his way back to God? Help him believe in himself again, and help the Ranch defeat this dark shadow that is forever hovering over head? Can she win the heart of this, 'Bear of a Cowboy'?

title: Painted Scars: Filthy Dark Tale Of An Elite And His Decadent Sin
description:
18+

We had heard about the filthy rich man pouring money on arm candies. But Do we know how twisted an elite can be? All had known him as an American monarch, schemed corrupt mind, A New York royal elite, sociopath, brutal, murderer, and felon. But I had seen him from close, enjoying my pleads and screams, pleasing me in his bed all tied up. He is my tormentor Scar Maroney. I was his bride

Once I tend to fall for the wrong men. That's how I met him. We had a chaotic history. He is the villain of my story and I was his prey.

It was summer vacation in Texas, sounds great but the thing I regretted most collapsing in front of his car at first encounter. It was huge violence and utter chaos. The second encounter happened to be at a funeral witnessing his sinful crimsoned hand, Blood All Over, a devil in disguise. And the third encounter was a cold-blooded murder, perhaps the bullet was for me.

Was it just happenstance?! Never.

His venom doesn't take time to spread and this time I'm dedicated to my frame. 

I would never forget how brutally he tortured and killed the man who tried to stalk me.


                                   
                            _____________
[Currently Editing]

title: The Secret Songs of D.C. Silverenn
description:
What lengths would you go to for some cash?

For Cerise Lenoir, an unstable job and compulsive shopping are not the ideal pairing. When she finds herself rejected from another orchestral audition, Cerise knows her spending habits must change. That is until she gets a really, really desperate idea. Rumors claim that the Silverenn Songs hold clues to treasure - one that could change Cerise's life forever.

But even if such a prize awaits in the finale, surely there are others after it. And they aren't afraid to take out whoever stands in their way.

She lived with her adopted father at the scrap yard, until she heard that her adopted brother Russell was coming to live with them. she was really excited but then her adopted father told her that she was going to start school soon and she was very nervous and shy about it. She was really afraid that she wouldn't be able to fit in. But then that day changed when she met the Autobots and their mission was to capture every decepticon prisoner that escaped. Will she ever find out about her past? Will she ever find out who she truly is? Well then let's find out and see what her adventure takes her!

title: The Criminal Calls Me Cupcake (Watty Winner 2013)
description:
Watty Finalist: Mystery/Thriller, On the Rise

I see him vividly in my head. Him. The guy who calls himself A for whatever reason. The guy dressed in a black cloak with a hood that makes his face look like an endless sea of darkness. The guy whose voice is like velvet; so smooth; yet so deep and dark it sends chills down my spine every time he speaks. The guy whose simple words and actions are enough to send my heart into a frenzy. The guy whose black-as-night eyes captivate me day and night. The guy who enjoys teasing me and making me angry, like it's one of his new hobbies. The guy who has the power to make my legs turn to jelly in an instant. The guy whose past is so deep, dark, and bottled up that it scares me. The guy who spends most of his time stalking me; visiting me at night. The guy whose arms hold me so tight and securely. The guy who evokes feelings in me that honestly scare the hell out of me.

But he's not just a guy. He's a criminal. The criminal that calls me cupcake.

title: Freeze (The Jewel Project #4)
description:
"I know your weakness. You want to be fair, you want to do right, you want to be the good guy. I could give you a depression you'd never crawl out of."

Sometimes, no matter the turmoil in our lives, it's the seemingly irrelevant, simple, normal things that heighten our pulse and tighten our stomachs.

Sam Grant has come to that conclusion over the last months because after all his adventures and near-death experiences, he's still stressed out about exams.

But the ordinary morphs into the unexpected when Snitch Gravel decides to break their silent deal. Home is no longer safe and rules no longer apply.

As Sam and Tom try to fix what has been broken in the delicate balance between their two lives, the rest of the group embarks on a new mission to dig out one more jewel before Snitch Gravel finds it. But with no leader and just a vague hint, it's turning out to be harder than expected as tension within the group bubbles to boiling point.

But glory waits for no one. The race is on.

title: The Detective
description:
With eleven missing women to find and six high-profile burglary cases to solve, the last thing Detective Nathan McNamara needs in his life is one more complication. And that's exactly what his recent one-night stand is becoming-complicated. With his heinous lieutenant breathing down his neck for answers and his accidental girlfriend dropping hints for a commitment, Nathan is realizing that his career and his bachelor status are both on the line.

Now he's more convinced than ever that his job hangs in the balance and that the Surgeon General's warning on the whiskey bottle should include something about women.

title: A Perfect Distraction
description:
Sometimes it only takes one person to change your life, a few seconds to fall in love and one day to lose everything. 

For Karolia, it only took one day to lose everything at the age of 19. Her parents... Her happiness changed to grief and loneliness. Without knowing the reason for her parents' death, she fled from Worcester, her hometown to a crowded city, NYC to escape from the nightmares and memories. She is sweet, childish, strong and everything a good girl needs.

For him, falling in love is a bad distraction and it only causes heartbreak. Being a CEO of a powerful company, Logan has enough weight on his shoulder. His escape from reality was fighting. He's dangerous, devilishly handsome, and everything a bad boy needs.

When these two people cross their path, a whirlwind of emotions breaks apart - Hatred, Love, Happiness, fear, heartbreak, revenge, ... They change each other's lives and perceptions and they are the perfect soulmates.  For him, no longer love is a bad distraction, but perfect.

But every story has a villain. In this, her past is the one and now she has no escape. Will Logan be able to save her from her nightmare or let her go forever? Be ready for a new adventure, new mysteries, and new memories.

After all, Distraction can be good as well as bad. It depends on how we see.

title: Never Again.
description:
At fourteen my life was flipped upside down. And not for good. I was held captive for many years. 
I didn't know the day, year or month it was. I didn't know whether I was far away from home, or beside it. How much of my life had I missed? How much had my kidnapper stolen from me? And would I ever find my family again? I could be anywhere in the world. Yet I would rather be on the streets than anywhere close to him. 
When I finally escaped I didn't stop going until I couldn't go further. My body was weak, my mind strong. I would survive.

**Warning: Some parts are more graphic, however, I did not get too into it, the story is about after she escapes, not her time kidnapped! Enjoy!

title: His Wife
description:
NOTE: This is only a preview of my novel His Wife which is sold on Amazon in all formats. The link to the full novel and my other novels is in my bio.

For years, Evangeline has been married to Joseph Vanderbilt who has always been the perfect depiction of a husband while she was his wonderful obedient wife who would give in to his control. Out in public, he'd always go around with a smile on his face and a loving arm around Evangeline. But behind closed doors, no one really knew how impossible it was for Evangeline to be his wife, not even Evangeline until it was too late.

She didn't realize it was too late until she saw the dead body in her husband's trunk, and he confessed that his real name was Eugene. After that, Evangeline has been fighting for her survival every day while also trying to escape him. However, he's made it almost impossible by tying her to the bed every night and constantly keeping her by his side. He confessed that all the precautions were because he loved her and wanted to keep her in his life, but the more she tried to escape, the more he began to show his true colors and start abusing her. He'd tie her up for hours or beat her as he pleased and would even bring his family members into it.

After a while, Evangeline realized that time was very limited when she discovered a secret cellar and a secret even darker inside it below their cozy home. After she discovered the hidden room, Eugene would start locking her in it for days at a time with the possibility of never letting her out again. It only gets worse when he and his cousin make threats to mutilate her if she ever tries to escape again, which only gives her one last chance to get out while she can and get it right.

title: Cars - human bent
description:
Lightning McQueen - The name known across the country. You can't forget his name and he wouldn't let you if you tried. The debonair and mercilessly handsome up-and-coming rookie racer, Lightning, is aiming for the stars and not backing down. While some might say his pride and flamboyance are a hindrance to his racing he only sees them as strengths, meant to propel him to the top. But after an astonishing three-way tie at the Piston Cup race, he has to push himself to prove his worth. 
  
But things don't go according to plan. A crazy night out with his friends, an old rickety town forgotten by Hell itself, and a whole bunch of legally binding repairs stops this racer in his tracks. He must find a way to get free and back into training. He has a race to get to and a spotlight to catch - he simply WILL NOT let himself be forgotten...Not like this 'almost dust' town on Highway 66.
  
  
  ***
  
This story is 'human-bent' all characters have been turned human and in order to make that possible a lot of things have been altered and some scenes changed to accommodate that. You'll also find that I added some completely new scenes - some to deepen characterization and others I added just because I like them from other movies (i.e. Cars 3). 
  
  ***
  
Obviously I own none of these characters (at least not in their car form;) and most of the plot line and dialogue, all those props go to Disney & Pixar.

title: Easy Innocence
description:
How far will teen girls go for approval from their peers? Pretty far, it turns out.

When pretty, smart Sara Long is found bludgeoned to death, it's easy to blame the man with the bat. But when Georgia Davis -- former cop and newly-minted PI -- is hired to look into the incident at the behest of the accused's sister, what she finds hints at a much different, much darker answer. It seems the privileged, affluent schoolgirls on Chicago's North Shore have learned just how much their innocence is worth to hot-under-the-collar businessmen. But while these girls can pay for their newly gotten Prada pricetags, they don't realize that their new business venture may end up costing them more than they can afford.

I'll post chapters one at a time, but if you just HAVE to find out what happens before they're all up, here's where you can buy the ebook (It's also available in paperback and audio, btw):

http://amzn.com/B001UE8J4Y
https://itunes.apple.com/us/book/easy-innocence/id586071761?mt=11
http://store.kobobooks.com/en-US/ebook/easy-innocence
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, everyone. I've been a member of Wattpad for years but never quite knew how to use it. Now I'm diving in. I hope I do it right. I'm sure you'll let me know.

I write "compulsively readable thrillers" and have 11 novels and and over 20 short stories published. But... and this is important (at least to me)..  I had no plans to be a fiction writer. It wasn't even Plan B. Funny about that.  The story of how that happened is on my website.

In fact I've reinvented myself 4 times. I started out in broadcast news as an assistant film editor for NBC News in New York. Then I moved back to Washington DC where I grew up to work at PBS. I was retrained as an assistant director when Watergate broke (I'm not really that old) and helped produce PBS’s night-time broadcast of the hearings. My second reinvention took me to Chicago where I worked for public relations firm Burson-Marsteller for 8 years. I left there to start Fischer Hellmann Communications. (Are you still counting?) Then came my 4th reinvention, writing crime fiction. That one took.

I'm working on a new novel, and will post chapters as I go. But I'm also going to post chapters of EASY INNOCENCE. It's about high school girls and how far they go for acceptance from their peers. If that goes well, I'll follow up with NOBODY'S CHILD, which also deals with high school girls, but in a very different way.

My novels include the Ellie Foreman series, which I describe as a cross between "Desperate Housewives" and "24"; the Georgia Davis PI Series, which is more hard-boiled, and 3 historical stand-alone thrillers: Set The Night on Fire, A Bitter Veil, and Havana Lost. Lots of short stories too. Everything is available in paperback, ebook, and audio.

I also invite you to swing by Pinterest.com, where I have a board with "50 Free Fiction Writing Tips."

https://plus.google.com/+LibbyHellmann
https://twitter.com/libbyhellmann
http://www.pinterest.com/libbyfh

title: Kidnapped By The Badboy (Completed)
description:
"I just want to suggest you something.". 

"What?"

 He took a step forward and said. "Why are you always there with Bella?"

 "And why do you think  that nobody else can spend time with her except you?" He repeated

I took a step forward too and now we both were face to face. "Stay away from her." He look at me, deep in my eyes and asked. 

"Or what?"

"Or you'll regret for what you did." 

"Stay away from Bella." 

"Just wait and watch." He said and then turned around and started to walk inside his house. 


**

Bella Edward was a pretty girl with perfect long brown hair and awesome personality. Sally, her best friend left her because of new - found friends. Bella was left alone with her favourite Bret and her annoying but cool cousin Zane but what happened when she got kidnapped? 

 But who did it? 

Let's find out.

___

title: Taken
description:
A teenage girl by the name of Katie Woods happens to be in the wrong place at the wrong time when she witnesses a robbery and a murder take place. Once the robbers find her, they realize they are left with only one option... they have to take her if they do not want any more blood on their hands.

Little do they know, this girl is worth more than they expected and once the other gangs realize this then everyone wants her.

As soon as a certain gang member recognizes Katie from his past. He and his gang will do anything to get his revenge on her and get the money that she is worth.

Her family will try their best to get her back but when so many people go missing every day they see that this will not be easy.

Katie is brought into a world of gangs, murder, money and revenge. Her main goal is to escape before it is too late...but is it already too late? 

*Please be advised that everything that happens in this book is all from my imagination and nothing has actually happened. However please do understand that many people are kidnapped and murdered every day and it truly is a horrible thing. My thoughts and prayers go out to all of the families who are still looking or have lost their loved ones.*
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Kidnapped
description:
What would you do if someone you loved was kidnapped? Erica knew instantly what she would do, and it wasn't giving up. She'd do anything for her little brother, Jake, and she'd stop at nothing to get him back. But what happens when even the police can't do anything? When one kidnapping turns out to be just a small part of many? Soon Erica finds herself in a mess where no one can be trusted, where good and bad are twisted, and where innocent white lies can turn out to be dangerous truths that could not only cost Erica her life, but the lives of those she loves as well.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I wrote Kidnapped way back in high school. If you like it, I'm so glad, and thanks for reading!

I'm not very active on here these days, and I've actually gone on to become a published author, so I prefer to point people to my better work. But if you happen to stumble across this and enjoy the stuff my 15-year-old self wrote, then maybe you'll like my better stuff, too. So definitely head to my website and check out my latest books!

title: Bleeding Smile
description:
Leslie Carson is haunted with the memories of the perverse Hatchet Killer that plagued her small town and the unexpected role she played in Arch Teller's subsequent imprisonment. 

Though years have gone by and hundreds of miles have deliberately been placed between Leslie and the town of Elk Point, a daunting retrial ending in Teller's release renders her world upended.

With a dreaded but obligated return to Elk Point to bury her father and console her grief-stricken mother, Leslie is forced to confront her past as well as a dark, looming promise; a promise from her former childhood friend and suspected Hatchet Killer to ultimately ruin Leslie in every way he knows how, plunging her and the town of Elk Point into a sinister and suspenseful game of survival.

title: The Witness
description:
"Please don't hurt me" I sobbed as he took hold of my wrist and roughly dragged me back up the embankment, when we got to the top he stopped and looked me up and down. I stood there bruised and bleeding, a shivering pathetic wreck, my tear stained face blotchy and red. He stepped towards me and my legs trembled as I waited for to worse to happen, then he lifted me off my feet and pulled me  up into his arms.

"Shush, I'm not going to hurt you " he soothed as he carried me back to the car.

Career girl Annie Murphy wasn't expecting to get shot, and kidnapped when she took the high flying job in New York.


Contains sexual content and violence

title: Ultraviolet ✔️
description:
I see how people die.

It only happens the first time I touch someone. A handshake. My arm brushing yours on the subway. All of it. So much noise, every day and all the time. Drives a girl crazy after a while. If there's no skin contact, my head belongs to me for a few more seconds each day. 

I've seen every scenario. Except for one.

I've never played an active role in a death. That is, until now.

title: A- Villain
description:
Beckett Coleman didn't have to be a villain. All he had to do was study a little harder.

But if you were almost failing your college psychology class, and your professor offered you a guaranteed A for bringing down the local hero, you might jump at the chance too. 

The problem is Beckett has no idea how to be a villain. How is he supposed to take down a hero with probability powers? This might be just another assignment he fails. 

And failing this task could cost his life...

title: Deception | Sequel
description:
Ever since Denizen gave up being a villain and agreed to go through the villain rehabilitation center, life's been a whole lot less stressful. While it's still filled with relationship complications with his friends, Edison and David, Denizen can start to forge a future that makes up for all the memories he's lost.

But when Deception-his apparently ex-girlfriend with the power to make anyone believe what she says-kidnaps him, everything he knows for sure is thrown out the window. She tells him a very different story than he's come to know, one where they were a disillusioned, struggling young couple with a dream of a world that's not separated by rich and poor, hero and villain, useful and useless.

Is Deception friend or foe? Is her story true? As Denizen balances the careful act of compliant prisoner and wayward accomplice while searching for an escape, the lines between hero and villain blur and he is thrown into the struggle to keep himself straight in this world of increasingly expanding shades of grey.

SEQUEL TO BLANK SLATE - DL'ers may read Blank Slate for club reading!
(Attempts to) UPDATE MONTHLY
***Exclusively on W A T T P A D***
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
To all wolf kin and my fellow wandering creatures-welcome!

I am Wolf, resident fantasy wolf, artist, writer, and Club(s) Admin and Guide for @DreamlandCommunity. I often lope into worlds beyond our own and gather fascinating stories, details, and much more! When I'm not writing stories or dreaming, I'm drawing the worlds and characters I see--or yours, if you commission in Portraits!--or climbing rock walls. Hey, you'd be surprised how strong claws are.

My current published works (there are so many unpublished ones :D) are as follows:
¬• A Fallen HomeKin (complete, publishing-will likely be taken down in the future)
¬• Blank Slate | ONC2023 Novella (complete, editing)
¬• Deception (ongoing, updates once a month)
¬• Portraits | Character Art Shop (CFCU)
¬• Reaching For Stars (ongoing, updates slow)
¬• A Monarch of Lies (on hold)
And many more to come!

Dropped by but found my den empty? Don't fret, I'm probably dreaming of worlds yet unpenned--or pleading with creatively to lend words for the next chapter. If not, I am loping into the unknown, sniffing out new lands and tales! There is much to experience out in the land of words. Come join me in melting over a particular fluffy dog or pouring liquid hugs!

Before my introductory letter ends, remember! Don't tuck tail at the thought of howling, I don't bite anything but my food. I will return from my travels and lend an ear in all due time.

Now that we've got that covered, come! Sit by the fire, snuggle up with warm blanket and fuzzy tails. Tea and emotional support cookies are served. Meanwhile, let me tell you a tale of a cross-world boy seeking family, of a man refined by fire, of a villain suffering memory loss, of creatures and stars, of worlds far and close...

Sincerely,
Wolf

description:

When a neighbor disappears, Myrtle and Miles shift gears and hit the road to search for him. They discover their neighbor slightly off the beaten track-murdered with a tire iron. authorBio:
Elizabeth writes the Southern Quilting mysteries for Penguin/NAL, the Memphis Barbeque mysteries for Penguin/Berkley, and the Myrtle Clover series for Midnight Ink and independently.  She blogs at https://elizabethspanncraig.com/blog-3/, named by Writer's Digest as one of the 101 Best Websites for Writers. 

Bestselling cozy mystery author Elizabeth Spann Craig is a library-loving, avid mystery reader. A pet-owning Southerner, her four series are full of cats, corgis, and cheese grits. The mother of two, she lives with her husband, a fun-loving corgi, and a shy fluffball of a cat. authorBio:
I bleed for reading and writing, I love it. I consider it to be a true passion. I love communities like this, it's nice to deal with people who have the same love as I do.

Sooooo about me:
0. God, she rules all that surrounds me (foremost)
1. I'm a Nerd
2. I'm a Health-Freak
3. I have too many hobbies to count (writing, knitting, sewing, cooking, learning the guitar, pole dancing, body toning, and blah blah blah)
4. I enjoy pretty, nice people
5. I enjoy TRUE writers
6. Netflix is a guilty pleasure

How Am I When I'm Writing?
Nothing like myself! I get really absorbed. I have a briefcase that goes everywhere with me, and all of my writing materials are in there. I like to be able to look at it, even if I'm not writing, makes me sleep better at night :-)

My Writing Mottos:
Don't Start Anything You Can't Finish!
It's Mine, You Don't Have to Like It!
Thou Shalt Never Post and Abandon A Story

WRITE WHAT MAKES YOU HAPPY, YOUR WRITING IS A REPRESENTATION OF YOU. BE PROUD.

title: Death of a Suitor #18
description:
The course of true love never did run smooth.

According to Myrtle, Eloise Crane set her cap for Miles long ago. Although Miles is now dating Eloise, he doesn't seem overly enthusiastic about it. Myrtle figures he's simply given in after running out of plausible excuses. Eloise drives Myrtle batty, so she's intent on avoiding her as much as possible. This isn't easy since Eloise is determined to join in whenever Miles and Myrtle are together.

When Myrtle spots Eloise at a restaurant canoodling with a different gentleman, she likes Eloise even less. And she decides that Eloise has caused no end of problems when her other suitor is found dead.

With Miles a suspect, Myrtle must jump into gear to clear his name and find the killer before he strikes again.

title: THE BAD GUYS IN: despicable me 3
description:
The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. title: I Sew You
description:
I remember the cold, damp floors of our apartment. The incessant squeaking of rats, the stench of decay. It was in this environment that my obsession was born.

I would spend hours dissecting the rodents, their tiny bodies a canvas for my curiosity. I'd sew their limbs back on in brutal positions, breathe life into inanimate objects. A hobby, a pleasure.

The line between creator and destroyer blurred. I was both God and Devil, giving life and taking it away.

title: Nathaniel
description:
Book 2 in Kidnapped Series

Nathaniel Jaymes Harden (Nate), rich, good looks, and kind at heart. But when the only girl he's ever love weds another man, he decides to seek revenge against the man that took away his happiness, and what better way to do it than taking away the only other girl the man love most, his sister, Lillianna Nina Chambers (Lillie) and to use the exact same method the man used against his first love: kidnap.

------------

When Lillie feels the rope drop from her wrists, she quickly brought her aching arms around her and examines the red mark on her delicate skin, gently rubbing at them. 

Pouting her lips, she swirls around to him and inches her wrists closer to him. "Look what you've done!" the pout never leaving her lips.

Just one look at her puckered delectable lips and a growl erupts from Nate's throat. Within a flash, his large hands grab hold of each side of her face, the tips of his fingers lost within her soft brown hair. He brought their faces only inches apart. She can see the fiery hunger burning deep within the depths of blue. She can feel herself slowly getting lost in his intense gaze. 

"Your body's been teasing me all day," his voice low and husky sending a pleasurable jolt down to her core, "and now your lips are begging me to kiss them."

He slams his lips down on hers hard, needy and hungrily.


Book 1: The Mistake

A series of past murders catch the attention of the police and the media.

        "Everyone is innocent in the eyes of the law until proven guilty."

title: Whispered Shadows
description:
Noa Raine: 
Three years ago my life changed forever. My family was shattered. My father walked out, my mother only functions off of her depression pills, and my sister, Gia, went missing. I'm nineteen, the same age Gia was when anyone last saw her. Everyone forgot about her until I started receiving photos of her and phone calls. Someone is after me. I need to figure out what happened to my sister before I end up like her, but I need help.

Ryder Fox:
Gia Raine is the person I am today. She was my best friend until the night she disappeared. She's why I decided to join the FBI Academy to help prevent things like this from ever happening. That's when I got a call I never expected. Noa is starting to get calls like Gia did before. I refuse to let what happened to Gia happen to Noa. Now it's up to the two of us to figure out what happened that night before it catches up with Noa.

title: Love on Notes
description:
What if the library was the new Tinder?

For Elizabeth, words are at the center of her life. A journalist for a women's magazine and, above all, an avid reader, she regularly visits her local library. But one day, when she opens one of the borrowed books, she discovers small handwritten notes. After perusing this mysterious reader's reviews, Elizabeth can't help but respond, for this man seems to have the same literary tastes as she does, and his remarks open up some fascinating debates. Just as Elizabeth begins her epistolary relationship with this stranger, another man comes along to turn her hitherto quiet life upside down: his name is Daniel, and he works on criminal investigations. Torn between these two men, one of ink and the other of flesh, Elizabeth must soon face a very real threat: someone is after her life...

title: The Things You Will Never Know
description:
If you go down to the woods today...

Well, in this town, you probably won't come back.

Unexplained deaths and disappearances are normal around here. In Haltonshaw Grove, we tell these real life horror stories to our kids like bedtime tales. They help us learn from a young age to stay out of the forest after dark.

But one halloween, we didn't listen- Me and four boys. We broke the rules and we paid the price. We barely made it out alive and now we live with the trauma, the nightmares, the memories. 

Seven years later, the events of that night, like most things tend to do around here, have come back to haunt us. 

We never talked about the night we ran in the forest, never spoke afterwards at all really, but now we're going to need each other if we're going to survive what's coming. Me and those boys I've loved all along. 

- - ‐ - - - - - - - - - - - - -
Our town is haunted. 

The five of us are cursed. 

And Halloween is just around the corner...

Let's see who makes it to November 1st.

title: Lost Cause (A Daisy Dunlop Mystery ~ Book 1)
description:
British female sleuth, Daisy Dunlop, thinks she's found her dream job. Too bad she has to work with her worst nightmare, private investigator Solomon Liffey. They've barely spoken since he took her husband's request to keep her safe far too literally and handcuffed her to the kitchen sink.

Solomon has no interest in babysitting a new partner, especially this one. The woman's a bleedin' liability. She has no concept of danger and could flirt for England at the next Olympics. As if that isn't bad enough, she has a habit of sticking her nose in where it's not wanted, including into Solomon's very private life.

Determined to keep Daisy safely out the way, Solomon sets her the task of finding a missing person. Her investigations land her in the middle of his case. Bullets fly, bombs explode, and the number of murder victims keeps rising. When Solomon goes missing, the tables are turned. Now his future is in Daisy's hands.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm an English rose who was stolen by a giant nomad and transplanted in a land of gum trees and kangaroos.  I quickly learned the new language of G'day and mate but refused  all efforts to convert me to eating Vegemite.

A hunger for exploration was awoken by my new surroundings, I traversed the land seeking knowledge and adventure. Despite the trials and tribulations along the way I stood fearless in the face of calamity and embarrassment. With a joyous laugh, and a boundless supply of scones with cream and jam, I stood tall, all fifty-eight inches of me, and shrugged off the humiliation of falling in a freezer and reversing into my own mailbox.

My desire to experience the world led me to embrace a life of crime. Seeking the higher knowledge shared by the great minds of the detective world, I took to worshiping at the altars of the Crime and Investigation channel and Sherlock.

I  love sharing tales about the land of my birth along with the unexpected twists of fate that can befall all of us. Holding on to a steadfast belief every obstacle can be overcome, and that you can be more than you ever expected, I spend moments of solitude creating adventures where mystery and mayhem collide.

My books can be found at:

Amazon
Barnes & Noble
Smashwords

For a free copy of book 2 in the Daisy Dunlop Mystery series, Lost & Found and to find out about new releases you can subscribe to my newsletter at http://www.subscribepage.com/lostandfound

I hope you enjoy reading the mysterious and funny stories I create.

title: Sounds of Murder
description:
When Psychology Professor Pamela Barnes discovers her department's star researcher strangled to death in the computer lab, she's determined to find out who did it. Will an accidental recording of the murder allow Pamela to use her expertise in acoustics to identify the killer? A unique cozy mystery--set in the world of academia and high-stakes research--full of excitement, humor, and romance.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Patricia Rockwell has spent most of her life teaching.  From small liberal arts colleges to large regional research universities-and even a brief stint in a high school, her background in education is extensive.  She has taught virtually everything related to Communication-from a fine arts speech-theatre orientation to more recently a social science research approach.  Her Bachelors' and Masters' degrees are from the University of Nebraska in Speech and her Ph.D. is from the University of Arizona in Communication.  She was on the faculty at the University of Louisiana at Lafayette for thirteen years, retiring in 2007.  Her publications are extensive, with over 20 peer-reviewed articles in scholarly journals, several textbooks, and a research book on her major interest area of sarcasm, published by Edwin Mellen Press. Her research focuses primarily on several areas of communication:  deception, sarcasm, and vocal cues. 

Dr. Rockwell is presently living in Aurora, Illinois, with her husband Milt, also a retired educator.  The couple have two adult children.  SOUNDS OF MURDER is her first novel in her Pamela Barnes Acoustic mystery series.  This series also includes FM FOR MURDER, VOICE MAIL MURDER, and MURDER IN THE ROUND.  She also writes the Essie Cobb senior sleuth mysteries, including BINGOED, PAPOOSED, GHOSTED, VALENTINED, and the forthcoming FIRECRACKERED.

All books from both series are available in print and ebook formats on Amazon.  Print versions are $14.95 each and ebooks are $2.99.

Dr. Rockwell is founder and publisher at Cozy Cat Press, a small independent publishing house that specializes in cozy mysteries.  The company has over 40 authors with over 120 book titles.  Visit the CCP website at:  www.cozycatpress.com.

If you like the background image on the above profile, it is an actual segment from an acoustic profile of a human voice (colorized, of course).

title: Shattered Expose
description:
SELF PUBLISHED. BUY NOW ON AMAZON https://a.co/d/83RxPUr

Genre: Psychological Drama/Suspense
Themes: Betrayal, trust, manipulation, revenge, personal empowerment

Description:
Claire Evans, a talented photographer with a knack for capturing raw human emotion, believes she's found love in the charismatic social media influencer Ryan Carter. To the world, their relationship is picture-perfect-an enviable blend of romance and success. But when Claire discovers a private video of theirs leaked online, her life takes a dark turn.

Ryan dismisses her devastation, brushing it off as a publicity stunt, but his excuses unravel into a chilling truth: Claire wasn't the only victim of his manipulations. As Claire digs deeper, she uncovers a web of betrayal spun by Ryan and his cunning ex-girlfriend, Ava Monroe-a web that ensnares countless women, all exploited for profit and fame.

Haunted by her humiliation and grappling with shattered trust, Claire retreats into herself, but with the help of her fiercely loyal best friend Julia and the tech-savvy Liam, she begins to reclaim her power. Together, they work to expose Ryan and Ava, setting in motion a plan to bring their schemes crashing down.

As the legal and emotional battles intensify, Claire finds herself navigating complex emotions of revenge and forgiveness. But just as she begins to rebuild her life, a final twist threatens to drag her back into the chaos. Faced with an anonymous video revealing even darker secrets, Claire must decide: Will she risk her newfound peace to uncover the whole truth, or will she finally let go of the past?

Shattered Exposé is a gripping tale of betrayal, resilience, and self-discovery, delving into the shadows of modern fame and the power of reclaiming one's narrative. For fans of psychological thrillers and empowering dramas, this story will keep you turning pages until the very end.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Beyond The Veil (A Paranormal Romance)
description:
Eyes as black as night, a voice as soft as silk.

"I will find you. Everything will be alright."

Emily doesn't know who he is or why he invades her dreams each night. Yet, he is the only source of comfort in her very tragic life. Unfortunately, dreams are just, well, dreams.  

One gloomy morning, however, a mysterious stranger appears out of nowhere, offering his help. Under normal circumstances, Emily would refuse to accept it, but the man's onyx eyes are so oddly familiar.

What begins with a promising encounter that gives Emily hope gradually turns into a nightmare she cannot wake up from. 

Note: Contains mild depictions of abuse.
