title: Sacrifice For Love
description:
Two inseparable best friends made the bold decision to move to Los Angeles to pursue their careers and embark on a fresh chapter in life. Gabriella, having left her dismal past behind, was eager to embrace new opportunities. Little did she know that fate had something extraordinary in store for her.

As they settled into their new surroundings, Gabriella had a chance encounter with Justin Martinez, a 27-year-old billionaire. From the moment their eyes met, an undeniable connection sparked between them, and Gabriella fell madly in love with Justin. 

However, an ominous warning from an anonymous source urged her to stay away from him.

Despite the warning, everything seemed to be falling into place for Gabriella. She was thriving in her new life, and her happiness with Justin seemed destined. But just as she thought the universe was on her side, it turned its back on her, and unexpected events began to unfold. 

Gabriella found herself facing challenges she never imagined possible, and the only person who could save her and her family was Justin, but he had a secret himself. 

Which she later found out.

The unknowns are out for revenge. Revenge that family secrets caused.

Will it all stop there? Will they have a happy ending?

✨My first ever book✨

title: ️Running With Scissors ✅
description:
Constance thought she could finally stop looking over her shoulder. She has a steady job as a hairstylist, rents a small apartment next door to her best friend, and keeps a routine that distracts her just enough to not have to dwell on her past.

All seems right in her world until a homeless man who's on the FBI's Most Wanted list comes barreling through the salon, effectively ripping apart all the hard work she put into her life.

Now she is forced to live as a fugitive from the law alongside the infuriating man who might just be the one to drag the skeletons out of her closet. Between her unresolved past and his unsure future, Constance works to clear his name so she can go back to living inconspicuously before the FBI catches them, or worse before the Mafia catches her.

***

Luca didn't want to get attached. He had learned the hard way that people are innately bad and nobody really cares about you; his situation is a prime example of that. However, when a bossy woman shows kindness for no other reason than she wants to, he can't help but return to her house to save her from the goons following his trail and suddenly finds himself responsible for a woman with a past as mysterious as his future.

With his new traveling companion having the appetite of a bear and an inability to be quiet, he soon learns that Constance is hard to keep at arm's length. While desperately trying to prove his innocence, Luca gets unexpectedly wrapped up in the strange, caring, trouble-making girl who just might be the key for him to get his life back.

***

title: You Are Mine
description:
The place he brought me had enough light to see the tall frame hovering over me. He had a black hoodie on so I couldn't tell much about his face, but only his  "heart-stopping" grin flashed before me. 

"Don't worry. I'll put you out of your misery" he said sitting on top of me.

Is this a dream? Or worse a nightmare!
Is this how I die? By getting murdered... there's so many things I want to do and learn, this can't be!

I looked up at him as he released my hands , a knife in his hand.

"Nooooo please" I cried pleadingly. 

"Shh!" He placed a finger on my lips before continuing, "I'll make it quick..", he cold heartedly said.

He drew it backward before coming for my chest.

"Nooo!"
--------------------------  
Like every other Senior, Tirzah thinks everything will go smooth and normal in her life. Thinking that she will enjoy her last year, she comes across events that would change that thought and her life.
Too caught up with friends, school and her love life she doesn't notice the fire being lit up.What will happen when she finds herself a stalker? Does her secret admirer want her hurt or dead? Is it obsession? Is it someone she knew once and had forgotten? Or is it someone she keeps a distance from?? All she knows that this person won't rest until they get what they want even if it means to kill anyone that stands in their way. 
Read to find out 💀
Welcome Ladies & Gentlemen as we journey into the story of "You Are Mine."

title: Beneath the Veil of Shadows
description:
"Elias, what am I getting myself into?" Sapphire whispered, her voice trembling as she gazed up at him.

His eyes, dark and intense, locked onto hers. "You're getting into me, Sapphire. All of me." Elias's fingers traced the curve of her neck, sending shivers down her spine.

"But what does that mean?" Sapphire's hands fluttered to his chest, feeling the steady beat of his heart.

"It means you'll see the worst of me," Elias warned, his voice low and husky. "The shadows I hide in, the secrets I keep. You'll be vulnerable, Sapphire."

"I'm already vulnerable," she countered, her voice barely audible. "Every time I'm with you, I feel like I'm drowning."

Elias's grip on her tightened. "I'll be your lifeline, Sapphire. Your anchor. But you have to trust me." His lips brushed against hers, a whisper of a kiss.

"Trust you?" Sapphire's laugh was laced with desperation. "You're the one person I shouldn't trust."

Elias's eyes flashed with pain, but his voice remained steady. "Maybe. But I'm the only one who can keep you safe."

As their lips met in a fierce, desperate kiss, Sapphire knew she was walking into the very heart of danger - and she couldn't look away.

---

When defense lawyer Sapphire Martin meets charismatic Elias Monroe at a charity gala, the attraction is undeniable. Sapphire is drawn to Elias's enigmatic smile while Elias admires Sapphire's unyielding passion.

As their romance deepens, Sapphire must confront the darkness of Elias's past. With each passing night, she finds herself more entwined in Elias's world. As the stakes rise, she must decide: can she trust the man she loves, or will his secrets be her ultimate downfall?

Elias, too, faces a reckoning. His feelings for Sapphire challenge the very foundations of his existence. Can he reconcile his loyalty to his organization with his growing love for the one woman who could destroy it all?

Will their passion be the light that saves them, or the spark that destroys everything?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Just a Taste (SAMPLE)
description:
April Mansten: nineteen years old, blonde, beautiful... and also daughter to Mario Mansten, a renowned bounty hunter, and as badass as they come in the bounty hunting world.

Kellan Reed: twenty-three years old, dark, dangerous, and deadly... at least according to some. April's always thought of him as a complete and utter jackass. He's come far in the few years he's been bounty hunting thanks to Mario, the only father figure he's ever really known. 

The two are polar opposites when it comes to their upbringing. April having grown up in a loving and caring home, until tragedy breaks it apart. And Kellan, who has been through foster home after foster home, the only stability he's ever experienced coming through the Manstens and the kindness they extended towards a troubled teenager. Mario was great to him; first as an adviser while he was in school, and later as a mentor as he eagerly embraced the bounty hunting world. 

This is their story, one which is filled with deplorable betrayal, unspeakable heartache, and a fragile truce that blossoms into... love?

title: The Disappearance of Valentina Moreno
description:
On a crisp, fall morning, Valerie Rossi is stopped by a stranger, asking if she's Valentina Moreno--a child who went missing in Yosemite National Park twenty years ago. 

Curious, Valerie's friend Julian looks up the age progression photo recently shown in the news, and the uncanny resemblance is too much to ignore. Especially because of the reoccurring dream Valerie has of a shadow snatching her in the night.

Suddenly, something doesn't feel right, so she digs for answers by turning to the one person she might not be able to trust: her father.

ONC prompt #51

~Featured on @WattpadFriendsandFamily - Book of the Month~

I'm an insomniactic daydreamer (that's me in the photo). I'm married, a mother of 2 rambunctious Terrier breeds, I'm a proud Aunt, y soy Latina 🇳🇮🇲🇽 My stories contain Latin MCs and usually take place in San Francisco since it's my hometown, so naturally, I think it's a spectacular setting. I write in whatever genre the wind steers me, but always with morally grey characters in chaotic settings.

When I'm not reading and writing, I'm working in healthcare analyzing cardiac arrhythmias. It's something I'm very proud of, considering my struggles with ADHD and Dyslexia. So no matter what people tell you, don't give up!

If you happen to come across my stories, please feel free to leave a comment. I'm always looking to improve them and make sure they flow well or make sense. Writing is very personal, and it takes guts to take what you've manifested in your thoughts and formulate them into actual words for people to judge. You're allowing readers into your mind. So have courage and be kind to one another :)

Hopefully, you'll enjoy my contribution to the Wattpad world! Cheers.

title: Nothing Left to Lose (SAMPLE ONLY - IT IS BEING PUBLISHED ON 5th NOVEMBER 2013)
description:
***** THIS IS JUST A SAMPLE OF THE STORY. IT IS BEING PUBLISHED ON 5TH NOVEMBER 2013 SO I HAVE HAD TO REMOVE MOST OF IT FROM WATTPAD. Please don't ask me to put the story back up here on Wattpad, I am not allowed due to the terms and conditions of publishing!!***** 
 
Annabelle Spencer’s life is every girl’s dream. She has wonderful parents, great friends, and of course the perfect boyfriend, Jack Roberts. That all changes on her sixteenth birthday when her life comes crashing down around her. Her dream night turns into a nightmare when Jack is murdered right in front of her, and she’s kidnapped by his murderer, Carter Thomas, a big time drug and arms dealer.

After ten months of being with Carter, she’s found, but the experience has totally changed her. She’s no longer the happy-go-lucky girl that everyone used to know and love; she’s now cold, hard and suffers from night terrors. It appears that Carter broke not only her body, but her spirit too. A shadow of her former self, her slogan for life is now: ‘If you don’t care about anything, then you have nothing to lose’.

Carter is currently serving time for the murder of Jack, a conviction that Anna helped secure. But his retrial is coming up because some key evidence appears to have been tampered with. Unbeknown to Anna, death threats are being received by her father, the Senator. It appears that Carter is still interested in Anna and will stop at nothing to get her back.

Ashton Taylor is brought in to protect her. He’s a newly qualified SWAT agent, a bright spark, the agency’s new golden boy. He is assigned undercover, posing as her boyfriend. His job is to help her through college and keep her safe until the end of the trial in eight months’ time.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi!

First off I have a new website, this is the link if you want to have a little look around:  http://www.kirstymoseley.com/

So, a little about me....

My name is Kirsty. I was born in Hertfordshire, England. I'm a typical winter baby who detests the hot weather and burns in even the slightest of sun.

I am married to a beautiful person, and am a very proud mummy of one teenage boy. Both of my guys are my inspiration and are my reason for being put here in the first place.

I have always been interested in writing, but after the birth of my son I accidentally came across Wattpad. After a couple of months of just reading on here, I finally plucked up the courage and posted one of my stories. I've been shocked and overwhelmed by the support of readers on here and you guys alone have given me the confidence to get where I am today.

In April 2012 I self-published my first novel 'The Boy Who Sneaks in my Bedroom Window'.  I haven't looked back since.

If I had to sum myself up in one word, it would probably be 'daydreamer' - but unlike most of my school teachers, I don't necessarily view that as a bad thing. After all, I read somewhere once that books are like waking dreams....

title: My Rejected Heart
description:
Arianna Mitchell has always been the pack's most hated werewolf. Everyone picked on her, everyone hated her. Ever since her mother's accident, her father abused her constantly. Arianna's life gets more twisted when she meets her gorgeous mate: the alpha of her pack. He wasn't the prince charming she hoped for. Instead, he was Arianna's worst nightmare. Not once had he treated her nicely, and when he realizes that Arianna's his mate, he doesn't want her. As Arianna tries coping with her mate, as well as the loss of her mother, old enemies rise. What exactly was her mother hiding that got her killed? The accident wasn't just an accident, it was murder. And Arianna will do everything she can to find her mom's killer. But will the torment of her mate get in the way of her life, causing more heartbreak? Can Arianna's mate find a way to accept her, or will he-as well as a secret enemy-hurt her more than she bargained for? With all the life threatening danger going on, all she knows for sure: she'll need her mate more than ever if she wants to get through this alive.

title: Beckoned Through The Dark
description:
Lesego Medupe has never questioned her identity before, she never wondered about the father she never knew, her dark complexion, or her mother's outrageous rules. That is until a nerve-racking accident introduces her to new faces, some of which only have impure intentions.

Abigail Daniels has spent her entire life searching for something, but never truly finding satisfaction in anything. With an unfaithful husband, an overbearing mother, a demanding career, and her calling, she never imagined her life could get any more complicated. However, her whole existence is thrown off track when an unlucky victim ends up in hospital, bringing dark spirits in her course.

Lesego and Abigail's lives cross paths when they get caught up in a web of lies and secrets after Lesego's estranged twin sister, Karabelo, wreaks havoc in their lives.

In their quest to get rid of Karabelo, they discover that everyone around them has their own agenda and that Lesego had another life before, which she does not remember. With no one to trust, but each other, it is up to them to work together in order to solve the puzzle and unravel all the secrets around their birth and families.

Unknown to them, there is more to the story than what meets the eye, and with every second they waste, more people are at risk of losing their lives.
Will they be able to figure out all the secrets in time to save the lives of their loved ones, or will they have to spend the rest of their lives watching over their shoulders?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a 25-year-old  aspiring writer and poet from South Africa, with a passion for words.

My biggest motivation is that: if you have a story that keeps you up at night, it deserves to be shared with the world; write and don't wait another second because no one is ever going to tell your story better than you, and most importantly, you never know whose lives your stories are going to impact.

Like they say, "The pen is mightier than the sword." So, please, beautiful people, keep sharing your magic and make the world a better place.

Thank you so much for taking the time to read my books. I hope you enjoy them and that you will continue with me on this journey.

I love meeting writers from all parts of the world, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.❣

I love exploring different genres and I love to write about secrets, lies, mysteries, suspense -and I'm a sucker for DRAMA. So, if you are looking for crazy adventures with plot twists that will keep you at the edge of your seats, you've come to the right place!

title: Bleed for the Camera
description:
It's been smooth sailing for Evie Harper lately. Business at her café is booming and her new man seems to be on a mission to keep a smile on her face. But when her actions directly lead to one of her clients getting murdered her happiness quickly turns into guilt. Even worse, the older woman died before Evie could get paid! Just when she's about to cut her losses, opportunity comes knocking in the form of a woman begging Evie to find the killer before things get even more out of hand. Now, Evie's got to race against the clock to find a murderer, help a kidnap victim, and ease her guilt for causing all this in the first place. Being the good person she is, of course she takes on the case out of the goodness of her heart...not to mention a three thousand dollar bonus waiting if she succeeds.

title: Christmas Behind Bars #simplychristmascontest
description:
Darcy's life is not turning out at all as she expected.  While her brother is getting married, moving to the big city, and getting job promotions, everything she touches seems to turn to dust.  Pressure from her family to settle down causes her to give into temptation.  Against her better judgment, she lies and tells her family her new boyfriend will be joining her for Christmas.  Of course, this boyfriend is nothing more than a figment of her imagination.  Will Darcy find true love for Christmas or spend the holiday behind bars in her attempt to put on a show for her family?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
As you will soon discover, I am absolutely terrible at talking about myself.  I have no idea what people will find interesting, but for your sakes, I will do my very best.  I am a born-again Christian and am so thankful for the salvation offered me by Jesus Christ despite the fact that I fail Him constantly.

I love cats, and when I say that, I truly mean it.  My spare time is spent either writing or volunteering at my town's animal shelter.

As far as likes and dislikes go, my favorite food is peanut butter, because it is one of the most perfect things on earth.  I'm terrified of clowns and feel it is in no way an irrational fear (look up John Wayne Gacy on Google, I dare you to invite a clown to a child's birthday party after that).

Someday, I dream of having a published book and trust the Lord to help me achieve that goal.  If you read my works, you will discover my tendency toward crime drama.  I tried cutesy and sweet, but it's not who I am.  On any given Friday night I can be found on my couch with a cat nestled on my lap watching Dateline with me.  Perhaps there is something seriously wrong with me, but true crime runs deep in my veins.

I can't wait to make some new friends through this journey I'm on.  Feel free to message me if you'd like to chat :)

title: Duskwood
description:
Jake's Prov:

Honestly I just wanted to make her jealous so I asked Jessica to dance. Now I'm dancing with Jessica. I received a message and it was Dan.

Dan: How dare you!!
Jake: What did I do?
Dan: Don't act in front of me.
Jake: Or else what you gonna do?
Dan: Wait and watch.

With that he stopped texting me.

I was still dancing with Jessica, suddenly I noticed that phil is coming towards MC. What? Why?

Phil: May I dance with you.
MC: Phil! You scared me. Don't you have work?
Phil: I can manage.
MC: It's ok you don't have to manage your work for me.

They are talking something I can't listen from here. Wait why is he lenning towards her? 

Phil: You know na I know about your little secret.

MC is staring at him, again why? Phil handed his hand forword, MC looked at him few seconds then took it.

Took it!??
.
.
.
.
.


Hello Guys,

It's all a game.

How much does the life of three hostages weigh against the life of an entire city?

For ex-detective Henry Wood, hunting a diamond thief seems like the best way to get him and his partner back into the team. Back into their jobs. It's been a year since they were fired and it can't go on like this.

As the stakes rise higher, and time is running out, all that remains is one question:
Who will play the better trick?

title: Secrets of the Swords, Book 1
description:
Acting normal is not the same as being normal.  No one knows that truth better than Suthe Montikwe.  Born with the unlucky genes of a distant druith ancestor, she's had to hide her talents in order not to be outcast by society.  Her strategy is to smile, keep quiet, and work hard.  While that method may keep her safe, it's also alienated her from her neighbors and friends, and the worry that she may be discovered is never far from her thoughts.

When her country sends out a warrant to capture anyone who practices magic, Suthe is forced to seek refuge elsewhere, all the while wondering at the sudden proclamation.  Why has the government taken an interest in her, and when will she be able to return home?

Unsatisfied with her lack of answers, Suthe decides to investigate.  But the more she looks, the deeper she gets herself into trouble, and she comes to realize that this mystery does not involve her country alone.  The threat of war looms on the horizon, and Suthe will need to put her trust in the strangers she meets, including a dangerous spy wanted for the betrayal of his own country.  But most importantly, Suthe will need to trust herself, and her abilities, if she ever wants to see home again.

~*~Current cover by Amanda-Mae ~*~
~*~Previous cover by italychick~*~
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
"Dammit Jim, I'm an author, not a cover artist."

But seriously.

Don't judge a book by its cover.

Hello, my name is Lauren. I sing, I dance, and I don't steal things, despite what Jason Mraz would lead you to believe.  BBC/Kdrama watchers, come hither and gather 'round the campfire.  I ate all the chocolate, but there's still plenty of marshmallows and graham crackers left.

I'm a tall lady living beyond the borders of the tall world.  The showers are shorter here.

I have a few pet peeves when it comes to writing.  The first is ending sentences with "at" (ex:  "The place where it was at.")  It absolutely drives me crazy, but I know there is a bit of a debate about ending sentences in prepositions, so I try to overlook it (funnily enough, I'm okay with other prepositions at the end of sentences, just not that one).

Second is what I call the "Twilight Tease", where an author feels their story starts out too blandly, but instead of making efforts to fix it, takes the lazy way out and skips to the climax of their story, copies a section of it, and then puts it at the beginning of their story as a "prologue" to hook readers. THAT IS NOT A PROLOGUE.

Finally, there's the lack of antagonist diversity. Let's not forget this works both ways. Never seeing yourself as the main character in stories is just as bad as always seeing yourself as the villain. Get rid of those stereotypes, people.

I love to read, but reading makes me want to write.  And I love to write, but writing makes me want to read...

Current stories:
1. Secrets of the Swords: book 1 first draft now complete! Drafting in progress for book 2.
2. Forever Green: in various stages of editing and drafting, sporadic updates.
3. Battle of the Sea Dragon: a sort-of sequel to Ballad of the Mountain Fox, once again featuring everyone's favorite liver-hungry gumiho.  On hold.

title: Kill Who You Want
description:
What if it came to the starkest of all choices: kill, or else suffer the loss of a loved one?

Readers' comments: 'simply the best', 'one of the best books I've read', 'loved it', 'amazing', 'great reading', 'stumped me to the very end' and others

Plot: When a pregnant doctor is brutally murdered in her own kitchen, the husband claims to have some weeks earlier received an anonymous and darkly menacing letter. For the small town of Ravensby, it's just the start of a living nightmare - one in which nobody is spared from the murderous cross hairs, and which will drive Detective Inspector Kubič to the edge of his own sanity...

Genre: suspense/thriller

Status: completed

Length: 70,000 words (approx. 275 standard novel pages)

Target readership: Though aimed primarily at adults, the novel features several teenage characters and so may also appeal to a younger audience

Extract:

 "Warn you sir, not a pretty sight in there."

Kubič took a deep, preparatory breath, his footsteps slow and leaden as he moved towards the kitchen door. Not for the first time over the years, he found himself wishing he'd chosen an entirely different sort of career. Paper-pushing, something out of doors. Anything at all. He'd always been reasonable enough at woodwork back at school, he recalled. Why hadn't he done that, he thought? Become a cabinet maker or some damn thing.

A reluctant hand pushed open the door...

"Oh dear Christ."

The words escaped his mouth forcefully, involuntarily, like blood gushing from an open wound
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Wattys 2020 winner (The Painted Altar, literary fiction)

(Please note I don't do read-for-reads, vote-for-votes or follow-for-follows. Only follow me if you genuinely like my work and wish to be updated on future projects.)

Hi, I'm a 50-year-old English teacher originally from England, but now settled in Italy. Creative writing's been my passion since I was old enough to hold a pen straight.

I'm a mystery/thriller writer who deals in twisty, suspenseful plots and psychological depth. My target readership is principally adult, and my literary ambitions lie in traditional publishing.

I have five novels on the site. The most recent, entitled The Trail Killer, revolves around the wrongful arrest of an Indian immigrant for the murders of two young women on a hiking trail. Explored themes include racial prejudice and gender inequality.

The Scent of Death is meanwhile about a cadaver dog handler. After uncovering the remains of a missing child, and unconvinced by the direction of official police investigations, she resolves to unravel the mystery herself.

My Wattys award-winning novel, The Painted Altar, mixes the historical element of the Second World War, and revolves around two interconnected murders, 64 years apart.

My Wattpad debut is an edgy thriller entitled Kill Who You Want, in which a small town is terrorised by a series of darkly menacing letters.

The final of my novels, The Third Shadow, is about a British detective who retires to southern Italy and becomes involved with carabinieri investigations into a case of two missing tourists.

Though the mechanisms of Wattpad may be at the disadvantage of adult/semi-literary writers like myself, I am nonetheless immensely grateful to the site for two reasons:
1) The week-to-week motivation it gives me to keep churning out those chapters and thus build up a body of work.
2) The possibilty to interact with a (relatively) small but (I hope) appreciative readership whose feedback will help me hone my craft.

title: A Life Wasted
description:
WATTY 2016 WINNER of the HQ Love Award! With national focus on Islamic terrorism, few noticed when "Domestic Terrorist" Clayton Waagner was added to the FBI's Ten Most Wanted List on September 21, 2001. How did a software developer become the 467th person added to the FBI's Ten Most Wanted List? Why did the FBI make Waagner a priority ten days after the worst terrorist attack in American history? How did he become the only person ever listed on the nation's top three Most Wanted List: FBI, U.S. Marshals, and ATF?
Clay Waagner led an interesting life. He pranked a Soviet ship and caused a Cold War incident inside the Arctic Circle. He is a licensed pilot, an artist, a husband of 40 years and the father of nine. He worked for the Christian Broadcasting Network and skippered a commercial fishing boat out of Kodiak, Alaska. He has escaped from custody five times. Criminal Science major's and convicts know his name, but few in the public do.
This is his story. 

"Autobiography is only to be trusted when it reveals something disgraceful.  A man who gives a good account of himself is probably lying."
 George Orwell

      By Orwell's standard this is an honest memoir.
            Clay Waagner 2016

title: My Loving Mate (The Silver Line Wolf Book 2)
description:
Elizabeth Montgomery has a mate.
He is over possessive, he is a jerk and sometimes he can be that perfect mate that always makes mistakes.
Lizzy has a mate and that mate is Max Coltrane.

When Lizzy finally decides to be with Max and put all the mistakes he made in the past. Someone gets in the way, and it's not other but Liam Coltrane Max's brother.
Now convinced that the gray wolf and the dreams she was having were not a merely coincidence Lizzy has to do everything she can to get out of Liam's claws especially after she discovers what Liam wants from her. The silver lines in her body, the gray wolf and the sudden revelation of her second chance mate will take Lizzy to make a hard decision:
To be with Max, the guy that cheated on her but loves her with all his heart or Liam her second chance mate who want nothing from her but to make her happy even if the word happy is applied by his own terms.
"I'm Liam Coltrane, Max's older brother." He said as he got near me and touched my cheek, I flinched at his touch.
I felt something when our skin had touched.
"You felt that too, right dear?" He said with a smile.
"Why?" I said.
"I'm your second chance mate, but from now on I will be your only mate." He said as he pressed his body against mine.
"No, you're not!" I yelled.
"Then explain why is it that I know that you want me." He said as he kissed my neck, I had to suppress my lips from letting the moan escape.
"I don't want you! I don't even know you!" I said.
"Don't worry about that dear Elizabeth there will be plenty of time to know each other very well. Do you prefer to start know?" He said before he crushed his lips against mine.
Tous Droits Réservés

description:
"P-Please save me, these bastards will sell me again" she was screaming and asking me for help.

I don't know why I saved her from that bastards, but suddenly she hugged me from behind.

I felt something strange, felt some kind of connection, but this place and its condition, she was under the influence of drugs which I could not bear.

I angrily pushed her away and looked back, then my gaze stopped there and I saw her eyes, those silver eyes.

I looked into her eyes, these eyes were not strangers, I recognized them, something was going on in my mind, yes it was related to her.

But I couldn't tolerate this situation, because of her condition and the place, I was getting angry.

I twisted her wrist and shouted angrily "What are you doing here? This is a place where women bidding for their bodies."
                              
                                  --------

What is the connection between Dhruv and Tara? What was she doing in such a cheap bar place? 

Is this a plan of destiny or is there some connection?  

Read To know more 🎀

title: Uncertain Truths
description:
"Two bodies in a car at the bottom of a ravine - one is a stranger, frozen solid; the other is her brother-in-law.
      
      Country girl Kaelynn Barrows has a compulsive need to understand what happened, and no respect for secrets. The police suspect her brother-in-law is a murderer and that his car accident was suicide. 
      
      She can't agree but after a young girl arrives with a note saying she'd his daughter, everything is open to question. 
      
      When Kaelynn and her sister stumble upon a third body, the questions won't stop and now it's not just the  police paying attention. 
      
      As she digs, threats hit too close to home, but she can't stop. At this rate, he'll be guilty, and she'll be dead. "
      
      Am hoping you'll be willing to rate each section with:
      1) I really want to know what happens next
      2) Interesting, but not worried about what's next
      3) Couldn't finish this (Please say why.)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Raised in the wilds of central British Columbia by a mother who, when she was young, literally hunted for her family's supper, and a father who daily went into the bowels of the earth to maintain the machines that worked to reveal it's inner treasures. As such, an active imagination was not only healthy, it was essential.

Roaming daily amongst the feral books that lined the paths of an almost mobile library, this imagination was fanned to a frenzy at times, and lulled into a coma at others. It became her goal to write the books that wake people up, that ignite imagination.

Armed with what little she knew about the world, she joined the Canadian military and went off to slay dragons. Four years later, the nature of the job brought her to choose between raising children and raising arms, and the children won. Thankfully. As they gained independence, she was step-by-step lured back into the fictive dream.

----

*chuckles* That was fun to write. As an author and reader, I lean towards mostly sweet, clean romance, and mysteries with danger, but it's really about the people and the world they're caught up in.

title: Serial Killers: Cold Blooded
description:

title: Project Purple
description:
Fourteen Americans volunteer for a unique three-month project to recreate America's early colonial experience for a worldwide on-line audience. 

The colonists have been deceived--They don't know their ordeal has been gradually, and brutally, altered by their organizers, and a genuine struggle for food, shelter and survival turns deadly as an Arctic winter approaches.

Is there some point to this insanity? - The besieged Americans (including a police detective who throws his world away to rescue a colonist he knows only as the Goatwench) must find the primal survivor within themselves to counter the ever-increasing violence they face ... All to the attentive schooling of their multi-national audience.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Guys/Gals! I could use some feedback on my 10th novel called "Cuckoo Heartfully". I'm posting chapter by chapter and would really appreciate any and all comments.

Sometimes we get a little lost in our lives ... The Cuckoo Colloquium is about 6 young teens on a boat ride to see the wildlife of the Borneo rain forest ... It's a one-way trip; calamity takes place, and the desperate teens, lost and separated, have to find themselves-metaphorically- before they can find themselves physically.  

Assunta unfolds a torturous ordeal of spiritual searching: What are we? Where in the universe do we belong?

Plum Rains On Happy House is, on one level, a wayward look at culture shock and the surprises that lay in store when newcomers try their best at assimilation into a dissimilar culture. The high-minded new tenant in Room 1 of Happy House, the Ichiban, decides to turn the old guesthouse into an English school, but is continually thwarted by a creature that lives under the floorboards called the Crat (cat meets rat). 

MOON DOGG spring-boards from a central question: What would happen if you were reincarnated, or "moved" after death into the body of another, but with fleeting memories of your previous life?  

In Purple Bleed the Naughty Beasts, 14 Americans have unwittingly volunteered to become colonial settlers for a 3-month project that slowly brutalises them without mercy. They have to find the primal survivor within themselves if they hope to make it to their "Thanksgiving". 

... Identity, knowing who we are and what we can do-it weaves through all five stories like fine fabric. 

Did I tell you I have a BLOG??? Go to: Michaelandrewgreco.com

title: Lost in Blue
description:
On an early Monday morning in Germany, Sankt Goarhausen's police department finds itself in a peculiar position as several policemen visit the site at the Rhine. Among them, 25-year old Henning Dorn is tasked to investigate the case of the salvage team's strange discovery: an unscathed coffin containing two bodies. 

As he opens the coffin to take a look, Dorn is severely surprised at its contents, setting him onto the path to uncover Sankt Goarshausen's mysteries.

Was it murder? Suicide? 

Or is the truth hidden beneath the Rhine's waters?

title: Run,Millie,Run -The Road Back-
description:
When Millie Blake was ten , her world was shattered by the sudden death of her parents. Forced to leave behind the sleepy town of Oakadown, she moved to the city to live with her aunt, burying her memories of the small, eerie town she once called home. Now, years later, Millie has returned to Oakadown-an overgrown, fog-drenched town that seems frozen in time.
But Millie isn't just seeking solace or closure. She's running from something, something dark and dangerous, and Oakadown feels like the only place she can hide. 
With every passing day, Millie realizes the town holds more than just memories-it holds answers. But not all of them are ones she's ready to face.

title: 7 Crows
description:
[ ONC 2019 | Ambassador's Pick | Judge's Honorable Mention ] 

[ Formerly Featured on Wattpad's Official @mystery account's Elementary, My Dear reading list ] 

The New Year kicked off to a bloody start for the private detective duos - Jamie Loxley and Blaine Ebony, as they strode into a murder scene. 

Two heads are better than one when it comes to disentangling a case. But, when a simple interrogation turns into a convoluted string of head game, figuring out the puzzle pieces won't be plain sailing. And, it doesn't help that the subjects are an immigrant who has trouble speaking English, an alcoholic suffering memory issues and a pathological liar. 

The grand form of deception will always be camouflaged in front of our very eyes.

authorBio:
❝ We are all stories, in the end. Just make it a good one, eh? ❞

Maddy Alson is a storyteller attempting to spin the creative fibres into intriguing yarns, hoping to seamlessly weave a tapestry of many-hued images that fascinates your mind─much like this third-person bio I'm attempting... This isn't working, is it? Sigh. This bio thingy is tricky.

Alright, let's try again.

Hey there, Wattpadian! So, you stumbled on my absolute mad profile, accidentally or intentionally. Either way, welcome!

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐀𝐁𝐎𝐔𝐓 𝐌𝐄?

Maddy Alson is a nom de plume. That's a fancy word for not my real name. But, I answer to Maddy or Mads or anything that's somewhat polite.

After graduating from Hogwarts, I've worked multiple jobs, notably as a consulting detective, a Master of Mystic Arts and an esteemed member of Men of Letters. Now I'm a companion of an alien time-traveller by day and a binge-watcher of multiple TV shows and films by night, which you probably figured out by the low-key references.

All jokes apart, I'm a Libran who's inevitably attracted to the calm beauty of nature, art in all forms and good books regardless of genre. And oh, I like writing!

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐃𝐎 𝐈 𝐖𝐑𝐈𝐓𝐄?
LitFic ➝ TBRTTS (◔)
Mystery-Thriller ➝ 7 Crows (✓)
Short Stories ➝ W&M (◔)
Children's Fic ➝ B!TGF (✓)
Paranormal ➝ DYC? (⏸) ➝ Co-written with @Iveyn-Adler
Howling Among Friends [A Marauders FanFic] (⏸) ➝ Read at @Dianne_R

I hope something catches your interest or at least something to dilly-dally over. If you do, let me know through votes/comments.

I usually express my gratitude personally, but if I fail to reach you... I appreciate every read/vote/comment/follow. Thank you!

𝐖𝐇𝐀𝐓 𝐄𝐋𝐒𝐄?
➝ ☹ No F4F/R4R/V4V/C4C. Sorry!
➝ ☺ Looking for feedback? I offer book review services @esthetiquecommunity

title: Merry Sister Mary: Two Can Play That Game
description:
[Merry Sister Mary Series Book 2]
Sister Mary is a nun of extreme exceptions. She loves playing pranks, manipulating people for her own gain, running and screaming from the smallest of water droplets, and finding trouble wherever she goes. But behind her unholy exterior, lies a woman devoted to doing good in her own unique and humorous way.

Removed from her convent, Sister Mary is sent to New Orleans, Louisiana, to live with the Poor Clares and the Ursuline nuns and hopefully learn the true discipline of being a nun. Unfortunately for them, Sister Mary has arrived during Halloween, and New Orleans famous for its supernatural history finds a host of dark events plaguing the senator's family. Sister Mary sneaks her way into the senator's costumed gala to learn more when a mysterious murder takes place leaving a trail of clues that could permanently alter the city's political future. With her nunery struggling to find funds and a treasure hunt for a horrible buried secret, only Sister Mary has the means to find humor in the dark and bring justice to light.

***Regular updates***

title: Suits & Aces (#3)
description:
It is blood and water in this sequel as MJ Billings and Logan Parker battle a common enemy. 

There's no weapon as deadly as hidden secrets. It is a game of cards in this sequel as everyone uses their best card to stay at the top of their game, bullets and dead bodies are only casualties, the real weapon can never be uncovered - the past should stay in the past, and some secrets to be buried forever even if it means sending some people with them. 

MJ is hellbent on taking the law into her own hands in order to protect her brother, but she also realises that his safety will come at a price. She is willing to do whatever it takes in order to save Jorge from Samantha's clutches, but there's more to the story than what meets the eye, and MJ would like to keep it that way. 

Logan knew from the day he met Samantha Grayson that she was trouble ‐ and he wanted nothing more than to get rid of her. After the little scare that landed her in hospital, he thought she had learned her lesson, but her retaliation cost him millions and cost people their lives. His efforts of revenge are further thwarted by MJ, and while trying to resolve their relationship, he can't help but wonder what her true motive is as she goes all out to get rid of Samantha. 

Despite years of unresolved issues, they agree to put their differences aside to protect their families. They believe the past is the past, and some secrets should remain buried forever- but secrets of the past threaten to tear their newfound alliance apart. 

The question remains: who exactly is MJ trying to protect- Jorge, or herself?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a 25-year-old  aspiring writer and poet from South Africa, with a passion for words.

My biggest motivation is that: if you have a story that keeps you up at night, it deserves to be shared with the world; write and don't wait another second because no one is ever going to tell your story better than you, and most importantly, you never know whose lives your stories are going to impact.

Like they say, "The pen is mightier than the sword." So, please, beautiful people, keep sharing your magic and make the world a better place.

Thank you so much for taking the time to read my books. I hope you enjoy them and that you will continue with me on this journey.

I love meeting writers from all parts of the world, so please don't hesitate to get in touch.❣

I love exploring different genres and I love to write about secrets, lies, mysteries, suspense -and I'm a sucker for DRAMA. So, if you are looking for crazy adventures with plot twists that will keep you at the edge of your seats, you've come to the right place!

title: The Sociopath: A BBC Sherlock Fanfic
description:
{SUMMARY: EDITED}
Follow the exciting life of the consulting detective, Sherlock Holmes as him and his flatmate, John Watson, try to catch James Moriarty, a consulting criminal who is only known to them as the "Invisible Man". However, it isn't long until both find out his true name, and the detective himself finds out his true identity. Things get turned for the worse when Sherlock comes up with what he believes a clever plan, a plan that he keeps secret, in order to beat the consulting criminal at his own game. But it could be that Moriarty has messed with the sociopath's mind. . . Which means he may be going mad. But despite all of this, and keeping this secret away from John, Mr Holmes is a restless man, and he will not stop at nothing until he has caught---and stopped--- the enemy(Dr.Watson, however, is less determined). 
With an IQ above average and being a highly-functioning sociopath at best, and a detective partner who happens to be a doctor at  his side, Sherlock is on a wild hunt in which the scent gets nearer. . . . But the trail is getting fainter every time he is one step closer.
The game is on. . .


{FANFIC WRITER'S NOTE: The reason why I edited the summary was because I realized I turned it into something totally different than how I planned it. Fortunately, it has turned out better, haha. And so, in this Sherlock fanfic, rather than focusing on the detective solving cases, it's focused on his confrontation with James Moriarty and how he tries to defeat him. Some things are like in the TV Show, but I'm going to make things different or add stuff. I hope you've enjoyed it so far!}

title: On The Run
description:
Thandeka Nkhosi is getting ready for her wedding ceremony. She feels like something is not right. She tells her mother she no longer feels her fiancé, Themba Mkhize; how disconnected he is. She's told to be calm, but it's nagging on her. She tries calling him, but because of their agreement to not communicate via phones and other means all day until after their wedding ceremony, he doesn't pick up. Hysterically, she cries and causes her mother Gloria Nkhosi to worry.

A frantic groomsman calls her and says they can't find Themba. She runs out of the room, looking for him. During her search, she goes to the wedding ceremony marquee and there he lies, a bloodied mess... dead.

As the police investigate, she's placed as a suspect because of the statement given by her mother about how she woke up that morning saying that she couldn't feel Themba anymore.

It's a journey of how she runs from the police, tries to find her fiancé's killer and how love finds her again.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My name is Thabisile Nonsikelelo (Busisiwe, Temalangeni, Ntfombyembuso, Ayanda, Ellen) Dlamini. I was born on a Saturday, the 12th of March 1994, at 20h00 apparently. 12 has automatically become my lucky and favourite number. My family and I are from the Kingdom of Swaziland and we are part of the royal family (which means zero once you cross the Swaziland/South African border, WHATEVER!). I am the last born of 8 children (hectic, right?).

I love singing (a gift from God to me), dancing (privately or shyly), drawing (also known as 'Thabigraphy') and reading. I fell in love with reading when I read the Twilight Saga. Unfortunately, I now find it hard to read hard copy books. Since Wattpad happened to me, I am a reading freak. Alpha Bloodlines by Kirsty Moseley (aka Kirsty1000) was the very first book that I read and I haven't thought of backing down.

I love love. I love love stories. No matter what we all say about love, I still come back for more. I love making people laugh. I love putting smiles on people, although I frown a lot. My mind is always brewing large barrels of thoughts (call it a curse or whatever). I rarely make my thoughts audible for safety reasons or something.

I love movies (genres: horror, comedy, sci-fi action, drama, thriller and selected action). I love music, which probably is the understatement of the century. Music is my soul-searcher, cleanser, beautifier and my life.

I wish to leave a mark when I leave Earth...

If I never get to meet you (the one reading this), I hope this information helps you learn what kind of person I am. ;-)

title: Taming The Humans
description:
Danny is a female human from Wisconsin, USA. She was abused as a young girl and ran from home as soon as she turned 18. The aliens found her sleeping under a bridge with nothing but a blanket, a stuffed bear, and an uneaten granola bar. Everything else had either been stolen or sold for food. 

Dean is an old man cast out to the streets after losing his pension. He was a veteran of 30 years, fought in many wars for his country, and yet shunned by his community. 

Seline is a 21 year old stoner and shroom consumer. She lives at a campsite and relishes in being one with the nature around her. 

Nathaniel is a high class business man. He takes runs on the trail next to a campsite at the break of dawn before getting ready for a day in the office. 

Draboo found the poor petite thing under a bridge shivering in the night, asleep and clutching a small brown stuffed bear. He was baffled at how her colony would banish such a young girl, proof that humans were incapable of nurturing their own and caring for themselves. Draboo, with a heavy heart and tears threatening to fall for this fragile human, gently sprayed her with a sedative, scooped her up, and carried her to the awaiting ship. She would find a good home on his planet, he would make sure of it. 

He then found three other humans that needed rescuing and takes them to his ship where they will travel to the planet Grinnell to his shop and training facility. 

Jubilena is a pet trainer at Draboo's Human Shop and Adoption Agency. Frampton is a volunteer who helps socialize and calm the rescued humans. He brings his human, Krystal to help ease the humans into trusting us. 

Kitronas are humans. Tranas are an alien race who are three to four times larger than the average adult. Humans resemble their own race, but with skin tones that do not shimmer and manes that come in many colors. Tranas have control over the elements.

title: Ace Attorney: Quiet after the Hurricane
description:
Morix Law Offices comes off as a regular agency to many, but the truth is far from what it appears. After Cotoli Morix, a well-known lawyer in the area, invites Deirdre Brigit and Lily Shield to join his agency to work alongside him, Chrysalis Starr, and Yuri Rinko, the newcomers begin to suspect that things are not what they seem. The mysterious spy known simply as the Oracle of the Law keeps popping up in nearly ever case taken on by the members of the agency, leaving Cotoli, Deirdre, Lily, Yuri, and Chrysalis wondering who it could possibly be.  Each new murder leaves them more perplexed than ever before as the mystery complicates itself further. It seems the only way to quell the chaos is to figure out who the Oracle is, but is that even possible? And if their identity is revealed, what consequences will it have?
It's up to the agency to bring about quiet after the hurricane despite the impossible odds that they're combatting.
(First in the Morix series)
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my account! My name is Digital. I use they/them pronouns and write stories here. I've settled on six longer stories here and a few other sites. You can find all links to those sites and other social media platforms I'm on in the Linktree below!

Here's a summary of my current stories!

First, I have my Ace Attorney series, Morix. The current book, 'Web of Mistrust', is a sequel to 'Quiet after the Huricane' and 'Secrets beneath Secrets'. It revolves around a small law agency, Morix Law Offices, as they try to dispel corruption from the legal system around them. Updated Thursday.

Second, there's an original series, Alitia. The first book is 'Welcome to Millennia'. It follows a group of eight girls attending the magic academy, Alitia, while attempting to refine their powers. The sequel, 'Crown of Ash', focuses on the girls' second semester at Alitia. It's a fantasy story with elements of action and adventure. Updated Tuesday.

Third, we have another original fantasy series, Galaxy of Hyperion. 'World of New Life' is the first book. It revolves around six teenagers who are pulled into another galaxy and forced to fight in its war to get home. Updated Saturday. On hiatus until the next book, 'Mystic Heir', debuts in August.

Fourth, there's my rewrite of Fire Emblem Fates. The story is entirely different from canon and strives to improve on the original. The prologue, Birthright, Conquest, Hidden Truths, and Heirs of Fate are finished and Revelation is in progress. Updated Sunday.

Fifth, I have an alternate universe of Fire Emblem: Three Houses called Fódlan Alternative. It has characters from 50 creators in one story about an amnesiac carving their future while recovering lost memories. Updated Friday.

Last, there's my rewrite of Digimon Frontier called 'Frontiers Unexplored'. It is freeform and longer than my other stories, so it is updated on no schedule.

I hope that at least one of those stories piques your interest. Stick around, Digital Dreamer!

title: Another dumb teen book
description:
"Oh I..I'm I'm..?" The words wouldnt form. I backed up slowly as he cocked his head to the side, confusion on his face. Then he did the last thing I expected, he smiled. A face splitting smile that sent shivers down my spine. This was it I was going to die. I hit some kind of nerve and sent him over the egde. I closed my eyes preparing myself for the worst. I opened them to see him coming towards me. I backed up until I hit wall behind me. He kept coming until he was inches from my face. He slammed his hands on either side of my head, blocking any exit. I kept my eyes on anything but his face.    "I'm.. I didn't..please"   

What happens when the new guy in school is a convicted felon? Sadie is a good girl but she gets lost in his troubled past. When sex betryal and murder get thrown into the mix will they survive or will they crash and burn.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Double Edge | WATTYS 2023 SHORTLIST + AMBYS 2023 TOP PICK
description:
✨️WATTYS 2023 SHORTLIST + AMBYS Top Pick, Science Fiction! ✨️ | Gio, a man jailed for a crime he didn't commit, becomes an augmented human in exchange for his freedom, only to question his sacrifice when he becomes thirsty for revenge.

      *****

The plan was simple:

Go in through the front doors, demand the money from each of the drawers, and escape with the getaway car before the cops arrived.

That plan crumbled in less than five minutes.

Giovanni only took part in the robbery to pay for his daughter's kidney transplant. But after he was arrested, then sentenced to life, he lost it all.

He wouldn't see his daughter grow, start school, or fall in love. He'd miss every step of her life while wasting away in prison with what was left of his.

So, when Paxton, a blossoming cybernetic company, approached his cell with a proposition, Giovanni didn't say no. In exchange for becoming their experiment, he'd get to see the sunlight outside prison walls. He'd get to see his daughter's smiling face. 

And he'd get to find his "friends" who ran away with his freedom.

***

title: Superior
description:
Delaney Escott lives in a world where popularity reigns supreme. If you want to be noticed, social status is everything. The government is run by the Superiors: a very exclusive group of individuals who are virtually flawless. They are smarter than us and stronger than us, and to join their ranks is the highest honor. The Superiors pay an annual visit to the top schools in the nation and evaluate the students, choosing one boy and one girl - the most Popular in the school - to go the Capitol and train for Superiority. Delaney thinks that she's the only one indifferent to (and perhaps even suspicious of) the Superiors, until Caleb Payne, the most popular boy in school, approaches her with a request. He has a task for her, one that he believes she is uniquely capable of completing. And as she helps him, Delaney discovers that the government is hiding many secrets - and that the truth of the Superiors is far from what people believe it to be.

[Watty Awards 2012 Winner, Science-Fiction: On the Rise]
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Rudolph the Red Nosed Reindeer : New Heights
description:
You know Dasher and Dancer and Prancer and Vixen. Comet and Cupid and Donner and Blitzen.
But do you recall the most famous reindeer of all?

Everyone up at the North Pole is busy getting ready for Christmas. Elves are making toys. Santa is checking that old list. And the reindeer are prepping their flying skills! But one blizzard night, a new little reindeer friend joins them in their stables. But this little guy has a strange little talent. He can make his nose glow a bright red! 
Will Rudolph be able to help save Christmas this year? or will it be left in the dark?

(Thank you for reading this story! Christmas has a very special place in my heart and always makes me think back to happier times. I grew up with the stop motion Rankin Bass specials, and watch them every year. I wanted to try my hand at my own telling of Rudolph the red nosed reindeer :)

title: When Death takes notice
description:
Games can be fun, but some games end rather badly. What happens when a young girl plays a game that catches the attention of someone that's not only bad, but deadly?

Because once you kiss death... well... lets's just say that a killer doesn't kiss and tell...

<3 This is a sample of my book. The book can now be found on Amazon, both as a paperback and as a digital book. It was free for five days in March 2020 to thank the wonderful readers here on Wattpad that supported me while I wrote the book. Thanks again for the support, it meant a lot. <3 

NB! Warning some people might find this twisted love story disturbing. Stockholm syndrome* will be comming into play. The published version of the book is mature. The book starts off somewhat light, but it does get darker chapter by chapter. It is not recommended for a younger audience, nor for those who might take offense with strong language, sex scenes, non consensual acts, violence etc. 



Happy reading :D



*Stockholm syndrome is a condition that causes hostages to develop a psychological alliance with their captors as a survival strategy during captivity. These feelings, resulting from a bond formed between captor and captives during intimate time spent together, are generally considered irrational in light of the danger or risk endured by the victims. Generally speaking, Stockholm syndrome consists of "strong emotional ties that develop between two persons where one person intermittently harasses, beats, threatens, abuses, or intimidates the other.

title: THE LOST CAUSE BAR #wattys2017
description:
Delaney, a woman despairing over unreliable people, leaves everything behind for a night. Her sights are set on leaving the area but her dream, of owning and running something, might be more realistic than she thinks.  

The night becomes better than she could have expected. 


Can she take this one night and bring her dream to life even though her expectations are something of a lost cause?

Did I mention there are three men who will show her if all males are the same?
No?
Well there are so prepare for hotness, stumbles, and hot messes!

authorBio:
I live in Texas with a very busy household. My husband is always working but i have a young one to keep occupied when we are at home. in other words my life has no schedule and my writing is done in bits and pieces most of the time.

I have been writing ever since I can remember whether it was short fables or poetry (in high school) but its grown  now to  short stories, fan fictions (monstrosities that are slowly killing my computer) and Teen Romance.

I write to express how I wish the world could be: full of fantasy, mystery, and just a little bit of sass everywhere. My  main love of writing is building new characters and exploring their worlds and following their lives.

title: Stop crying your heart out (Eminem love story)
description:
Okay picture this. When you were 5 years old you witnessed the murder of your best friend happen by the hands of your own dad. Now picture being left with your dads accomplice while he go finds a shovel to bury the body. Now picture both of them being caught. Okay now picture the accomplice to this hideous crime only gets 25 years in prison for this horrific crime. Okay now you're currently 30 years old and your marriage with no other then eminem is falling apart. Then you go to your friend and she reveals the news that will change everyones lives for ever. She is getting married and she's pregnant! Okay i guess your wondering what's so life changing and horrific about that? Well what if your best friend is knocked up and engaged to your fathers accomplice who just got out of jail! What do you do? Do you stay silent? Or do you wait for the accomplice to get it's revenge and kill you in your sleep?

Iris will soon find out the truth about everything that happened to her friend and her mother but digging up the truth could be more shocking and twisted then she could ever imagine.

title: The Prince's Assassin
description:
The blade of my hidden knife stops just a few centimetres from the prince's warm skin of his neck. He lays there, eyes closed and rhythmic breathing. His defined jaw relaxed and his teeth barely showing behind his pink lips. 

I hear voices coming from the hallway. I glance up at the door then back to the sleeping Prince. The door handle rattles, the guards yell from behind the wall. I bite my lip, balancing the blade just on the skin of the prince's neck. 

The door bursts open just as I slip out of the bedroom window into the cool midnight, no evidence of my attempt to assassinate the prince. 

~~~~~~~~~~

Trained Assassin, skilled in over 4 martial arts, specialised in weaponry and one on one combat...

And I couldn't kill the prince. 

So my question is, what stopped me?

____________________________________


"My chest literally hurts. This writing is phenomenal" - yellowdance13

"Oh my god I'm literally crying" - Campervangirl2000

"This book ticked all my boxes!" -bantaa14

title: Wildcat Mountain
description:
Unable to remember the tragedy that left her orphaned, a little girl grows up in the wild backcountry of 1850 Colorado. Facing betrayal, greed, danger, and love, she must choose the kind of future she wants for herself. Safely hidden away, alone, and content, or learn to accept somethings are worth the risk.
*
*
 "I hear there was trouble in White Rock two days ago. Man by the name of Ludlow was shot dead in the street. He's a hired gun from Texas, talk is he tangled with Red Rivers and lost."

 Faith felt her heart quicken at the mention of his name and frowned.

 "Red River's? The gunfighter? Last I heard he was in New Mexico."

"Not no more ma'am. Word about is he's got a price on his head and all the local guns who think they're salty enough are out to take him down."

 Her mind was whirling. Rivers was a wanted man; every hired gun in the territory would be after him, especially if there was a large reward involved. Where would he go, what would he do? Of all the stories she'd heard of Red, he was not a man to run from a fight.

******

It was time to leave the wedding venue and Aahil took brisk strides towards me. He looked as fresh and elegant as he had at the start of the ceremony while I felt spent and drained with exertion.

As we walked towards the exit with my hand firmly held by Aahil, he bent his head and spoke in a barely audible whisper, "You really want to find out what it is like being married to me?"  he bit out with a flash of pure fire in his mesmeric gaze.

"You will wish every minute of the day that you stayed where you belonged and you will be begging to be out of this relationship before the reason for which I had to go through this charade comes to an end!"

Content / Engagement Ambassador / Outreach.

~A little talent is a good thing to have if you want to be a writer. But the only real requirement is the ability to remember every scar~


Stephen King


******

'I am a beautiful princess who lives in a castle of a faraway land with my handsome prince.' lol :)

I am introvert or extrovert depending on the people am dealing with.

Reading books till late night, drinking coffee, gaining Islamic knowledge, going on long drives and day dreaming are my love.

Caffeine is bae.

Purple is mesmerizing.

I am someone who could eat all the dishes in the world and not put on an ounce.

Currently my favourite word is 'Commented' (I hope you know why) **smiles**

I could still read famous five, Mallory towers, Nancy drew, fairy tales lol. I could gobble up huge volumes of books in a single go.

Harry potter is a all time favourite too (I practically cried the whole day while Sirius passed away).

I have found my Mr.darcy ;) The knight in shining armour lol. Alhamdulillah I'm married and a happy mother of an year old twin boys:) 

Last but not the least I hope to become a better muslimah with each passing day.

-------------

There are a thousand hardships I face,
A million times my heart breaks.

A never ending darkness I see,
And it owerpowers and weakness me at my seams.

But still there is a ray of hope in my fate,
Which has the power to diminish all calamities with ease.

And whose promise can be so unbreakable and true,
Other than my lord who says 'Surely after hardship comes ease'.

-voracious_writer.

title: Door To Door
description:
Hudson Ellis is good at his job.

Somehow, he manages not to annoy people when he knocks at their doors and asks them to contribute to the charity he works for - instead, he gets them to sign up for sponsoring programmes and fish whatever spare change they have out of their pockets. 

Even the infamously tough residents of New York City are falling victim to Hudson's easy-going ways and wide smile; that is, until one woman renders him speechless with sarcastic refusals and slams her door in his face.

Perhaps Hudson would be able to forget her - if it wasn't for the fact that she lives on the same floor of the next apartment over, and they both have floor-to-ceiling windows that allow for a rather generous view into each other's flats.

title: Watching
description:
James Heart, your normal average teenager lived his entire life in a quiet, peaceful town where nothing out of the ordinary ever happened. That is, until one day when his friend, David, approached him about a rumor. "There are rumors about a new mysterious organization in town who are seemingly causing trouble by committing crimes. No one even knows if the organization or gang even exists since there's no trace of them anywhere and the police can't pinpoint how or why the crimes are being committed". James' and his friends' world gets turned upside down one day when they seemingly receive strange letters in their mail, under the assumption they are from the "boss" of this so-called organization. More and more evidence began to pile up that there's something strange going on in town. James, David and James' girlfriend, Vanessa, now dealing with an unknown organization with unknown origins, lives are potentially in danger, and no one has any idea who is friend or foe. Now juggling between their ordinary school life, they also have to unravel the mystery behind this organization before it's too late.

title: The Mysterious Island
description:
The Zakovia Island is a Mysterious Island where Kidnapping and killing people takes place but nobody knows who is behind it? What is going on that Island? It was Mysterious for everyone. Everyone is aware if someone goes to that Island will be found dead or kidnapped, even Cops are hesitant to go there but Stella Julie Dawson wants to solve the Mystery of that Island. She wants to give justice to those who have been brutally killed and kidnapped. But by going there her life turn upside and down with lots of mystery, adventure and with Love.

So come and join the adventure of Stella where she reveals lots of secret of the island.

****
"You are not allowed to go further from here" who does he think of himself to order us around. "And may I ask you why?" I asked him making his head turn around towards me. "Because little girl the Zakovia island is very dangerous to tour around" he replied with a bored expression.
"First, I am not a little girl, I completed my university long back and second, we are not here to tour around but to solve the mystery of the island" They both started laughing at me as if I said some kind of joke. "Why are you laughing?" I asked them with a frown making them stop laughing and looked at me.

"First you are little for us and second you are not allowed to go further whether you like it or not and that's final" I glare at him. "You are not my father to tell me what to do and what not to do" I hissed making him smirk. "That's correct I am not your father but I am an investigator if you not follow me then what's happens next don't blame me for it" my jaw drop definitely on the ground. This asshole is an investigator and now seeing my reaction he was smirking at me

title: Lantern: Reflection of the Peach Blossoms
description:
This is the story of the Phoenix Vidyarāja and a Grand Demon just awakened from Hell.

***

On the ancient battlefield, two armies were standing in stalemate. On one side were the Vajras, the Arhats, the Gods and the Buddhas from the Realm of Gods. On the other side were all the of monsters and demons from the Blood Sea in Hell.

The personification of that Grand Demon leaped forward, holding a long sword across his chest. He flew across the battlefield, insolently cutting in halves the eleven Phoenix Bone Arrows, each of which was enough to destroy the world.

Then, he arrived in front of the Phoenix Vidyarāja, who was standing high above the masses:

"Your Majesty, please don't move-"

"I didn't come for the war. I came to propose to you."

Phoenix was the Buddha's inexorable doom for thirty-thousand years, while Zhou Hui was Phoenix's redemption that could free him from the fate of his eternal life.

After hundreds of thousands of years of endless light and shadow, this handsome yet devilish man finally emerged from Hell,

To bring the Phoenix Vidyarāja away from the gandah-gajah Kingdom of Buddhism and the boundless lotus sea.

"Let me follow you to that world. For you, I'll be invincible forever-"

You're my shore after swimming across hundreds of miles of water. You're my destination after traveling through thousands of miles of land.

title: THE WEB I LAID
description:
Six years ago, Arya's life was torn apart in a devastating accident that took everything from her. Now, she lives a quiet, unassuming life in Jaipur, working at a small flower shop and trying to leave the shadows of her past behind. But peace is fragile, and the shadows are closer than she thinks.

Mysterious marigolds appear at her doorstep, each one a silent reminder of something-or someone-she can't escape. The eerie feeling of being watched grows stronger every day, but Arya convinces herself it's nothing more than paranoia. Until he walks into her life again.

Shiv.

Once her childhood protector and the son of her father's closest friend, Shiv was a man she trusted completely. But betrayal and tragedy changed everything. Now, Shiv is a cold, ruthless figure in the underworld-powerful, calculating, and terrifyingly distant. Yet when he sees Arya, something in his hardened gaze flickers, stirring the feelings she thought had died long ago.

But Shiv isn't here to rekindle the past. He has his own reasons, and none of them are kind.

In a shocking twist, Shiv proposes marriage.

Arya is left reeling. Why would a man who once hated her family-and perhaps still does-ask for her hand? Is it part of a twisted revenge against the sins of her father, a cruel game to make her pay for something she doesn't fully understand? Or is there something darker lurking beneath Shiv's cold exterior?

As Arya is pulled deeper into Shiv's dangerous world, she must confront the secrets that bind them and the growing tension between love and vengeance. Shiv's motives remain a mystery, but one thing is clear: his intentions could either destroy her or save her from the shadows that refuse to let go.

Cindy believes is she ignores the curse her life will be perfect; Ziggy believes the exact opposite. Enough about those two; Y/n may or may not find love along the way; her and a certain someone hope that they'll make it out alive. They will, right?

title: Her Dark Side
description:
Just a glance.
That's all it was.
Now she's wishing she never had.

Willow is an exemplary example of a spy. The best one around. But when she peeks into the folder of the one criminal she's supposed to steer clear of, everything begins to change, she starts to lose herself and just that one glance of the folder pushes her into a whole new depth of mystery solving.

Suddenly their rival criminal gang are on her tail and she has to run. But her time is limited and when she realises there's only so much time until you have to face the consequences of your actions, everything has already begun to fall apart.

title: A Boy Named Jasper  {Wattpad Featured Novel}
description:
For with God nothing shall be impossible. (Luke 1:37)
~~~~~
Jasper is a screwed up kid, yet no one cares enough to find out why. Bruises hide his arms and alcohol stains the walls of his house, but he pushes forward because it's the only thing left for him to do. His days are spent in and out of the school psychologist's office, while his nights are spent in fear of his father. His guitar and the secluded spot by the train tracks where he likes to play are the only saving graces in the hell that is his life. No one disrupted this normal routine until Callie came.

Callie is far from screwed up; she doesn't have family issues and doesn't understand the first thing about Jasper's world. Her house is filled with answered prayers and smiles of people who love each other. Her arms are clear and her head is full of optimism that Jasper doesn't buy for a second. She never second guessed her sunny disposition on life until she stumbled upon a boy and his guitar down by the train tracks.

Callie and Jasper weren't supposed to cross paths. She wasn't supposed to care and he wasn't supposed to let her get under his skin, but then again opposites weren't supposed to attract either.   Callie saw the good in him where most people thought there was none ; she was captivated by Jasper because he made her question everything she knew about the world.

She thought it would be easy to teach him that there was still good left in the world, that there was more beyond all the bad he'd become accustomed to. She thought fixing him would be easy, but nothing worthwhile is ever easy and sometimes it takes more than one girl's overly optimistic persistence to pull a person out of the hell they've been living in; sometimes it takes faith and realizing that some things can't be done without it...
~~~~~
-Highest Ranking: #8 in spiritual, 10/25/17 ; #1 in Christianity, 2019
-Wattpad Featured Novel: 10/19/17

title: Curtain Call (The Jewel Project #7)
description:
"This is it. The curtain call. Where we go from here is entirely your choice. Funny how we're right back where we started."

It has been four years since Sam and his brothers blackmailed the Agency into keeping them on board for the Jewel Project.

Four years in which they did everything in their power to plant a bomb inside their employer.

Four years of weddings, children and peace.

When Sam accidentally discovers the pattern for the placement of the jewels, as well as the location of the final one, they have a very difficult decision to make.

They know they have to finish what they started and make sure the last jewel doesn't end up in the wrong hands.

But when what was supposed to be their final adventure goes terribly wrong, it becomes increasingly hard to pick up the pieces. 

However, the Agency wants them back in the game. They can't afford to fail. And when Snitch Gravel re-emerges to race them one final time, the stakes are higher than they'd ever been.

And Sam and his team face the ultimate challenge. Can they make their way out alive, or are they destined to become their worst enemy?

🧭🧭🧭

Sequel to Ruins

The last book in The Jewel Project series 

Cover by @italychick

Story is completed. The entire series is completed!!!

title: Justice Arc 1 : Dragon Fist
description:
The story of a young boy named Mikado, who has lost his memory after a terrible tragedy befell him.

Although he tried many times to remember it again, but his efforts failed because the memory was so tightly locked that he almost lost his identity.

He was raised by an 89-year-old grandmother named Ashiro Grandma since he was 5 years old. With his memory gone and his background unknown, Mikado tries to forget his original goals in order to achieve his desired goal.

But....

He, came uninvited. And entered a school he never imagined as long as he was still breathing. Exiled, slandered, tortured, insulted and ostracized. Until he wished that this was all a nightmare so that he could wake up from it.

"I never thought that this was reality. Please, wake me up from this nightmare...." MIKADO

Mikado also continues to face 'hell' without stopping. Until a character appears that makes him scared half to death and wants to go back to his original place and just disappear.

"Why are you still here? I really don't like you being in my school! Get out of here or you will feel 'hell' here forever!" RAIDEN MATSUO

Ah..... Can I last until this year's school graduation ceremony?

title: THE THIRTEENTH DAY - BOOK 1
description:
With a brutal, faceless killer walking freely on the streets of Freetown, everyone's instinct is to run and hide. Seventeen-year-old Cassidy Meyer's instincts however, immediately urge her to run toward the direction of danger in an attempt to unmask the killer's identity, thereby satisfying her life-long obsession for crime-solving. Her obsession with the case starts to create a wedge between her and her loved ones, and it starts to put everyone's life in danger. The only way to salvage her friendship and save everyone's life is to finish what she started; to find the killer before he can claim another life.

title: TWISTED ICE (ONC 2023)
description:
Five friends, one is a killer. 

On fall break, twenty year old Eliza Goodchild sets off with four of her college friends for a remote cabin in Aspen, Colorado. When a blizzard strikes without warning, their SUV skids off an embankment and disappears into a wooded ravine. In the whiteout, they get lost and find themselves in a frigid wilderness where every wrong move can spell certain death. In their struggle to survive, they learn one of them is a killer. Everyone has secrets and motives, but when the killer claims a second victim, they realize all of them are targets in an icy twisted plot to get away with the perfect murder, or should we say, murders.
