title: The Sad Man. A Dani Lancing Story
description:
Police officer Tom Bevans is nicknamed the Sad Man by his colleagues. As a Family Liaison Officer he is always the bearer of bad news - it is his job to tell the friends and family of victims the fate of their loved ones.

But Tom is weighted down by crimes both old and new - haunted by the death of his best friend Dani, whose murder has never been solved.

When a rare opportunity emerges for Tom to take the lead in a horrific murder investigation, he is determined to get justice for the victim. A young girl has been found in her own home, cut so badly - and so carefully - that she has bled to death, leaving a deliberate pool of blood in the shape of angel wings....
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
UPDATE! I have a competition to win immortality in the new Dani Lancing story. Read all about it:
http://www.wattpad.com/36434032-the-sad-man-a-dani-lancing-story-win-immortality

My debut novel, The Last Winter of Dani Lancing, was recently published in the US and UK. In the dim and distant past, I have been an award-winning filmaker and playwright. I have both studied film and worked in the United States, New Zealand, Russia and my native UK. Between 1999 and 2010, I created (with my sister) the range of best-selling audio-books for Shakespeare and the classics: The SmartPass Guides and Shakespeare Appreciated. The financial crisis put an end to that business - which turned out to be a blessing and allowed me to go back to writing full time.
I live in Brighton, UK with my American wife (the academic linguist, blogger and language commentator Lynne Murphy) and my five year old daughter.
The Last Winter of Dani Lancing was my first murder. The novella I will share on WattPad, The Sad Man, is my second. I will kill again.

title: Rose's Captive (Re-Writing)
description:
Suzanne Matthews's life wasn't easy as it seems to be. Suzanne lost her parents along with her memories in a car accident.

Her unmarried Aunt Marissa Matthews and her childhood best friend Adrian helped her to start a new life. Now she couldn't ask for more

But one day, suddenly she, unfortunately, bumped into two greek men one by one. Both were mysterious, devilishly handsome billionaires. They held secrets. Her simple life turned into hell when she starts receiving love letters and gifts from an unknown person, who claimed to own her

What would happen when she comes to know that there is someone from her past who has an unhealthy obsession with her that turned him into an obsessive stalker and possibly ruthless murderer of those who were close to her and the reason for her lost memories?

title: A Web So Dark and Deadly
description:
Attend opera concerts. Run a few errands. Enjoy a luxury apartment, wardrobe, and car, all expenses paid.

Sounds like a dream job, right? There's only one catch.

After nights of haunting musical messages and retrieving strange, pulsing items for her eccentric employer, Cleo unravels a conspiracy she definitely isn't getting paid enough to be involved in. As time goes on, she glimpses a fantastical realm of individuals that prefer to keep their powers a secret, and will do anything to remain unseen. Once unveiled, there is no going back to blissful ignorance.

It all started with a paycheck. But in the end, Cleo may be the one paying - with her life.

~

title: The Hero Next Time: A Novel of the Terribly Acronymed Detective Club (Book 4)
description:
In the previous novel of the Terribly Acronymed Detective Club, "Err on the Side of Violence," Emma told Sunny, "You'll get to be the hero next time." Finally, in this pivotal fourth novel, Sunil Singh Parhar, barrister and solicitor, gets his day in the sun, and it couldn't come at a better time; the LSDC is facing a threat to its very existence. 

Joe and Lauren are still living apart, talking to a marriage counsellor. Rachel and Al are still living in Lauren's house, exacerbating the problems in Joe and Lauren's marriage. Lauren can't seem to give up Al, and no one seems to be happy. 

Into this blasted landscape lands a crisis none of them could have ever expected, just as Sunny is in the middle of a campaign for City Council. Jordan Trevelyan, the man who once dated Sunny's late sister, has turned up again, claiming another woman he's dating has gone missing, and Sunny, who's never gotten over how he failed his sister, can't turn him away. When the LSDC investigates, however, they find the case isn't as simple as Jordan thinks it is, and when they attract the attention of the wrong people in high places, they'll find themselves in more danger than they've ever faced before, and one of them will be brought to the brink of death itself.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a Wattpad Creator.

**2022 Wattys Shortlist for "We Find What Is Lost," the first title in the Terribly Acronymed Detective Club series**

I'm a Cataloguing Assistant working at Vancouver Public Library. I'm married and a father of one teenager who has painted their entire room (and the floor besides!) I enjoy running, reading and writing, and fortunately, or unfortunately, have had plenty of time for both during this pandemic. I have tried my hand at fantasy and at horror and mystery, and have come to realize that the most riveting of stories can be found in our day to day existence.

title: Frankenstein's Guide (Book 1, the LiteraTours Cozy Mystery Series)
description:
Jessica "Ike" Wordsworth can dive into books, but she isn't prepared for a monster - and a ruthless murderer killing her tourists.
 
Ike is fighting the aftermath of a nasty divorce that left her husband in custody of her homesitting business - and her beloved cats.
With nothing but a turquoise construction trailer to call her home, Ike invests her last quid and becomes partner in a tour company specialising in bespoke trips for book-lovers. When the guide hired to take on the first tour drops out at the last minute, Ike has to take over and steer her guests towards the cradle of Mary Shelley's "Frankenstein".
All to soon she realises there truly are monsters on the loose, one of them a ruthless killer who's targetting her tourists. 
To unearth the truth, Ike will have to cooperate with her moronic partner, Gary Sands, 13th Baron of Nettlehole and founder of LiteraTours. When they don't succeed in stopping the killer, she realises she'll have to take the plunge and draw on some rather unusual skills her family has been hiding from the world  . . .
"Frankenstein's Guide" is the first instalment in the "LiteraTours Cozy Mystery series".

[[word count: 100,000-150,000 words]]

Cover designed by Ren T

authorBio:
Trad published author of the Magical Misfits mysteries (In My Attic/Down the Hatch).  Contract signed for paranormal Romcom "Spirits of Gascony". Watty Winner 2015/2018. Participant in Paid Stories and YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family. Development/Copy editor.

Please don't promote your books on my stories. I find comments like "Nice. Now read my book" highly offensive.  If you're lucky, I will only delete your comment and mute your profile.

title: Adopting Mr. Beggar - (Mister Twister series Book 2)
description:
"Marriage is like a rhythm of a sinking Titanic. You know it will sink; all you have to do is learn to swim and dance to that rhythm." What kind of philosophy is that?
Does it even make sense?
"Doesn't that prove that marriage is nothing but a danger?" 
She only smiled at me; very wisely albeit that I almost lost my remaining mind, "Not when you are in front of a television and watching Titanic movie instead of being a part of a sinking ship."
I correct my words from before! Marriage in itself is not a danger. Marrying someone like this girl is a danger.
I pity the person who wins her over!
Ariche Gil, a Social service agent by day and a psychologist by night. She is everything that universe couldn't figure out. She is crazy but still a psychologist, she is kind but still dangerous, she is a crying cure yet a smiling disease.
Aegeus Ioannou, a beggar by day and usually by night too. He is mysterious, poor but smart, homeless but can make you speechless. He holds deepest secrets inside his heart that might turn the world upside down. 
What happens when a universal question mark meets a beggar with a questionable background?
Follow the journey of a Beggar and his psycho with lots of chasing and choosing on their way!
Adopting Mr. Beggar is a Thriller book hugged by Romance and kissed by humor. 
~*~*~*~*~*~

title: Hidden in the Blood: A Novel of the Terribly Acronymed Detective Club (Book 5)
description:
By the end of the last novel of the Terribly Acronymed Detective Club, "The Hero Next Time," Al Mackenzie, husband of Rachel, adoptive father to Logan and Emma, was still in a coma after a terrible car accident. This fifth novel in the series opens with a subdued LSDC, three of whose members are injured or out of commission, all of them hoping Al will wake up.

Unbeknownst to them, Al isn't just lying there; he's gaining a few insights of his own with the help of a couple of guides, one of whom happens to be the ghost of the man he thought was his father. By the time he wakes, he'll know his real father is alive and still out there, and there's a whole family of half-siblings he'll need to reconnect with.

Into this battered and bruised group comes a blast from Al's past: Agnes, a former girlfriend, on the run and far from home, with two kids in tow. Her husband's a cop, and he may have committed a murder, and he's just transferred to the Langley detachment of the RCMP, where Sergeant Joanie Mara, reeling from a betrayal from Joe, is immediately attracted to him, unaware of his past. Joanie, who's always played a supporting role with the LSDC, shines in this first novel to feature her narrative as she takes on the role of media relations officer, outwits a stalker, and inevitably finds herself ensnared in a revenge plot stretching hundreds of miles back to a family used to getting what it wants and willing to kill to get it. 

If Joanie is to survive, she'll need the help of everyone in the LSDC, even if they're not at their best: Joe, her former lover; Lauren, Joe's wife and a private investigator who first discovered the plot; Rachel, the woman behind Joe's betrayal; Sunny, a family lawyer who helps Agnes free herself from her marriage; Tej, Sunny's wife and a real estate agent, who has her own first-time narrative in this book; and finally, Al, whose new family connections bring him and Agnes back to the place from where Agnes fled, and into the lion's den.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

I enjoy running, reading and writing, and fortunately, or unfortunately, have had plenty of time for both during this pandemic. I have tried my hand at fantasy and at horror and mystery, and have come to realize that the most riveting of stories can be found in our day to day existence.

title: Madame Juror.
description:
Alianna Winter managed to keep herself out of trouble for a grand total of ten weeks. Which, as she pointed out to Isabel, was actually rather good.
Isabel naturally didn't agree.
Answering a plea for help from Chief Inspector Barnes, Allie finds herself in a very unfamiliar situation; in a courtroom. As a last-minute member of the jury. The case she is supposed to be trying seems incredibly straightforward at first glance, but as Allie soon finds, nothing is as it seems. It's up to her to change the minds of the rest of the jury, or a woman will surely hang.

title: Err on the Side of Violence: Terribly Acronymed Detective Club Series (Book 3)
description:
In this third novel of the Terribly Acronymed Detective Club, a year has passed since the events of "Rude Awakenings." Rachel and Al are now foster parents to a teenage brother and sister, whose alcoholic mother is back in rehab. As respectable a family as they may be, they haven't given up their relationship with Lauren, who is still married to Joe, whose narrative is central to this story. He's in his own relationship with Joanie Mara, a sergeant in the RCMP, an arrangement sanctioned by Lauren herself that isn't without its hiccups.

Into this powder keg of emotions lands a crisis that draws the LSDC unwillingly into a world of drugs, trafficking and murder, when Logan, the foster son, finds himself in custody after a midnight deal goes horribly wrong and his mother is found dead under suspicious circumstances. 

Protecting him from people who don't have his best interests at heart proves to be harder than they imagined, especially after Joe, increasingly suspicious of Lauren and Al, makes a decision that sets off a series of destructive events. But when tragedy strikes and Logan falls into danger, can the five childhood friends rise above their conflicts and work to save his life?

title: The Killing Bind
description:
Four people. Four lives. Four jobs. They're all involved in a murder that has already been solved, and it's up to them to stop the count of dead bodies before one of them dies.
                                                                                      
                                                        ***

Following his suspension, a young and elite assassin who works for a clandestine government agency returns to his hometown. He notices things he doesn't want to see. His thirst for vengeance and hunger for murder fuels his new goal. Kill the person he once cared about.

Since his tragic past, an FBI agent turned drifter has been hell-bent on delivering justice mercilessly. The former intelligence agent travels to Santa Monica to right a wrong that may or may not be wrong.

An aspiring and young screenwriter who never gives up easily is falsely accused of a crime he did not commit, given the fact that all evidence pointed to the young man. There is no one he can turn to, no one who truly believes him. Until the day before his alleged arrest, he was given the option of going to jail or going with a stranger to prove his innocence.

A rookie FBI agent who was recently tasked with going into the field and finding the agency's most valuable asset becomes entangled in a mess after teaming up with the one person she was asked to find. It could be costly for her, putting her limbs, career, and possibly her life in jeopardy.

It all started with an indirect murder. Will these four be able to put a stop to it all before it spirals out of control and becomes a Killing Bind?

                                                          ***

title: The Nameless Detective Story
description:
In the bustling heart of London, two brilliant yet rival detectives, Chris and Lily, work side by side. Their collaboration is frosty, their hatred undeniable-but no one knows why. What happened to drive such a deep wedge between them?

When Chris unexpectedly saves Lily's life, everything changes. Against their better judgment, feelings begin to grow between them, but their shared past refuses to stay buried. The situation becomes even more complicated when Lily's long-presumed-dead brother suddenly resurfaces, bringing secrets that should have remained hidden. As old wounds are reopened and the past looms ever larger, their blossoming connection is threatened to be crushed by the weight of the truth.

title: THROUGH THE LACE
description:
In a world of delicate threads and hidden truths, Rimsha Khan has carefully woven a new life, one intricate stitch at a time. Her days are spent crafting beauty out of lace, while her nights are haunted by the shadows of a scandal that once destroyed her family. Living quietly, she has mastered the art of keeping her past a secret and her emotions at bay. But the arrival of Zayn Malik threatens to unravel everything she's worked so hard to protect.

Zayn Malik is a man with his own ghosts. Haunted by betrayal and driven by a relentless need for answers, he steps into Rimsha's world under the guise of admiration, his charming demeanor hiding a deeper purpose. What begins as a pursuit of truth quickly turns into something far more dangerous-a connection he didn't anticipate and a woman he cannot ignore.

As their paths entwine, the walls they've built around their hearts begin to crumble. Zayn finds himself torn between his growing feelings for Rimsha and the secrets that led him to her. Rimsha, drawn to Zayn's warmth yet wary of his intentions, faces a choice: to trust a man who may be her undoing or to retreat further into the safety of her lies.

But the truth has a way of finding its way through the cracks. And as their lives collide, long-buried secrets resurface, threatening to destroy the fragile bond they've begun to build.

They must confront the one truth they can't ignore: love is the most dangerous mystery of all.

title: The Woods | Harvey #1
description:
Nicole and her family love to vacation in Harvey, a small beachside town. However, it's a town of secrets, and Nicole is invested. She loves a good mystery and can't help herself from getting wrapped up in the town's biggest one: Ashton.

As the son of the town's sheriff, Ashton is expected to follow in his father's footsteps. But what do you do when you don't agree with how things are run? For him, the answer is to live in the woods and take all his secrets with him. Naturally, this sparks rumors and means he's the main suspect when a little girl is found dead on the shore. The police want nothing more than to see him be charged for murder.

Nicole doesn't believe it for a moment, though. She's fallen hard for the mysterious nature of the gentle creature in the woods, and nothing can convince her that he's to blame for anything going on in the town. However, nothing is ever as simple as it seems...

title: Sway With The Wind [Complete]
description:
[Completed]

"She's awake," a gruff voice said. The voice was unfamiliar, rough and menacing. El felt her heart rate spike, her body trembling with fear. She heard the sound of more footsteps as several figures entered the room.

"What do we do with her?" another voice asked. This one was higher-pitched, almost nervous.

"Keep her quiet," the first voice replied. "Boss will be here soon."

***
Overview:

In the heart of a bustling city, amidst the whispers of hidden truths and untold tales, lies the captivating story of "Sway With The Wind." Within its pages, readers will be swept away on a journey of romance and mystery, where the enigmatic El takes center stage.

As El navigates the intricate web of relationships that surround her, she finds herself torn between two intriguing figures: a charming college student and a rebellious bad boy. But in matters of the heart, El's desires know no bounds, and she follows her instincts, leading her down a path of unexpected twists and turns.

Set against the backdrop of a city steeped in secrets, "Sway With The Wind" explores themes of forgiveness and the enduring power of love. As El confronts the mysteries of her past and uncovers the secrets of the present, she must learn to sway with the winds of change, guided by her heart's truest desires and an unwavering quest for truth. With each revelation, the story unfolds like a delicate dance with the wind, drawing readers deeper into a world where fate and desire collide.

title: Zero Worship: Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective #6
description:
Season 6 of Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective

There's a fortune in drugs at the bottom of the Wisconsin River waiting to be claimed. The score would be enough for Zandra, eager to shed her celebrity psychic persona, to finally start life over. The catch? The drugs are stuck in an underwater coffin called the Devil's Hole, and Zandra can't scuba. The catch to that catch? The sole buyer for the drugs needs some psychic help with a cheating lover first. The catch to that catch to that catch? The only people Zandra can turn to for help are superfans Chad and Bexley, two well-meaning burnouts who are more than happy to help their psychic hero in "unique" ways.

If Zandra can pull it all off, she might not only save her shot at a normal life, but also her soul--if you believe in that sort of thing.

Zero Worship is the sixth installment of Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective, a mystery/thriller series with a skeptically supernatural bent. Expect mental tricks, twists, weird synchronicities, crime, memorable characters, dark humor, and lots and lots of cigarette butts

title: If Only She'd Loved Him
description:
It's a good thing when you give a person hope, isn't it?  At least that's what Megan told herself as she broke up with her boyfriend.  

But why do you really do it?  Is it for them or for you?

Megan Powell likes to play games.  Hot pink Uzi hooked on her hip, she spends half her nights  at college trying to assassinate the other team for beer points.  So it doesn't faze her a bit when her boyfriend "kidnaps" her one night.  However, she's not the only one who likes to play.  One look into the wrong colored eyes and she knows the gun pressed into her side is real and she's in for the game of her life.

Using all her ingenuity, she must do whatever she can to survive. A paper clip, a glass of orange juice , a can of Coke -- all become tools for escape.   But it's not easy to survive an obsession, especially one that she unknowingly nurtured. You see, Megan knows her kidnapper, spent a summer dating him and still has feelings for him -- feelings that may go deeper than even she knows.  Torn apart inside, Megan fights not only her kidnapper but herself.

Only Jean, her roommate, believes that Megan didn't disappear voluntarily. Conducting a relentless search, Jean and her friend Matt try to find Megan before it's too late.

But it's late and getting later. Megan's kidnapper took her because she gave him the hope that they might get back together. As he loses that hope, he slips further and further over the edge of sanity till it's anyone's guess which way the game will end.
Tous Droits Réservés

description:

authorBio:
Hey, I'm Hadassah a 14-year-old who lives and breathes Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs! On here, I pour my heart into stories that cover everything from heartbreaking tragedies that'll make you reach for tissues, to epic self-inserts where I'm right there on the field with Mahomes, catching those game-winning passes.

But let's keep it real. Sometimes, I gotta vent about stuff. Like when Kelce hurts and kills pedophiles on and off the field. It's not just about touchdowns; it's about standing up for what's right and showing that heroes come in all shapes and sizes.

And hey, we can't forget the silly stuff! Picture Mahomes and the gang solving mysteries between practice drills, or throwing an epic BBQ cook-off against rival teams. It's all about mixing fun with football fever.

So, if you're into touchdowns, tears (the good kind!), and a dash of quirky humor, jump onboard and join me in celebrating the Chiefs' journey. Mahomes and I are ready to tackle whatever comes our way-hope you're game too!

title: One Day In Budapest. A Thriller.
description:
A relic, stolen from the heart of an ancient city.
An echo of nationalist violence not seen since the dark days of the Second World War.

Budapest, Hungary. When a priest is murdered at the Basilica of St Stephen and the Holy Right relic is stolen, the ultra-nationalist Eröszak party calls for retribution and anti-Semitic violence erupts in the city.

Dr Morgan Sierra, psychologist and ARKANE agent, finds herself trapped inside the synagogue with Zoltan Fischer, a Hungarian Jewish security advisor. As the terrorism escalates, Morgan and Zoltan must race against time to find the Holy Right and expose the conspiracy, before blood is spilled again on the streets of Budapest.

One Day In Budapest is a chilling view of a possible future as Eastern Europe embraces right-wing nationalism. A conspiracy thriller for fans of Daniel Silva, where religion and politics intersect.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Shadows of Deceit
description:
SELF PUBLISHED. BUY NOW ON AMAZON https://a.co/d/3JHzCSa
Clara Reynolds, a talented artist recovering from a troubled past, believes she has found stability-until she uncovers a betrayal that shatters her world. Her boyfriend, Ethan Morgan, and his secretary, Sophie Carter, have not only deceived her but turned her vulnerabilities into tools for their schemes. What starts as infidelity unravels into a fight for justice.

With help from her childhood friend and private investigator, Leo Harper, and the support of her best friend, Maya Lewis, Clara uncovers Ethan's deeper conspiracy targeting her inheritance. Confronting her past and navigating a web of lies, Clara fights to expose the truth while overcoming lingering trust issues.

Clara's pursuit pits her against Ethan and a justice system that doubts her. Detective Ryan Chase's skepticism adds tension as Clara races to dismantle Ethan's plans. A daring trap at a corporate gala exposes Ethan and Sophie, but Clara's victory is bittersweet. When she begins to rebuild her life, a chilling letter arrives: "The game isn't over." The cryptic details leave Clara questioning whether she's truly free, setting the stage for a sequel.

Shadows of Deceit is a gripping psychological drama about betrayal, empowerment, and resilience, weaving a complex web of lies, twists, and triumph in the face of darkness.

authorBio:
"Action!"

...

"Collins!"


"Yeah?"


"That's your cue!"


"Oh..oh..ok, uh um.."


"Cut..." He sighed. "When I say action you start ok?"


"Hi! I'm Collins from the-"


"No no no, we weren't running."


"But you said action?"


"Ugh..Action!"


"Hi, I'm Collins from the Collins' Clan and I'm going live from my bedroom... was that good?"


"We're still rolling...just tell them about some stuff that you like or dislike," he urged. However, I looked like a deer in headlights. "For the love of..ugh...just keep talking!"
"Okay okay, jeez. Um, Ok, I'm a httyd fan, gravity falls fan, huge Harry Potter fan, phonk music fan, asmr fan, greek mythology fan, Merlin fan oh and-"
"Wait, what house are you in?"
"Ravenclaw..obvi, anyways, I'm also a mlp fan-"
"Talk about food." He interjected.
"Um..I like chicken?"
"And?"
"Look dude, stop cutting into my intro ok? Listen up clang, I'm your Siress and I'd like you to know that if you follow me and you're a writer yourself, please don't hesitate to ask for support on my message board. I do v4v, fvf and r4r. Please bear in mind that I'm a student, so If I post a book that's very infrequent with updates please be patient with me. I'm trying my best. I love all the support that you guys have continuously given to me. Please make sure that if you pop into my private messages, pop into it respectfully, this is a reading app, not a dating app ok? I'll try to post new chaps for my new book "Secret love affair" once a week, as much as I can. My goal is to hit 3K reads and at least 2K votes so if you guys could do that for me, that would really make my year. I love you guys, check out my other books below."
"And cut!"The director cheered."That was perfect."

title: No Stranger to Sara
description:
No Stranger to Sara
Intro....
"Such a cool brisk morning it was.... I can remember that day like it was only hours ago.  Everything, including his face, is so vivid in my mind.  Capturing the moment is no problem for me.  I can remember thinking that " I wouldn't be gone too long.  Just long enough to get in a quick morning run", or so I thought....

    THE REST IS NOT EASY to say, as this stranger, who had been stalking me without my knowledge, skidded across the road and before I could do anything about it; he had me by the throat and a knife in my side.  He gave me orders to not scream, and I might live.  This man then threw me into the pickup and screeched the tires and turned it around.  By this time, I could not understand why 
   
   He very quickly pulled me with him over to the petunia pot where I had hidden my key.  My world stopped.  As he unlocked the door with my key, I knew then that he must have been watching me, or the children, to know where we had hidden the key in the pot.  But I thought to myself, if he knew this, then he also knew my family is home.  This stranger knew where to find me, and where I run each morning, and knew my children lived there as well.  Why would he take me into my own home?

He spent the entire day in our house, beating on me, until he decided he would move on and find someone else, I suppose.  Why this man left me alive is only understood after five years passed.  

This same man comes back again for me.......

           ☆ ★☆ ★☆ ★☆ ★

Hello there! You can call me Ink, V, or Kari. I love writing, reading, music, drawing, linguistics, comic books -- especially Batman -- rainy days, video games, anime, Star Wars and cartoons like Over the Garden Wall.

My favorite genres to write are fantasy, mystery, action/adventure, and supernatural, but I write a bit of everything.  I write to entertain people and improve, so feedback is much appreciated!

I try to respond to everyone who adds, comments and votes on my stories, but it's tough to get to everyone. Just know that I appreciate any and all forms of support!

title: Law and justice
description:
Formerly  known as law and order

Book 2 of the past series

Mecianda; A country ruled by the rich and powerful elite called the six feathers. Their preys we're the weak and poor, nobody could question them because they held more power than the president of the country but............ Someone decided to bring them to justice. 

Jeremy Akinsola, a renowned lawyer, who had a tragic event in the past came back to mecianda after twenty years to find and get his revenge on the killer of his family. But, he did not expect to meet a lawless and injustice country. 

Along the line, he met Lara Johnson, a detective who believes in justice and order for the weak. Jeremy fought to find justice for those who had been involved with the feathers. Alongside his trusted friend and bodyguard Yomi, Lisa his assistant, Mary a reporter, and James a criminalistic and Others who wanted justice for those who had been wronged.

It wasn't going to be an easy task but there was nothing bad if they tried. 

Will they succeed? Will they bring law and order to the country? What would happen to the six feathers?

title: Troubleshooter
description:
All he wanted was a regular job...
Paul Trouble may not hold the most exciting job in the world as a pencil pusher and finance controller in Strom Industries' Mergers and Acquisitions department. But for the former elite soldier and CIA spy, still mentally recovering from the injury that forced him out of the spy-game, this is his shot at a normal life in a normal job with normal problems.

One hundred million dollars missing...
Until his boss asks Paul to investigate the mystery of one hundred million dollars missing. The plan is simple: Ask a few questions, make people nervous, and see what happens. 

Turning into a deadly cat and mouse game...
What first looks like an inside job soon turns into murder and mayhem where pencil and stapler are exchanged with knives and bullets, giving a literal meaning to the term "troubleshooter." 

Troubleshooter is the first Corporate thriller in the ongoing "Troubleshooter" series. You can find the follow up novels "Troublemaker", "Troubleseeker", and "Pieces of Trouble" in all major formats at most eBook sellers.

title: Inverted (COMPLETE)
description:
Ashley Everson had cheated death, but not on his own. After a miraculous recovery, he discovers he's not alone in his body anymore. Something lurks, whispering in his ear a language he can't understand, inviting a chasm of reality he didn't even know existed, inverting his life as he knows it.

Is it responsible for his survival? Or is it just using him to hide from something much worse? What does the entity even want? What does it mean to his own mortality? Where did the entity even come from? Ash decides to find out before something much worse hunts down whatever is hiding inside of him.

title: Stranded - A Pirate's Tale - part 1
description:
There is nothing worse for a pirate than dying on dry land. Except, maybe, swinging two feet above it. 

When their captain is imprisoned, facing the gallows, the men and women of the Lady Lesya's crew will try everything to break him out--even if it means fighting guards in ridiculous uniforms, bargaining with overweight monsters, and risking the life of the more or less innocent. 

Add vengeful local thugs, a mysterious killer with a grudge, and some unexpected ghosts to this already perilous task, and the streets of Puerto Seguro turn into a bloodbath.

To get out of the town alive, the brethren of the coast will have to act not just as a crew, but as a family.

___________________

As it's a pirate story not created by Disney, expect strong language, violence, gore, and allusion to sex. But also humor, strong characters, and a touch of love.

The story, three years and a half in the making, is now complete (and under revision).
____________________

authorBio:
Beta reader and copyeditor for hire.

The Author
(with a capital to it and a bio written by Him in third person. He's that conceited !) 

Oliver Pratt was born in the early eighties, and grew up wearing colorful lycra turtlenecks - 'til the day grunge (it's music) saved him from life as a virgin.

Like many, Oliver was bullied in high school, so, like many, he started drinking, doing drugs and vandalizing innocent mailboxes.

Luckily for mailboxes, he eventually made some friends. With them, he kept drinking but found less violent hobbies (jigsaw puzzles, going to the zoo, or taxidermy).

Oliver Pratt always liked to write. At first, he wrote in French. Later, he still wrote in French, but better. Now, he's giving it a shot in another language, because he has always liked challenges (once, he stopped eating baguettes for a whole week). Of course, to avoid being cast out of France and becoming the disgrace of his family, he changed his name to embrace fame abroad.

Waiting for the rest of the world to get the memo, Oliver Pratt is writing about pirates (because pirates are cool and because his previous story about a kid finding out he was a wizard was stolen before he even started it). He also dares review and beta-read other foolish-writer-wanabees' work and crush their hope with stone cold arguments.


His work :

Oliver Pratt is part of the OMP Fantasy Anthology (available on Amazon), with his short story called The Sentinel. This story follows the Knight in his quest of the Gate (the title will make sense when you read the story).

Most of his work in English is available on Wattpad where (as an old male) he struggles to promote Stranded, a novel about a nasty bunch of swearing pirates trying, among other things, to break their Captain out of jail and flee Puerto Seguro, a town turned into a bloodbath (but in a funny way).

title: My Sister's Keeper
description:
After his sister is brutally attacked and crippled investigating the rape of a thirteen-year-old, Richard Baimbridge rushes back to his hometown of Wilmington, NC, to assist in her recovery only to come face to face with his tormented past and a dark family secret. Serving as his sister's legs, he fights to stay above the flood of childhood trauma as he is drawn into the dark underside of this quiet coastal community where he becomes the primary suspect in the murders of Wilmington's young girls in this riveting suspense thriller that explores the special bond between a brother and sister.
    
    Over 500,000 copies sold.
    
  "Bill Benners is a fresh and welcomed new voice in crime fiction. My Sister's Keeper is a compelling and original psychological thriller. Awesome, powder-keg suspense!"
                                                        --Andrew McAleer, Crimestalker Casebook/crimestalkers.com
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I spent twenty years writing and producing programs, editorials, and commercials for radio while acting and directing in community theater. The first full-length story I completed is the yet-to-be-produced outdoor drama "Blackbeard's Final Conquest" in the 1980s followed by two plays that were produced on a Community Theatre stage in the early 1990s.

My Sister's Keeper is my first novel. It was published in 2007 and has now sold more than 500,000 copies.

My wife Dorrie and I reside in coastal North Carolina with our two ever-curious tuxedo cats and two badly behaved Morkies.

title: Loving Madison
description:
In a world full of normal people, Madison Haywood stands apart. Madison sees things that others cannot, and she uses her visions to assist people who are in trouble--even the Metropolitan Police. Not everyone is accepting of her gift, however, and she isn't certain what to make of the handsome police inspector, Cameron Westland, who has a habit of interrupting her life.

Cameron Westland's younger sister has gone missing. Working as an investigator for the Metropolitan Police isn't getting him anywhere. But when his other sister brings in a woman claiming to have visions, he's leery to believe. Although he's attracted to Miss Haywood, he thinks she is losing her mind. Desperate to try anything to find his lost sister, Cameron gives the puzzling Miss Haywood a chance and soon finds himself in danger of losing his heart.

authorBio:
Marie Higgins is an award-winning, bestselling, multi-published author of Christian and sweet romance novels; from refined bad-boy heroes who make your heart melt to the feisty heroines who somehow manage to love them regardless of their faults. She's been with a Christian publisher since 2010. Between those and her others, she's published over 100 heartwarming, on-the-edge-of-your-seat stories and broadened her readership by writing mystery/suspense, humor, time-travel, paranormal, along with her love for historical romances. I'm a writer based in Norwich, England specialising in serialised fiction. My debut novel A Day of Faces won a Watty Award in 2016 and in 2019 I completed the 3-year serialised run of my follow-up The Mechanical Crown. Book #3, No Adults Allowed, completed in September 2020.

title: Inside Evil
description:
The small town of Ridgewood is shocked when the pale and frozen corpse of a teenager is discovered. But there's more than meets the eye to this grisly scene; the death hides a terrifying secret. A horror that extends beyond the barriers of the physical world and into an labyrinth of other worlds and strange places.

Tasked with unraveling the mystery, Roberta Arlington struggles to cope as her world falls apart. And, though aided by her friends - and, indeed a few odd eccentrics - a sudden, unseen evil stirs inside her and threatens to do far worse than take yet another victim.

*****

Inside Evil is a paranormal mystery set in a small town on the borders of England and Scotland. Like so many similar places, its residents cannot help but be drawn into each others lives, as they rarely venture from their seclusion. But, with such isolation comes danger, and whilst the world is blissfully unaware, an ancient terror is preparing for murder.

Book 1: Inside Evil
Book 2: The Tower of Souls
Book 3: Spirits of the Middlelands
Book 4: New Alliances
Book 5: To Kill A Curse
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm the hermit that has too many cats. I'm the fanatic that becomes way too involved in science fiction and fantasy films and dramas (Battlestar Galactica, Helix, Dark Matter, Supernatural, Marvel Films, etc). I'm the kind of guy that, once the biscuit packet is open, I eat the entire lot - yes, I have a sweet tooth.

I'm Geoff Wakeling; a gardener, conservationist, animal lover and writer. If you read my work and you'll likely spy many creatures, whether centre stage or simply in the setting....I'm the man man that steps over ants and rescues languishing worms that have strayed onto the hot pavement. I'm also still awaiting the arrival of my Hogwart's Owl!

The world is sometimes a battle to deal with, so I escape into books. Try out Inside Evil; the fantasy series with fantastical creatures, parallel worlds and doppelgangers that's completely FREE. Other works on Amazon include a zombie story, try Pacifier 6; a world where mutants have been pacified into a docile slave force through medicine. If you love a little science fiction and dystopian, pick up CRYO and follow John's journey as he enters cryonic sleep and awaits his future. Or follow Dr. Rachel Galliance as she boards the spaceship RENOVO and heads into outer space.

title: Look but Don't Choke
description:
After Evie Harper spends the day pining after her unrequited childhood crush, Harley, she drowns her sorrows in a bottle of stolen wine. But the next day, and one glorious hangover later, Harley is found with a very naked-very strangled stripper in his bed. Naturally the police assume that it's some kind of erotic play gone terribly wrong, but Harley swears that he left her alive and "orgasmically" happy when he went on the ill fated booze and condom run. And Evie knows Harley isn't a violent man. When the Chos ask her to investigate the murder, and possibly clear their son's name, she reluctantly agrees. But as Evie digs deeper into the dead woman's life she discovers that the exotic dancer had quite the past; one that involved drugs, prostitution, and gangs. Who knew the life of a stripper could get so dirty?

Evie Harper Mysteries: Book 2

title: Lost in Plain Sight
description:
In "Lost in Plain Sight," a group of former colleagues, once bonded by duty, find themselves thrust back together to confront the most dangerous gang the city has ever known. As they navigate the treacherous underworld, each member of the team grapples with their own inner demons and personal struggles.

Eric, presumed dead after a harrowing stint in Afghanistan, returns to a world he no longer recognizes, fighting to reclaim his life and identity. Meanwhile, Brigitte is torn between her loyalty to her former comrades and the desperate need to rescue her nephew, ensnared by the very gang they seek to stop.

As tensions rise, Koen and Tineke's relationship is put to the ultimate test, their own secrets and past traumas threatening to tear them apart. With the city on the brink of chaos and danger lurking at every turn, they must confront the harsh realities of their choices and the consequences that threaten to engulf them all.

"Lost in Plain Sight" is a gripping tale of redemption, resilience, and the unbreakable bonds of friendship. Join this group of unlikely heroes as they navigate the treacherous streets, fighting for justice and the chance to reclaim their lost lives.

authorBio:
Ah....Welcome! I see you've stumbled upon my wall. I'm sure there's something here that will tickle your fancy. Laughs....cries...shivers....advice? You can find them over to the right. 

Some interesting things about me in no particular order:
Jello Wrestler
The Nerd who Married Mr. Popular
Army Wife 
Mother of four
Has been asked for an autograph (She said I looked like a movie star, probably Steve Buscemi).
Old, as in probably old enough to be your mother
Constantly crippled by self-doubt 
I love constructive feedback; it's the only way I can grow as a writer. I appreciate every read, vote, and comment that I receive.
I love my followers. I'm not the best at keeping in contact--I could easily be a hermit when I grow up--but I cherish each one of you. I don't do Follow-for-Follow. I honestly want to keep it real. 

If you're still reading this, I'm impressed...but I really wish you'd check out my stories. Happy reading!

title: Blue Pencil Dolls
description:
Geneva thought she knew what evil was before that Autumn in Chattanooga. 
  
  She thought after being homeless for seven years she'd seen it all, and she knew how to manipulate life into giving her what she wanted. Strange things started happening in her town, and soon she learned that everything she thought she knew was a fabricated story created by the people who'd been watching her for her entire life. After being thrown into a sick, unfair game, she lost everything she gained along the way, including the ability to trust. 
  
  Everyone around her was a suspect. Everyone she looked at could be the source of all her life's troubles. 
  
  Ignoring it isn't an option because it always yanks you out of your comfort zone and forces you to brush shoulders with death even when you think it's over. So what can you do? How can you ask for help when anybody you meet could be the one controlling the operation? How can you take it down by yourself when they are always twenty steps ahead of you? 
  
  There's only one answer: you can't. There's nothing you can do in this game except say your prayers. 
  
  After all Geneva's been through, you start to wonder who you're praying to.

title: Prescription Endangerment
description:
Laura Fields is an ER trauma doctor, a single mom to her son Christopher and best friend to fellow doctor Christine. She hasn't had an easy life, but she likes where she is at now in her life. Love life, or no love life. When girls start to go missing and their bodies are being found beaten and tortured, she ignores the fact that she looks fairly similar to all the victims. One night, her life changes drastically when one of the newest missing girls is brought into her ER beaten and tortured but alive-barely. After that night she begins to have the feeling that someone is watching her but she dusts it off. Soon after, FBI agents are brought in to find the serial killer responsible for such heinous crimes she can't help but notice a deep attraction to Special Agent Antonio De Luca. As their attraction and romance grows a killer hides in the shadows watching and waiting for the perfect moment to turn Laura's fear from a whisper into a scream...

This book and all of its characters are the intellectual property of Hannah Dean.

*****Warning! This book is very old and it has a lot of mistakes! Definitely not my best work so read at your own risk! I hope you enjoy either way!! Lots of love! -Hannah D. *****

title: A Body at Book Club: Myrtle Clover #6
description:
This is one book club meeting that doesn't go by the book.

When octogenarian sleuth Myrtle Clover discovers Naomi Pelter's dead body during a book club meeting, the other members seem shocked. But Myrtle can read between the lines. Naomi had riled everyone up by flirting with other people's husbands, arguing with neighbors, and generally making a nuisance of herself. Murdering troublemakers is the oldest trick in the book.

The book club members seem too sweet to be killers, but Myrtle knows better than to judge books by their covers. Myrtle's investigation into the murder will take a more novel approach than her police chief son's by-the-book methods. Can Myrtle and her widower sidekick uncover the killer...before he writes them off for good?

(This mystery will be uploaded on Wednesdays.  If you can't wait for the next installment, the completed book can be found on Amazon:  https://tinyurl.com/o6wn4sk ) .  The series is also available on Amazon India: https://tinyurl.com/ohdbffq . Thanks!

authorBio:
Elizabeth writes the Southern Quilting mysteries for Penguin/NAL, the Memphis Barbeque mysteries for Penguin/Berkley, and the Myrtle Clover series for Midnight Ink and independently. Bestselling cozy mystery author Elizabeth Spann Craig is a library-loving, avid mystery reader. A pet-owning Southerner, her four series are full of cats, corgis, and cheese grits. title: You're Mine ( Not Edited )
description:
I watched as he searched through every single cabinet in the house.I  myself was still tied up.I took in a deep breath.

"Why are you doing this?"I asked making myself cry.
 
"Because I love you my love.You must pay for being a naughty girl."He said taking out a pocket knife.He came closer to my bare skin.He then traced the blade on my upper arm.

As he began to put pressure on the blade,pain began to pile up.


"Do you love him?" Did he mean Chris?

"Yes I do .Please let me goo." I began to plead.

"Wrong answer Doll Face."With that he began to  slice my arm.

I screamed in agony.He just stood there with that stupid smirk  of his .

He was enjoying every moment of it.

title: Undercover Hero (3B Hero Series) Book 4
description:
Homicide Detective/Profiler Brittany H. Blanton and her partner Tina M. Jones have been investigating a string of serial killings for months now. Each victim bares a striking resemblance to Tany herself. When the unknown killer strikes again, (this time sooner and more brutally than before) fearing for her identical twin sister, Carlyn. Tany calls in her teen crush and family friend.

FBI Agent Gabriel Ivanov is the Team Leader of an underground agency of cops and military personnel known only as Strike. When a job needs done (within the realm of law enforcement) under the radar, Strike is ready for action.

While working an underground case involving his own family (who are known members of the Russian Mob) Gabriel receives a call for help, from the one woman he has always wanted, but accepted he could never have.

Together they must bring in a brutal killer, and fight their way out of a tangled wed of lies, deceit, and murder. Only together will they survive when more than one faction is out to take their lives.

Will Gabriel be able to protect the woman he loves? If she lives through this, what will Tany do? Will she finally win the heart of the man she has loved since she was a teenager, or will she have to let him go? Will Gabriel loose himself to his Mobster side to save Brittany?

title: Not in The System
description:
Not in the System is a dark, paranormal mystery set in Jingle's Circus Emporium, a once-beloved indoor amusement park now haunted by secrets. The story follows Levi, a 17 year old mechanic, and his journey at JCE dealing with the animatronics and the things that lie deep within the emporium.

What starts as a routine job quickly spirals into chaos as Levi discovers that the animatronics are acting strangely, behaving almost human and exhibiting emotions they shouldn't possess. With the help of Astro, a shooting star themed animatronic who's also a long-time friend, Levi uncovers the sinister truth behind the Emporium. These issues with the animatronics are a result of the founder Ezra Whitlock's tragic attempts to bring back his late wife.

As Levi navigates through unsettling encounters with the animatronics, mysterious sabotage, and the growing tension with the police force. He must confront not only the dark secrets of the Emporium but also his own fears and guilt from the past. With each discovery, Levi realizes that the line between man and machine, and friend and foe, is far more blurred than he ever imagined.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Shadows of Closure
description:
When world-renowned detective Elena Graves is summoned back to her sleepy hometown, she's reluctant but intrigued. The local sheriff, Ethan Reid-a former classmate who once mocked her obsession with solving mysteries-has reached out with a chilling case no one else can crack: a serial killer targeting victims with unsettling precision.

As Elena and Ethan work together, they uncover a harrowing truth-the killer's ultimate target might be Elena herself. Struggling to stay ahead of the murderer, Ethan takes it upon himself to protect her, a decision driven not just by duty but by guilt for dragging her into the danger.

The closer they get to the truth, the more old wounds resurface. Ethan reveals that he pursued law enforcement inspired by Elena's passion and as a way to reconnect with her. But instead of the closure he sought, their partnership reignites feelings he thought he'd buried long ago.

In a race against time, Elena must unravel the killer's twisted motives while navigating the tension between her and Ethan. As the mystery deepens, so does their connection, leaving them both to wonder if they can survive the deadly game-or if their rekindled bond will shatter under the weight of the secrets they uncover.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Omega: the Sequel
description:
Warning: Contains spoilers. Do not read unless you have read "Delta: a spy novel" before reading this, or you'll be massively confused and you'll ruin it for yourself!! Read Delta first, please. Thank you!
♥	Astrid		♥
It was over. We had messed up. Pierre was still with Cloying, and Jay was out there somewhere, looking for me. I was back at Delta Headquarters while Josh was risking his neck to find Pierre. I was helpless, grieved, and close to going insane. It was all one big nightmare - so why wasn't I waking up?
I thought the world was over after the assignment in France. But when Pierre returned, I learned that he wasn't who he seemed. What was it that he and Alan Young were talking about? What were they hiding from us? And then all crap hit the fan as accusations started flying and I watched another boy walk out of my life. 
But just because Delta said it was over didn't mean it was. So no accusations, no threats, no unexpected twists could have stop Josh and I from attempting to follow Pierre - even all the way to the U.K - and from looking for Cloying to get some revenge of our own. Because we had no idea that what we were heading into was something so much more complex than the mysteries of Pierre. But of course I should have known better - after all, Cloying and Jay had got away.
But nothing could have prepared me for the maelstrom of fear, anger, adrenaline, and utter heartbreak that followed.
This is Omega, the end.
It's not over.
...but it's pretty damn close.

authorBio:
Stephen was born in the town of Orange, in Australia.

He is married with 3 children. At age 38 he began to realize a need to 'do something.' With limited time to explore the more adventurous interests in life, he decided to pursue writing, thinking that his research and stories would take him to worlds he could not physically travel to.

This journey has taken him into different genres and writing forms, including poetry.

Check out my ebooks on smashwords, ibooks, kobo, etc

Like my Polar Bear?

Interests: Beach, swimming, snorkeling, cooking, bush walking, music, Formula 1 racing, traveling, movies, reading (and now writing)

Not so interesting: chores, paying the bills.

Favorite foods: Chocolate, berries, ice cream and Thai Food

My Dog: is a Shiba Inu

Music Quote: 'Forfeit the game, before somebody else, takes you out of the frame, and puts your name to shame, cover up your face, you can't run the race, the pace is to fast, you just won't last!' (Linkin Park)

Write stories in a lot of different categories
Not to keep count of how many pieces I write, but always trying to improve my writing.

title: Real Illusion
description:
This story may contain certain sensitive scenes containing lots of blood please do not read if not sure.

Bevellin Ali was a normal girl living in AL Dammam ,although she was a girl coming from two completely different backgrounds for her father was Arabian and mother Indian,she never had any problems getting along with her relatives. Life stays peaceful for Bevy till she leaves the state for her cousin's wedding in AL Bahah where she is kidnapped by her brother's friends but manages to escape.
Body aching with bruises and cuts and her clothes dishevelled, she makes her way into the depth of an unknown forest where she sees an old ruin of a mansion having no choice but to spend the night in the mansion in such cold.

She soon realizes that it is too late to turn back... 

The police finds Bevellin in an abandoned alley unable to speak with a look of terror upon her face.
Five years later Bevellin's time she's been waiting for has come but so has her nightmare 'Jaidon Smith '

Who is he? Is he who she thinks he is?and what about him makes her afraid for her life and everyone who is around her? 
Read to find out...

title: My Wattpad Stalker(A Love to Die For)
description:
Everyone enjoys an  escape from reality every now and then.
For seventeen-year-old Belle Black, that escape has always been reading and writing. 
Upon encouragement from her English teacher, Belle joins a unique internet site that allows its users unlimited access to not only reading books but writing their own stories as well.
After she gains massive popularity on the site earning her a couple thousand followers, one particular user seems to have taken a keen interest in Belle herself.
Holding no fear over the mystery stranger, she doesn't give him or her a second thought when it comes to real life.

Only....The notes and the harassment doesn't stop at messages over Wattpad...
It progresses to mysterious phone calls, strange gifts, and this formerly only online stalker no longer seems to be just some stranger solely from the internet.

It's someone who'll stop at nothing to grasp Belle's full attention.
No matter who gets in the way.

title: Whodunnit? Murder On Mystery Cove
description:
"Dear Giles, I'm sure you already know what this note is going to say. Please, do find solace in this as it once again means your life is spared, but for many of this next set of guests, they will be scared. Not only for their lives but scared quite literally. I have enclosed some information on the back of this letter. Follow the rules and no harm will come to you or your staff."    
 
~Delightfully yours, the Killer.

Once again, Giles the butler finds himself stranded in a mysterious manor with an evil killer. The killer has invited eleven guests including themself to stay a few weeks at Dawson Cove in Devonshire, England. The rules are simple. Each week, one person will die and the other guests have to solve the crime of how they were murdered. They will then make their cases and the game will continue. Until there is only one winner and the killer. This may just be the sickest most vile killer yet and it could be any one of them. Might it be the the inquisitive therapist, the dog trainer, the CEO of a multi-million dollar company, or could it be the definition of a broadway star? Trust no one. Good luck.

I've changed my identity three times. can never be to sure right. right now Im Riley Blake. a school teacher with short dark hair, with big innocent eyes. 
having managed to escape, I've lived a relevantly normal life for the past 6 years. by no means have I forgotten my revenge or stopped practicing or keeping taps. as I said relevantly normal life. Orions possible death seems far to fetched for me. but at the same time, where else could that grumpy old man be right now.  he would have never just left me like that. there was no dead body to find. just the footages they used to lure me in. 

Orion had been gone for the longest time, and I had started to get paranoid, I was expecting the worst, and I acted according to my feeling. 

 And I think someone is on to me. I get this weird feeling that someone is watching me. I turn and enter a clothing store. hide behind some clothes and watch the door from a mirror. there he is. someone entered behind me. he must be suspecting me of something. without being noticed by him I leave the store. and just as I turn a corner I open my phone to delete all the footages available. 

no proof of me ever being there. ill have to create some proof of being somewhere else. because it isn't just the enemy thats after me, but also the agents. but really I only have myself to blame. when I thought Orion had died I created chaos. so much fucking chaos. I like to call it the grieving faze. when I had finally calmed down after the attempt on my life and Orions so called death. I broke down and watched the last footage available of Orion just to realize, the guy in the video didn't have the neckless. it was not Orion. 
but Orion is still no where to be found, something happened to him. it must have, he would never just leave me.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Forever Till death...
description:
"I love you" Jason said his eyes lighting up with that crazy and twisted smile that I had grown to loathe.
"N-no you don't"
"First you tell me to stay away from you, now you tell me how to feel!" He shouted as he came closer to me while I began to walk backwards. I mustered up all my courage as my back hit the wall leaving me with nowhere to run.
"That's because what you feel isn't love."
"Ha! " He said taking the final step bringing him to stand toe to toe with me. He lifted his hands and placed them on either side of my head on the wall. Then he lowered his head slowly and stared right into my eyes.
"See you don't get it do you?" He said in almost a whisper..
"We're going to spend the rest of our lives together whether you know it or not."
I shut my eyes unable to bear his intense look.
"Just wait and see":

title: Whispers in the Dark
description:
Fifteen years ago, Claire Harper fled her childhood home, determined never to return. The house had been a place of secrets, whispers, and tragedies-most notably, the mysterious death of her best friend, Sarah, found cold and lifeless in the basement. Claire left everything behind, including her fractured relationship with her sister, Julia.

But when Julia goes missing without a trace, Claire has no choice but to return to the decaying house she swore she'd never see again. The police have no answers, but cryptic messages on her phone suggest someone knows more about Julia's disappearance-and about what really happened all those years ago.

As Claire digs deeper, old memories resurface: the strange noises in the house, the feeling of being watched, and the creeping sense that something malevolent has always lurked within its walls. With each step closer to the truth, Claire realizes that the line between memory and madness is dangerously thin-and the answers she seeks might just shatter everything she thought she knew about her family, her past, and herself.

In this gripping psychological thriller, Whispers in the Dark explores the dark recesses of the mind and the haunting power of buried secrets. Some truths are better left forgotten... but what if they're the only thing that can save you?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I love exploring the mysteries of the human mind. I enjoy reading and writing  psychological thrillers that blend suspense, secrets, and unexpected twists. Whispers in the Dark is my latest novel, inviting readers into a world where reality and imagination collide.

title: Love and Revenge (Complete)
description:
Annie Bloom is an average girl.  She's in college, has a best friend, works, and studies.  Yet one day she finds herself attacked, hospitalized, and nearly killed.  Her best friend, Will, is certain it has to do with the guy she just started dating.  Is Will jealous?  Could her new boyfriend be involved?  Or is it someone else entirely?  Annie must find out quickly because every day could be her last.

***
I could feel nothing but the pain. 
I felt every hit in excruciating detail with each erratic, painful heartbeat as my world became reduced to a series of agony. I struggled to breath through the broken ribs that constricted my airflow like a two-ton concrete slab had fallen on me. The blood from the blows to my head rolled down my face in waves. 
My arm was twisted at an impossible angle, yet I couldn't scream because my mouth would not open. I could feel the kicks coming at me from all directions, and as I received another one to the head I knew this was the end for me and my heartbeat slowed. The stab wound was bleeding too much for me to survive. 
When they left me for dead my eyes began to droop and the last thing I saw through fuzzy tunnel-like sight was a man running towards me before one final rattling breath coursed through my broken body and my heart stopped beating.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Syanago Story
description:
It's the year 20XX, and Japan is no different to its usual anime style we know and love today. But this is a different world from today. Cars that usually commute on the roads have been transformed into anime girls and are now roaming freely at will - a common sight in this alternate era of anime.

You, Racer (Y/N) (L/N), have been tasked to meet and identify these cars as you travel across the Japanese city districts, American canyons, Italian countrysides, highways and mountains, searching high and low for these humanized cars. Will you be able to find all 221 cars from 9 different manufacturers, from 3 different countries? Read on in the Syanago Story to find out.

title: Kill Your Darlings
description:
Before Spencer Crest left, he called you ‘doc’.

He was your favourite patient, and in return, you were his favourite psychiatrist. You understood him in a way nobody else could. You didn’t know where he came from, who his parents were, or how he knew you, but you never turned him away when he came knocking on your office doors well after hours.

But then your favourite patient stopped coming. You asked around, but nobody in town seemed to know him. 

You never heard from Spencer Crest again.

Until he started calling you.

title: Liyah's Revenge
description:
It's disheartening to take a look at my life and realize just how much I was used. From my family to my first love... and even my last love. The bitter taste of betrayal made me want to throw up. Had I been the old me, I probably would've.
The only thing I want now is revenge. I've had years to sit and wallow in pity. Now anger keeps my blood pumping. I'm not the same young, sweet girl that I once was. One by one, they will all feel Liyah's Revenge.

Robert "R. Kelly" Kelly

title: Eyes In The Dark
description:
For decades, the small town of Elmwood has harboured a chilling secret: a string of disappearances, each more baffling than the last. When skeletal remains are uncovered during the demolition of a long-abandoned lodge, the victims' stories finally demand to be told.

Sophie Lang, a disgraced investigative journalist desperate for redemption, sees the story as her way back to the top. But what starts as a deep dive into cold case files and overlooked evidence quickly becomes something far more dangerous. Sophie uncovers a decades-old conspiracy lurking in plain sight-a network of predators who have turned Elmwood into their hunting ground. They've been watching their victims for years. And now, they're watching her.

With no one to trust and her every move scrutinised, Sophie must risk everything to expose the truth about The Watchers of Elmwood. But as she pieces together their macabre puzzle, one question looms large: will she be able to uncover their secrets before she becomes their next victim?

title: Bullet Train to Murder || ONC SHORTLISTER 2024
description:
❝𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐞𝐞 𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫𝐬. 𝐓𝐰𝐨 𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐬. 𝐎𝐧𝐞 𝐊𝐞𝐲.❞

It was supposed to be a quick business trip, a bullet train ride from New York to Chicago. But the minute the train pulled out of the station, things started to go wrong. A person was murdered in the sleeper cabin, and everyone on the train was a suspect.
  
Detective Molly Rayne, a tough-as-nails veteran with a dark past, was on board and found herself drawn into the investigation. With every mile that passed, the mystery deepened.
  
As she uncovered secrets and motives among the passengers, Molly realized that the killer was more cunning and ruthless than anyone could have imagined. It was like something out of an Agatha Christie novel, only with a lot more blood and sarcasm.
  
When the train arrived in Chicago, Molly was left with a body count, a trail of clues, and a nagging suspicion that one of her fellow passengers was more than they seemed.

title: A Long Road to Redemption
description:
When Sidney Lewis met Lawson Pierson, she thought it was a case of love at first sight. The naturally shy Sidney and the adventurous Lawson seemed to be the perfect match. 
Yet, things are not what they seem. Sidney discovers Lawson is hiding a dark family secret that changes her life forever. Lawson's father, Leonard Pierson, will stop at nothing to keep his family's secrets. Framed and convicted of murder, Sidney turns to her attorney and family friend, Luke Brady, to clear her name. 
Using the information Sidney discovers, Brady begins to unravel Pierson's secrets. Joined by Detective Roger Taylor and reporter Shelia Lee, Brady and his team seek to free Sidney. Meanwhile, Leonard Peirson looks to recover the lost information to protect his family's secrets.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Chad Spradley is a teacher of US History, Government, and Sociology in high school and college in the state of Alabama, where he currently resides. He is an avid sports fan with a fascination for mysteries, science fiction, horror, and westerns. In his spare time Spradley enjoys traveling around the US and playing electric guitar. Long Road to Redemption is his first full length novel.

title: Social Engineer
description:
A Wattpad Featured Story! 

A pharmaceutical company under cyberattack from China. The chemical formula for their Alzheimer's drug at stake.

Can elite hacker Brody Taylor fortify their cyber-defences before it's too late? And can hackers ever be trusted?

Hired by a global pharmaceutical company to test their digital defences, elite hacker, Brody Taylor, applies his computer mastery and repertoire of audacious confidence tricks to penetrate their most secure systems.

Can Brody obtain the secret chemical formula for their latest drug?

Are his motivations as pure as they first appear?

Could his new girlfriend somehow be influencing Brody's actions?


Accurately depicting real-world, modern-day computer hacking techniques, SOCIAL ENGINEER is a standalone novella that introduces Brody Taylor and the Deep Web Thriller series.

The Deep Web Thriller Series:
The Deep Web Thriller series features Brody Taylor, an elite computer hacker who specialises in hacking and social engineering the weakest link of all computer systems: the humans who use them.

SOCIAL ENGINEER - A Deep Web Thriller #0

INVASION OF PRIVACY - A Deep Web Thriller #1

If you love intricately plotted thrillers with unexpected twists that are packed with technology and great characters, read SOCIAL ENGINEER now.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm the author of the Deep Web Thriller series of books which are chock-a-block with unexpected twists, technology and great characters. I've been told my books are a cross between Jeffery Deaver, Ian Rankin and Tom Clancy - quite a mix!

I joined Wattpad over two years ago long before I self-published my work. I first shared early drafts of my debut novel, INVASION OF PRIVACY, posting the opening chapters and was overwhelmed by the constructive and positive feedback. Wattpad readers gave me the confidence to continue through to completion. The finished novel is now published on Amazon. I've also written a prequel novella called SOCIAL ENGINEER, which, as a thank you, I've made available here on Wattpad in it's entirety.

title: SHADOWS OF SILENCE
description:
In the city of Blackford, a sadistic serial killer is abducting young women, subjecting them to brutal rape before murdering them and leaving their bodies abandoned in public places. The police are left with no leads, no clear pattern, and no answers. Detective Vincent Reid, a young but experienced investigator, is appointed to head the case. He's joined by Lara Mitchell, a rookie detective eager to prove herself despite the overwhelming nature of the crimes.

As the killings continue, the two detectives must confront the horror of the crimes while navigating their own personal demons. There are no cryptic messages, no hidden clues-just brutal violence and a rising body count. The killer is a methodical predator who has left no trace behind, and each murder is more horrifying than the last. As the investigation grows darker, Vincent and Lara discover a terrifying connection between the victims and a powerful, corrupt network in the city.

They must race against time to stop the killer before another woman is taken, while grappling with the disturbing realization that the person responsible may be someone closer to them than they ever imagined.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
A storyteller who thrives in the shadows, weaving tales that delve into the depths of human emotion and the darkness that lies beneath the surface. My words are my weapons, carving out worlds where secrets are deadly, chaos is inevitable, and nothing is ever as it seems.

With every story, I aim to blur the line between sanity and madness, reality and illusion. I explore the raw, untamed edges of the human psyche, drawing you into the twists and turns of crime, thrill, and the unknown. My characters are flawed, my worlds are relentless, and my plots will keep you questioning everything until the very last word.

If you crave stories that challenge your mind, awaken your curiosity, and keep you on the edge of your seat, then you've found the right storyteller. Enter the darkness, uncover the secrets, and discover a world where shadows tell the truth.

title: CODENAME:	A.D.A
description:
16 year old Ada seems like your average Nigerian teenager. She goes to high school, gets good grades and gets bullied a lot too. But what her peers don't know is, she's a top secret agent who works for an undercover agency called "The Conversion"; an agency that recruits as well as trains the best and most deadly secret agents and assasins. 

Most people think these things don't happen in Nigeria, well, think again.

Ada has managed to live a normal life by balancing her two worlds well but her focus is tested when a hot new boy named Justin arrives at her school.

The two grow extremely close and this threatens everything she holds dear to her. 

Will she reveal her true identity to Justin? Will she complete and succeed in her missions? 

And most importantly, will she make it out of high school alive? 

Find out in this whirlwind of romance, friendship and thrilling action.

title: Broken Beyond Repair
description:
I squeezed my way through the abundant number of people, trying to get to the exit. I bumped into a lot of shoulders, until I found an opening. As soon as the door was in my sight, I heard Jessie calling out my name. Her voice grabbed my attention, and I briskly turned around. I knocked right into a tall figure, causing me to lose my balance and fall. All the people dancing blocked my vision so I couldn't grab onto anything to prevent myself from falling. My arms met the hardwood floor as I tried to catch myself, sending a shock of pain through my arms.

"Forgive me ma'am." Someone said while extending an arm down to me. 

"It's fine. No harm was-"


✰ Status: FInished

title: Her Name Is Havoc
description:
Loss. Inexplicable loss. A loss you can't even grieve because no one else admits to it. After all, how can you grieve over something that was never really there? Or was it?

   Richard never had a high school sweetheart, not even a prom date. He never took dating, romance, or whatsoever seriously. To be honest, he didn't even believe in love before he met her. And "Her"? Oh, she's trouble. And he's beyond saving.

   Caroline, on the other hand, has always believed in love. Her life was a shipwreck until she found it. And she would do anything to finally marry the love of her life. Even if she has to hide her deepest, darkest secrets from everyone. The secrets that she thinks can blow up her wedding day, if not her entire life. 

   In a knitted web of love and lies, which one prevails.

title: MirrorMirror
description:
After a traumatic breakup, Cassidy moves into a new home. In an old wardrobe, he finds a mirror on which messages begin to appear from a brutally murdered girl who insists ghosts don't exist...

###

Mirror, mirror on the wall, who's the murderer of you all?

Cassidy is attempting to rebuild his life after a torturous breakup. He moves into a new house, where an old wardrobe hides a mirror, and a deadly secret. title: Kings Gambit
description:
A chessboard. A simple table consisting of sixty-four black and white tiles, a seemingly basic structure. Played on this board is a game called Chess, a war of brains, a battle of logic. Two sides face off, and only one prevails.

Kings, Queens, Bishops, Knights, Rooks, and Pawns. These are the roles of chess, each piece having their own unique moves at their disposal. they can sacrifice to achieve victory. they can take out another piece, sometimes getting away with it, or sometimes they will be taken out because of it. 

Now, what if chess wasn't played with pieces but with people? A war of brains, a battle of logic. Where a blunder could mean the end of life. Where each person has a unique role that will affect the way they play.

Hank, a top-class Chicago detective, is one of the fourteen unfortunate participants in this life or death game of chess. His role as the Sherrif allows him to get clues on the mastermind who is among the participants. While at the same time having to figure out all the other mysteries contained in the dreaded killing game.

Will he figure out who the mastermind is? Or will he fail? Time is ticking, let the death game begin.



#1 in #DeathGame on 4/16/22

title: Lost Piece
description:
The story is stopped (officially) but if u wanna read go ahead ig



Alora is a 15 yr old living with her step family. She's smart, bubbly &  with secrets of her own. Her stepfamily hates her and she is seen alone because she doesn't have any friends. 


Leonardo King is one of the powerful mafia in the world. He was feared for being a merciless towards his enemies and the amount of power he held. He has no soft spot for anyone except for his brother Dominic King and bestfriend Stefan Callisto. But no one can blame him for being a monster, after all he was raised in a way that no child should ever go through. 

What happens when Alora meets Leonardo King in an unexpected way?

Two opposite beings yet with the same past?
