title: Suspect Number Five | ONC 2023
description:
Tristan Young is, by all logical conclusions, a failure. His dream career of private investigation has left him with nothing but debt and an empty office. So when a mysterious phone call makes him a grand promise of fame and success, the decision to accept is simple.

There is only one price for his ambition: one night in the local manor, and one dinner with five strangers. Easy enough. Until, sometime in the dark, the price turns bloody.

With one of the party's attendees now dead and no other suspects but the remaining five, they are all thrust deep into a murder case riddled with secrets. For Tristan, it should be his fantasy come true; he finally has a puzzle to solve and a chance to put his skills to use. But the games in his head never placed himself as a puzzle piece.

The game becomes a race. He has to clear his name and win what he was promised before it's too late.

-♧-

Written for the Open Novella Contest 2023, using prompt 49.
-- ONC Shortlister --

[cover art by the amazing @-aceospades-]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Just your ordinary local wolf stuffed with a tangle of disconnected plotlines, a thousand characters, a million half-formed worlds and one little scrap of sense sobbing quietly amongst the chaos. In other words, you can call me Pup.

Despite my wolfish nature, I'm very friendly and would never do anything to hurt my readers. See, look at the nice fluffy rug I've laid out for you! Just don't go looking underneath it. There's been a, uh, red paint spillage.

Though I'm made up of 97% books, I'm supposed to be pursuing a career in computer science, so I dedicate a sliver of time to dabbling in code. I also create occasional art. I'm trying.

Anyway, you're here for stories, right? Good thing I have a few of those lying around. Here's your selection:

⋆ A Touch Of Darkness ~ high fantasy set in a medieval-esque world, featuring fiery magic and a whole lot of sword-fighting, ~175k. The sequel, A Deadly Bite, is completed at ~200k.

⋆ The Heart Of Asariel ~ a non-religious, fantastical take on angels, set mostly in a sci-fantasy city and featuring a sunshine idiot and the angst girl he's in love with. Completed ~65k.

⋆ Suspect Number Five ~ mystery in which a diverse group of people -- including an aspiring detective -- attend a dinner party and get tangled in a murder case. Completed ~40k.

⋆ Shadewylf ~ first of a high fantasy trilogy focused on magical wolves. Completed ~125k, being (very slowly) rewritten offline.

⋆ Pynk ~ set in the same world as Shadewylf, completed ~35k.

A few other things! Firstly, I'm a club admin for @DreamlandCommunity -- which I highly recommend you check out.
https://www.wattpad.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/DreamlandCommunity

If you read any of my books (I love you) and actually like them, then I have a little corner of a discord server where I blab about my worlds and their many characters.
https://discord.gg/jC3rRTq

I'm also on Tapas, I guess?
https://tapas.io/SpruceWolf

Go well!
- Pup

Meeting the mysterious gangster, August, turns Casey's mundane life upside down and only makes it harder to trust anyone. As they grow closer, Casey realizes he's falling hard for the charming young man, who's nothing but trouble. Is he really someone trustworthy or is it possible he gave his heart away to a ruthless killer?

title: Super Villain
description:
• Highest Rank #2 in supervillain •

     "Do you trust me?" he asked, still staring at the gray door.
     "Of course not," I said, as if the idea were absurd.
     A ghost of a smile crept at the corner of his mouth. His hand latched onto my arm. Panic started to pool out of my nerves. I glanced back and forth between his gloved hand and the concealing hood upon his head.
     Curiosity never hit me so deeply than it did at that moment, as I wondered who was under the hood. Who it was that I was supposed to trust.
     "Who are you?" 
     I timidly reached my free hand up to his head, fingers tingling all the while. He didn't try to stop me. There was a brief second when excitement exploded inside me, propelling my hand all the more quicker, millimeters away from touching the black cloth.
     Ghost grabbed my hand mid-air, his reflexes acting lightning-fast. I started. Drums began to pound in my ears. My heartbeat rose about ten notches. He had his entire hand wrapped around my wrist, and he slowly eased it down until it was parallel with my body.
     "A villain can choose to reveal his identity, but not knowing is the beauty of mystery," Ghost said lowly, his right hand coming up to push back a loose strand of hair from my face. "Now close your eyes."
     Reluctantly I shut my eyes, but not because he had commanded the action. It was more out of fear of what was going to happen next.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: East
description:
/ complete /

Life hasn't always been kind to East Winters, but for the most part, she's finally made peace with the incident three years ago that tore her family apart. The same can't be said for Edgecliff; half the town still won't look East in the eye, and the latest wave of petty crimes isn't helping. Two fires and a dead mom hardly prove her innocence. Even worse, Asher is back in town-but no matter how close they used to be, East can't forget what he did on that fateful night...
 
As small incidents snowball into startling revelations, East begins to realize that there might be more to her family, more to her sleepy little town, more to even herself than she could've ever imagined.

title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer
description:
"The Adventures of Tom Sawyer by Mark Twain is an 1876 novel about a young boy growing up along the Mississippi River. It is set in the 1840s in the fictional town of St. Petersburg, inspired by Hannibal, Missouri, where Twain lived as a boy. In the novel Tom Sawyer has several adventures, often with his friend Huckleberry Finn." -Wikipedia description

More readable version of "The Adventures of Tom Sawyer" from the Gutenberg library.
Domaine public
authorBio:
I'm currently part of the @RP_Clan and @RP_Warriors joint account where we do cool stuff. Check it out!





Still reading? Well I hope you are ready for the barrage of information you probably won't even remember by the time you've finished reading. Here it goes:

Italy is my favorite country; in fact, I plan to spend two weeks there next year.
If you like tuna and tomato sauce- try combining the two. It's really not as bad as it sounds.
If Purple People Eaters are real... where do they find purple people to eat?
Wednesday is hump day, but has anyone asked the camel if he's happy about it?
Christmas is coming.
A song can make or ruin a person's day if they let it get to them.
Lets all be unique together until we realise we are all the same.
Abstraction is often one floor above you.
I think I will buy a red car, or I will lease a blue one.
The waves are crashing on the shore; it is a lovely sight.
What was the person thinking when they discovered cow's milk was fine for human consumption... and why did they do it in the first place!?
Last Friday in three week's time I saw a spotted striped blue worm shake hands with a legless lizard.
Don't step on the broken glass.
A glittering gem is not enough.
I would have gotten the promotion, but I wasn't there to receive it.
My Mum tries to be cool by saying that she likes all the same things that I do.
When I was little I had a car door slammed shut on my hand. My hand still remembers it quite vividly.
The old apple revels in its authority.
I'd rather be a bird than a fish.
I want to buy a onesie... but know it won't suit me.
A purple pig and a green donkey flew a kite in the middle of the night and ended up sunburnt. How?
Writing a list of random sentences is harder than I initially thought it would be, except that I'm not writing them... :3

title: Damaged Goods
description:
Erica Jensen, a retired Marine with PTSD, struggles with making a living as an unlicensed private eye and overcoming her opioid addiction. When she's hired by a rich business man to find his missing daughter and recover embezzled money, things go south fast when she stumbles across a dead body.

As Erica tries to discover why the victim was killed and where the girl disappeared, she ends up being targeted by the Russian mob. However, it takes all of Erica's wits to find out the astonishing truth behind it all.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm the New York Times bestselling author of the hardboiled mystery Identity Crisis, featuring Maryland lawyer-sleuth Stephanie Ann "Sam" McRae. I've also written and published Invisible Me, a young adult novel, The Planck Factor, a thriller, and several short stories, one of which was nominated for a Derringer Award.

The thing that inspired me to write a lawyer-sleuth novel was that I wanted to write stories about a female protagonist who solved mysteries and did so without compromising legal ethics -- much! One of the big obstacles Sam faces in solving mysteries is doing so without using the usual private eye trickery.

Right now, the Sam McRae mystery series includes four novels. If you'd like a free copy, just click this link: http://bit.ly/IDCFree

I hope to all more books to the Sam McRae series. At the moment, I'm working on a new mystery series with a female Marine veteran sleuth named Erica Jensen. The first book in that series is called DAMAGED GOODS.

I try to post updates here once a week.

I've worked as a waitress, a photography model, a substitute school bus driver, a typist, an attorney, a freelance writer, and a reference librarian, among other things.

My interests include reading, music, movies, travel, walking, baseball, and cats. And good espresso. Not necessarily in that order.

title: Crazy Town
description:
He's intelligent, handsome, a millionaire, dangerous and he's also hiding a big secret...

---

A faint muffled sound barely reaches my ears. It sounded like... chains? I look around, maybe I dropped something but I cannot see anything on the floor.

The sound was very faint and sounded a bit distant, maybe I imagined it, my brain playing tricks on me due to the silence of the house. Then, I heard it again. It was definitely the sound of chains, then came another sound, the faint sound of words.

I look down at the wooden floor and rug that I am standing on, before getting on my hands and knees and pressing my ear against the carpet. I cannot hear anything, there's just silence again. I crawl forward and press my ear against the hardwood, I hold my breath and strain my ears, it sounded like it came from below me... the sound comes through again, this time a little louder, it's definitely coming from below the floor board, chains rattling and then stopping, the sound comes through twice.

'What are you doing?' a deep voice sounds from the doorway.

title: Mr. 8
description:
A Paranormal Thriller

Psychology professor Denton Reed has been pulled out of the classroom to find a killer. Bodies are turning up all over the quiet town of Bexhill. They are found dismembered and burned beyond recognition in a snow covered farmer's field, by the abandoned mill, and under the train bridge. The only clue linking the victims is the bizarre figure-eight patterns left behind in their homes.

Denton must use his unique profiling techniques to uncover the murderer, who the police have dubbed Mr. 8. As he begins to unravel the mystery, a strange pattern begins to emerge. Before their deaths, each victim was seized by dark obsessions and inexplicable changes in behavior. Whatever strange forces are affecting the people of Bexhill, they may actually be more dangerous than any killer.

As a wave of insanity sweeps the town, Denton will put his life on the line to get to the source of the madness and risk all to protect the woman he loves.

But is it already too late?


[Rated PG-13 For scenes of violence and strong language]  

*Cover art by Donald Cronkhite.


Best RankingMay 12, 2014 - #1 Mystery/Thriller, #2 Horror
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
It's fair to say, I wouldn't be writing today if I hadn't joined Wattpad back in 2013. I'd been writing as a hobby, merely to amuse myself, but was getting restless and wanted more. It was time to push new boundaries and share my work with an audience. By luck or fate, I came across Wattpad. Here I found a  warm, supportive, and nurturing community of peers who built up both my skills and my confidence.

It's been quite the journey. My first full length serialized novel, MR. 8, reached the top of both the Horror and the Mystery charts and received a publishing deal. I was invited to join the Wattpad Stars program, and through it, I was contracted to write the PARANORMAL ACTIVITY movie tie-in, THE GARRISON PROJECT (which was later published as a novella), and was given the opportunity to teach a course on storytelling. But my biggest achievement has been the friends I've made along the way.

If you choose to read my work, prepare yourself for some strangeness. I write fiction that falls into a nebulous zone between horror, science-fiction, paranormal, and fantasy. I enjoy being surprised by the things I read, so I try to take my own stories in surprising directions.

Find out more at http://www.DavidJThirteen.com

You can sign up for my monthly newsletter at http://eepurl.com/dBqP1r

And you can follow me on:
Twitter --  http://twitter.com/davidjthirteen
Instagram -- http://www.instagram.com/davidjthirteen
Goodreads -- http://www.goodreads.comhttps://www.wattpad.com/user/show/19708548-david-thirteen

An embezzlement, two murders and a series of suspicious deaths that follow- with a bloodthirsty murderer on the loose, Gabriel must race against time to defeat a powerful nemesis with no regard for law or life. 

Armed with an amateur for an assistant, next to no evidence and an old walkie talkie, Private Detective Gabriel Bedford sets out to uncover the deaths of Detective Katherine Wright and her lover from twenty years ago.

How does the dormant walkie talkie seem to come to life at midnight? Who is the supposed ally who works in the shadows to help the detective when he is at his wits' end? Moreover, who is the unknown adversary who seems to know his every move and is always one step ahead?

title: Mystery about Forever Love Ranch
description:
Melissa Heart's vacation is interrupted by a desperate call from her sister, Brooke Hart- Love. title: Midnight Murderers
description:
Abruptly jumping forward, I grabbed his collar, sending us crashing against the wall behind Nathan. I rose the knife up, until it barely grazed his throat. "I am done with your stupid games! I am done with you tossing me around! I am done pretending like you kidnapping me was ever okay!"

I pressed the knife into his skin, yet he merely furrowed his eyebrows at the action. "You make it seem like you're doing me a favor by not brutally murdering me."

"Because I am." I froze as the familiar barrel of his gun pressed against my lower back. His signature smug smile returned as he dipped his lips to my ears and whispered, "Alright darling, how about we cut the chase short and sit down? I don't want blood on my clean floor."
-

N.T.

The great mystery of New York. The anonymous killer. The invisible man, that slips out of the grasp of detectives and police officers every single time. The man who twists his way through every detective's mind and comes off as unstoppable. The fox, as the FBI likes to call him due to his cunning ways and tricks, is regularly setting the State in an uproar. 

He's unstoppable. He's dangerous. He's fearless.

He's always there, but at the same time...he's not.

What happens when in turn of your brother's survival, the Devil himself asks for you? What happens when you're forced to live under his roof? What happens when you become one of his possessions? 

Or worse, what happens when you're thrown into the dark, twisted world of The Two Trevor Brothers?

 One that has the world crumbling at the simple snap of his fingers, one who meets life-threatening danger with an easy smile?

Or the one  who would crush the soul of anyone who dared to hurt you, the one who would raise hell just so your eyes would soften at the sight of him? 

What happens when both of the rival brothers have one thing in common: their obsession with keeping you close?

-

"Well fed devils behave better than famished saints."

title: Jamais Vu
description:
What if you met the man of your dreams but he was already married... to you?

Jamais Vu is a time-traveling romance wrapped in a deadly mystery.  Nessa is in the last year of her university studies when she begins to experience strange phenomena - waves of déjà vu, convincing her that she is familiar with places she's never been before.  When she sees a bearded stranger, she is powerfully drawn to him, feeling as though she knows the older man already.

But Dan is overwhelmed by the appearance of the beautiful younger woman, who is actually a youthful version of his missing wife.  Nessa is somehow travelling ten years into the future to meet up with her the man who will eventually become her husband.  Past and future become entangled as Nessa meets a young Dan in her present, while ten years in the future, Dan strives to save his wife from the clutches of a lethal serial killer.

The clock is ticking as both a young Nessa and an older Dan attempt to keep the future intact, and restrain themselves from falling in love with the wrong version of each other.  But is it cheating on someone if you're in love with who they are - just in another time?

title: 18.98: An ONC 2023 Thriller
description:
It's referred to by several names: the ghost frequency, the haunted frequency, the fear infrasound.
You can't hear sound at 18.98 hertz, but your body feels it, and when it does, some believe you've opened yourself to the world of the supernatural.
Liv used to believe the ghost frequency was real, and so did her friend, Helina. While Liv came to shun this notion, Helina went in the opposite direction, becoming obsessed with using the ghost frequency to access a paranormal plane of existence. Now, Helina has gone missing, and her brother, Graham is convinced the ghost frequency has something to do with it... and Liv is the only one who can find her. 
Liv agrees to help Graham search for his sister, but she brings with her memories of a fraught relationship and a great and unforgiveable harm done-a harm so deeply scarring, she's willing to do something terrible to gain revenge, even if it means losing Helina, and even herself, forever.

title: High School Royale
description:
It would've been a normal Friday.

Weekend plans. Chemistry tests. Relationship rumors.

But on that day, at 9:10 a.m., all 1,484 students of Stonewall Academy High School wake up on their homeroom desk and are forced into a simple, brutal game: a fight to the death. Across the school, six students will battle for survival and discover the meaning of trust and betrayal.

RAYMOND is the junior valedictorian who talks little, a genius with a mysterious past and unclear intentions.

SKYLAR is popular and beautiful, and has tabs on everyone thanks to her newspaper and yearbook class.

JESSE is a star athlete on the varsity baseball team, quick  to protect his friends but slow to make the right choice.

ALYSSA is a kind girl who's a model of perfection, as an Ivy-bound pre-med major and former cheer captain.

GRACE sticks to herself and prioritizes her own survival above all else, but has mastered the sport of archery.

ROWAN is a freshman trying not to fail half his classes, struggling to live up to his brother's shadow.

These six people don't know much about each other at the start of the games, but will find their fates entwined in ways none of them will have expected. As the games go on, friendships will be forged and challenged, and loyalties will be tested. Out of the battlefields will come unbreakable bonds and resilient hope.

The clock ticks down. The only way out is to play, and the only way to play is to fight.

UPDATES EVERY SUNDAY, 11AM CST

title: The Good Girl Has a Secret
description:
After being in a terrible accident nearly four months ago seventeen year old Ally Thomas is back in New York City for her senior year of high school only now she doesn't remember anyone. Brett's in juvie for being framed of lighting the shed Ally was in on fire, Ally’s stalker, Chase is in juvie as well for nearly killing Brett and Ally, Kendra's still the same bitch as always, Shelby's still trying to get her asshole of an ex to take her back, Zoey and Jamie are still happy as ever, and Ally has started to crush on someone only this time it's not Brett. 
Ally's life seems to be spiraling out of control; will she ever see Brett again? Will she regain her memory? Will Chase come back to stalk Ally once again or will someone finally put an end to this madness? Ally and Chase are both hiding something, something that could change their lives forever, but they're not the only ones Ally's parents and Brett have been hiding something from her for a very long time, the question is now, will Ally ever find out or will her parent's and Brett do the best they can to keep it a secret? The good girl has a secret and it ain't pretty.

Sequel to: The Good Girl Has A Stalker... I suggest reading that one first :)

authorBio:
Hello there! My name is Shantel :) Here I am once again updating my bio on here!

I'm twenty years old and from very chilly Canada! Writing is my secret hobby I started when I was thirteen or so (although I've been very slow at updating lately, sorry about that!) I have hopefully gotten my mojo back to continue writing my books for all you wonderful readers!

I still have yet to decide what I'm going to do with my life so for now I'll just wonder around like a child who lost her mother at the mall, scared and clueless! Perhaps one day something will just come to me! For now I'll continue working as a waitress

title: Pearl
description:
[Wattpad Picks: Editor's Choice] A research team dedicated to advanced medical care is in the process of creating a bandage that seals and heals all injuries almost instantaneously. The catch? The bandage itself is a living organism that burrows inside of you. When the team's attempt to breed a new version of their bandage produces something unexpected, they go underground to protect their research. Now, they are on the hunt--for answers, for investors...and for test subjects. 

Pearl is a fast-paced thriller with a dash of mystery that will develop into an action sci-fi/fantasy novel as it progresses. It contains scenes of gore, body horror, and some violence. Proceed with caution, and dive into the world of illegal research where morals are optional and curiosity turns to obsession.

title: The Prince's Wedding (The Erik Midgard Case Files Volume 3)
description:
How do you protect a man when everyone who wants to kill him has a time machine?

Edward Minkwood does not exist. Therefore, he should not just have been invited to the prince of Jupiter's wedding. But when time travelling police detective Erik Midgard receives the invitation, he knows that fate may be coming for him once again.

The Jupiter Imperia is ecstatic for the wedding of the century, but there are plenty of people who see nothing to celebrate. When Erik and his partner Mirabi arrive to investigate, they find old friends, political tensions, dangerous rebels, assassins, old enemies determined to settle ancient scores and others with mysterious agendas of their own that could literally change the universe. Cut off from their usual support network with the Chronological Operations Agency, Erik and Mirabi have nothing but their wits to keep the prince alive long enough to get to the altar. Along the way, Erik will have to face the greatest dilemmas of his life to find out if his fate is written or not.

title: The Game Changer (Completed)
description:
Throwing my first into the punching bag in front of me, I growled out in frustration. Anger contorted my face as my fists continued to fly into the bag. Pain shot through my knuckles as I hadn’t bothered to wrap my hands. I didn’t care. How could I care? All I could think about was the lifeless body of my partner as he lay in a pool of his own blood.  It was an image that would be engrained in my mind for the rest of my life. One that would always send a shiver up my spine. One that I could have prevented from happening.    

After police officer Tyler Andrew’s partner is killed one night while on the job he vows never to become close with another partner. So what happens when the new partner he is assigned isn’t quite what he was expecting?

title: Doing Time
description:
------
'Rebekah Alexander-Gonzalez is a 21 year old girl, who was arrested for something she didn't do. 

After trying for 2 months, she finally escapes, but when she does, she runs into one of her childhood friends, Aaron Monroe. 

She explains the situation to him, and he helps her get away. They move to a different state, get fake names, dye their hair, and get colored contacts so they won't be recognized.

After being on the run for a year, Aaron betrays Rebekah, and calls the police, ratting her out. 

He tells them that she escaped, moved to a different state, and changed her identity. 

The next day, police show up at her doorstep, and Aaron hands her over. 

She then vows that once she gets out of jail, she will haunt him, and make his life a living hell.'
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Commencement (West Hampton U: Part 2)
description:
This is a part two of the  West Hampton U series. The first book is "Tale Teller."  

When Suhana walks into a room, people stop. Violins play, birds sing, stars shine brighter. With green eyes, skin like caramel silk, and a smile that could kill, she was untouchable. She enjoyed the attention, and a lot of it she got, but Suhana never did and never will let anything or anyone be a diversion from her goals.

Ruhaan was the kind of guy your dad told you to stay away from, but you just can't resist. Pure mischief, confidence, and a tempting smile, it's all he needs to charm his way through anything. Call him a playboy, call him an enigma, but what did it matter to him. He was destined for the NBA and it was just within arms reach now.

Ruhaan didn't expect things to turn out this way. He wasn't sure what drove Suhana to dislike him so much, but he was fine with staying away if that's what she preferred.

Despite their best efforts, maybe it was circumstance, fate, or maybe just pure bad luck that kept bringing them together. They have a choice to make now: resolve their issues to work together or let it be someone else's problem. It was a matter or life or death after all.

They have one common goal: unmask the Tale Teller and make her pay.

Whether or not they worked together, Suhana knew she didn't have to make life easy for Ruhaan, especially now that her best friend was not around to tell her to play nice. Ruhaan would happily endure whatever torture she threw his way, maybe even enjoy it a little. At the end of the day, even if it was hate, at least she felt something for him.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

Thanks for stopping by. I hope you enjoy what you find.

title: Mumbai Noir
description:
In the bustling streets of Mumbai, Detective Vikram finds himself trapped in a cycle of mundane cheating cases, yearning for something more challenging. His boredom dissipates when he's summoned by the affluent Kapoor family to investigate the mysterious disappearance of their daughter, Ayushi.

As Vikram delves deeper into the case, he discovers layers of deceit and hidden truths, each leading to dead ends. With every step, the list of suspects grows, and Vikram's suspicions shift from one person to another, including those closest to the Kapoor family.

Caught in the web of intrigue, Vikram finds himself unexpectedly drawn to Mrs. Kapoor who intimate him. However, his growing feelings for her only serve to complicate matters further, clouding his judgment and blurring the lines between his personal and professional life.

 With danger lurking at every corner and trust becoming a rare commodity, Vikram must navigate through the shadows of Mumbai's elite society to unmask the kidnapper before it's too late.

In a city where everyone seems to have something to hide, Vikram must rely on his instincts, wit, and newfound love or lust, even he doesn't know, solve the case and bring Ayushi home safely. But in a world where appearances can be deceiving, will Vikram be able to distinguish friend from foe and catch the kidnapper before they slip away? 

Welcome to the world of Vikram.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:

title: The Year of the Tiger (Book 3 of The Almair Series) (Completed)

title: Cute but Psycho
description:

A self proclaimed narc, a blue eyed beauty concealing a Grey Goose in her fanny pack, a playboy with a haunting past, and a musician turned jock selling his soul for steroids out on the soccer field- all scrambling to clear their names out when the silver spooned vixen of Arlington goes missing. 

Questions are raised, cold corpses come to light, and the blue blooded tyrants finally learn that every action comes with an equally forceful reaction.

•••(Ok this is the best Sherlock joke ever!) Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson were going camping. They pitched a tent under the stars and went to sleep.

Sometime in the night, Holmes woke Watson up and told him, "Watson, look up at the sky and tell me what you see."

Watson replied, "I see millions and millions of stars."

Holmes said: "And what do you deduce from that?"

Watson replied: "Well if there are millions of stars, and if even a few of those have planets, it's quite likely there are some planets like Earth out there.And if there are a few planets like Earth out there, there might also be life."

Holmes replied: "Watson, you idiot, it means somebody stole our tent!"•••

title: Merry Sister Mary: Three Can Keep A Secret
description:
[Merry Sister Mary Series Book 3]
Sister Mary has made a name for herself in her current home of New Orleans, Louisiana. Renowned for her gift of glee and green thumb for trouble, this foolhardy nun knows no boundaries if it means making the world a better place. Yet with success often comes greater challenges and bigger enemies. 

The orphanages of New Orleans have been dismantled and the displaced children of a certain misbehaved bunch claim one last chance to redeem themselves before entering the new foster care system. Tasked to be an example of good morals, Sister Mary's dislike for children and rambunctious nature proves to be a challenge, but in a distracting twist, all that is about to change. Upon receiving an invite to a Shakespearian play, an audience member is murdered on stage. To everyone's surprise when the body goes missing and the same man is murdered again, a fear that someone is raising the dead ignites the city in a frenzy of voodoo magic. It becomes Sister Mary's job to see beyond the superstition and uncover a wicked web of secrets. Yet no web is complete without a spider, and spiders do not take kindly to funny nuns.

title: The Viking Seal
description:
A map fragment is found among the belongings of an archaeologist that died working on the site of a dig in Egypt. before any action can be taken, the rest of the belongings are stolen before any more could be retrieved and protected.

The map, a possible confirmation of the Viking visits to North America, draws the attention of the Congress of International Antiquities, and their investigator, Gretta Lawrence.
From Canada's northern country all the way to the east coasts of Newfoundland, and Labrador, the Congress team races to beat a criminal opposition to the prize believed to be buried there.

title: Trigger
description:
Kinsley Adams is finally getting the getaway she's been dreaming of for years. She's moving to her cottage for the summer, three hours away from her home filled with day-to-day madness. 

Kinsley's had the same cottage for as long as she can remember, but something has definitely changed since the last time she came for a visit; new neighbors. A couple with a nephew her age- Levi- and a son due to arrive the next day- Finn. 

When they come over for a barbecue the first night, Levi Collins seems like a completely normal teenager. That is until she wakes up in the middle of the night to the sound of gunshots coming from the shooting range hidden on the edges of the forest. That's when Kinsley discovers Levi Collins is far from a completely normal teenager. Completely normal teenagers aren't almost constantly losing their mind, after all.

And that's where Finn Allen comes in.

title: The Veil Of Vengeance
description:
When 5 friends travel to Dehradun, they unknowingly check into a haunted mansion with a dark past. The ghost of Abhinav, a betrayed businessman, haunts the mansion, seeking revenge on the family that destroyed his life. His tragic story-a family's greed that led to the murder of his wife and children-terrifies the group, but Riddhi forms an unexpected bond with him.

Desperate for justice and redemption, Abhinav offers Riddhi a chilling choice: help him seek revenge, or be trapped by his restless spirit forever. As they grow closer, Riddhi must decide if she will risk everything to help a ghost find peace-and uncover the true cost of revenge.

The Veil Of Vengeance is a haunting tale of betrayal, love, and the fight for redemption in the shadow of death.

title: Innocent
description:
Bella had grown up with a loving family and friends, she was popular, intelligent and had looks most girls envied.

One day her world came crashing down, her father wanted her to marry a CEO to join their companies as the business her dad worked so hard to build was starting to crumble away. At first she was hesitant but family was everything to her and so she agreed, as time went on she began to see her future husband for what he truly was, a controlling and manipulative man. She couldnt marry him but when her families threats dont phase her,  they go to a more drastic approach.
 Reporting her for a crime she never committed. 

Lukas (luke) was a no nonsense cop, he was good at what he did and was high ranked. When he met Bella he had no desire to even look into her case,  she was a no good kid as far as he was concerned but as time passed he began to see the real bella. will it be to late, will he be visiting her in prison or can he clear her name.

title: The Pact of Shadows
description:
The Pact of Shadows is a story about two strangers, Chloe and Dylan, who meet in the most unexpected way by crashing their cars into each other on a dark, empty road in San Bernardino. Both of them are dealing with some serious baggage. Chloe is on the hunt for her missing sister, while Dylan is searching for his wife, who vanished without a trace. They reluctantly team up to follow clues, and as they dig deeper, weird things start happening. Shadows seem to move on their own, strange people keep showing up, and creepy legends about the nearby forest feel a little too real.
    
    Their journey takes them from rundown motels to shady bars. Along the way, Chloe's sarcasm and Dylan's deadpan attitude create some much needed humor to cut through the tension. But with old secrets coming to light and sinister forces closing in, Chloe and Dylan have to face their pasts and learn to trust each other if they want to make it out alive. In this mix of suspense, dark humor, and supernatural mystery, The Pact of Shadows explores friendship, loss, and how sometimes facing the unknown means confronting your own fears.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: I got spurs that jingle, jangle, jingle

title: Death at Balfefield Abbey
description:
Arabella Darley was brutally murdered. Young, beautiful, and the mistress of Balfefield Abbey, the violence of her death was matched only by the obscenity in which her naked body was elaborately posed for those who would find her. 

In a story that spans Ireland, England, and West Africa, as the nineteenth century turned into the twentieth, journalist Clara Sullivan and Detective Inspector Reginald Keating are ordered to investigate this most barbaric of murders. It is a dangerous time and place for both. 

Will either uncover the truth? The whole truth?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
As an author, I'm fascinated by the rich tapestry of history and the mysteries it conceals. My latest novel, "Death at Balfefield Abbey," is the first in a trilogy featuring the tenacious investigative reporter Clara Sullivan and the astute Inspector Keating. Set in 1903, this historical murder mystery explores the dark undercurrents beneath the surface of a seemingly serene estate.

In crafting Clara Sullivan's character, I wanted to create a protagonist who is both intelligent and relentless in her pursuit of truth. Alongside her, Inspector Keating brings a methodical and analytical approach to solving the crimes they encounter. Together, they delve into a web of secrets and lies, hoping to bring justice to light in an era when such pursuits were fraught with political and cultural challenges.

This trilogy promises to take readers on a journey through complex cases and richly depicted historical settings. My writing process involves meticulous research, as I strive to authentically recreate the time periods and settings that form the backdrop of my stories.

I invite you to join Clara Sullivan and Inspector Keating as they unravel mysteries and navigate the intricate world of the Edwardian era.

title: The Sister (Age Regression Story) Book Two
description:
Sequel to The Babysitter, In "The Sister," the haunting legacy of the Johnson family continues to unfold as Leanna, the enigmatic sister of the malevolent Kaylie, emerges into the lives of Carla, Elena, and their age-regressing little, Emmie.

Haunted by the scars of the past year, Carla and Elena are skeptical of anyone entering their lives, especially after the traumatic experiences with Kaylie. However, when Leanna, seemingly harmless, moves in next door, the couple finds themselves caught in a web of suspicion and dread.

Leanna volunteers to babysit Emmie, but the echoes of Kaylie's sinister deeds cast a shadow of doubt. As Leanna's unsettling behavior unravels, Carla and Elena must navigate the thin line between caution and paranoia. Unbeknownst to them, Leanna conceals a malevolent plan that could shatter their lives once more.

In "The Sister," trust is a fragile commodity, and the blurred lines between safety and peril force the characters to confront their deepest fears. Emmie, caught in the crossfire, faces a new wave of emotional turmoil, testing the bonds of love and resilience that have held her family together.

As the story unfolds, secrets unravel, and the ominous connection between Leanna and Kaylie begins to reveal itself. "The Sister" delves into the chilling aftermath of the Johnson family's reign of terror, exploring the lengths people will go to protect those they love and the sinister forces that threaten to unravel everything.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Lost And Found
description:
Serena has no memory of her life after being kidnapped and raped by a serial killer named Gary Hedrick. After a month of torture she is saved by FBI Agent Derek Morgan but since that day of freedom life has not been the same for Serena. Nightmare  of the nights with Gary haunt her every step. However, in her last year of school, Gary comes back into her life. After many thrilling events will Serena be able to escape her abuser?  Read "Lost and Found" to find out.

title: Unique I
description:
With only two hundred dollars, Unique packed her suitcase and headed to New York City for a brand new start.  It's there that Unique meets big time boxing promoter, Kennard and it is love at first sight.  However, after nine months of living in the lap of luxury with Kennard, skeletons from Unique's past show up and it will cost her a cool million dollars to not only keep her relationship but her life.  But Unique isn't about to lose it all.  With the help of her best friend, she devises a major heist and to pull it off all she has to do it stay alive.

title: Penny's Christmas Adventure
description:
It's Christmas eve in Pontypandy and Penny has been asked to do Christmas shopping for the station's Christmas eve party with the Police, Mountain Rescue, and the other emergency services. She ends up lost in the snow out of Pontypandy and has to find ways to keep warm with only what she has. Can Sam and the team find her before Christmas Day or will their Christmas be a disaster? Takes place during Season 13 after Series 12.

title: The Kidnapper's Game
description:
Emily's struggle for survival began when she awoke in an unknown location, held captive by her kidnapper Marcus. To Emily's horror, her father became involved with the wrong people, forcing them to take Emily as compensation for his debt. Emily strives to escape from the start, eventually making her way to freedom, but her fight is far from over. Marcus escapes capture and makes it his mission to reclaim Emily. She will go to any length to discover the man who abducted her, including baiting him to bring him out of hiding.

title: EVEREST
description:
It was a hot summer day when Elowen Hale Garcia heard a horrifying news about her mother, Vivienne Quinn Ruiz-Garcia's death. From that moment on, she developed a deep hatred for the season, as it constantly reminded her of that tragic day. As years passed, Elowen struggled to move on from the trauma and sought justice for her mother's death.

But everything changed when she met Ronan Blake Lee, a charming boy who seemed to exude warmth and kindness in stark contrast to the oppressive heat of summer. Little did she know, Ronan was the son of Robert Lee, a billionaire businessman who happened to be one of Elowen's mother's biggest competitors and her primary suspect in her mother's death.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Detective's Guide to the Perfect Crime
description:
She's enthralled with solving the murder of her biological father.

He's a high-ranking detective that was transferred to her small town.

She hates law enforcement for the reason that she believes she can do their job better.

He started working in law enforcement because he knows he's better. 

After moving to the county of Paulson, Roman opens a can of worms leading to secrets yet undiscovered in Margo's small hometown. It's an obvious dislike, but she needs his resource access and he needs her inner knowledge of the people. 

Can they fight against all odds of the growing darkness of the mystery before them? And, when tragedy strikes, will these secrets still be able to be revealed?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello! I am an amateur author looking for a public eye. All of my works are unedited unless otherwise stated.

I started writing during the Covid-19 pandemic as my health issues kept me inside most days. Writing is my way of living adventures vicariously through my characters.

My favorite genres are medieval and sci-fi. I expect these will be a lot of the genres you see.

Please vote and comment and help me towards my goal of becoming a part time author <3

title: Vipers of Velvet
description:
Victor and Kai, bound by a shared past, navigate a world  ruled by silent power and hidden threats. While Victor's controlled demeanor hides a mind always calculating, Kai's wit and charm are the only cracks in his iron exterior. But when a simple meeting spirals into a deadly game, secrets unravel and loyalties are put to the test. In a world where every move counts, nothing is ever truly as it seems.

title: The Nightmare Has Only Begun
description:
Jonhathan Khol finally had his happy life away from his parents and the bullies at school. In his twenties with a five year old son and another child on the way with his now loving boyfriend after their rocky start why wouldn't it be? 

Well it was until his fears and nightmares of sorts about the future came true. All it took was a run in with a familiar face then a knock at the door a few days later to bring everything to an end. 

In less than a week his quiet happy life turned upside down by those looking in and seeing him dealing with a bad case of Stockholm Syndrome. Because falling in love with the man to trap you in his attic for months, until you obey his rules, seems strange to the normal person.

 No one sees it how Jonhathan does. No one will. No one can when dark secrets are slowly being uncovered at the house Jonhathan has called home for years. Sinister crimes unraveled by the police which took place in the very house and just outside.

[Contains Male Pregnancy]
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love reading and writing more than anything. Most of the stories I write and post on wattpad are boyxboy stories and contain male pregnancy... I'd really love to write a book with someone on wattpad. Maybe one day..

I want to say thank you to everyone who has followed me or voted and commented for any of my stories I post here. Especially The Gift which took what felt like forever to finish. You stuck by and enjoyed it even though I doubted it every time I pressed the publish button.

I never imagined so many people would ever enjoy anything to come from me. It means a lot to me. The book started from a dream and went from  there. Good news is I'm writing book two Rebuild, Repair, Then Comes Revenge slowly right now in three parts as I finish a few other stories I placed on hold. I'm excited and happy because I have so many plans and ideas that I can't wait for everyone to read it.

Um.. in other news Fulls Bloods is still on hold and the other stories I promised to start posting like The Nightmare Continues which I plan to get back to posting new chapters since I took it down months ago along with a few other stories. But I think I'm going to edit them and change a lot of things. I have a lot of stories half completed I want to finish and post. Hopefully I will soon.

Anyway I hope everyone enjoys my stories.  :)

title: SOMEWHERE by the Sea
description:
WELCOME TO SOMEWHERE, OREGON. 

Nestled in a cove on Oregon's coastline, the town of Somewhere is charming, picturesque, inhabited by townsfolk who love their community-and teeming with mystery. You are invited to join the heroes and heroines of Somewhere as they solve mysteries, discover romance, experience inexplicable phenomena, and fight injustice-just the usual stuff! 

SOMEWHERE BY THE SEA

Is there somewhere to mend a broken heart?

Faith Bennison suffered a tragedy that changed her life in unimaginable ways and she fears she will die of a broken heart. In an attempt to salvage her sanity, she leaves her home in the Midwest and travels to the small Oregon town of Somewhere. As she settles into day-to-day life at Hope Bed & Breakfast, she makes friends and even meets a man who jump-starts her battered heart. Strange happenings, however, have her questioning her sanity as she tries to make sense of an unfathomable encounter.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
COUNTDOWN 11-11: This is a fun mystery/romance/suspense story about a mysterious man with a mission--save the woman who can save the world!

FINDING SOMEWHERE SERIES:  I have uploaded the first book in this series, "SOMEWHERE by the Sea." There are five books total, but I will only be uploading the first one, which won Finalist in the Readers' Favorite Int'l Book Contest for 2020.

ROMANCE ON THE RANCH SERIES: I have uploaded the first five books in this series: "Dream Kisses, Honey Kisses, Baby Kisses, Candy Kisses, and Christmas Kisses." I will NOT be uploading the last five books:  "Rock Star Kisses, Forever Kisses, Forgotten Kisses, Angel Kisses, and The Last Kiss." Books 6 - 10 are available at major online retailers. Also, there are audiobooks for "Dream Kisses, Honey Kisses, and Baby Kisses."

FRAGILE HEARTS is a standalone young adult novel about a naive college woman with a tragic past and the young man interwoven into that past.

ABOUT ME: My perfect day begins by starting  my morning (when I can) at Starbucks with a strong cup of coffee, fictional characters demanding their stories be told, a plot that comes together, and an hour or two to live in an alternate reality.

Seriously, I have always loved reading and now I love writing. As a preteen, I devoured Nancy Drew and Hardy Boys Mysteries. When I reached my teen years, the romance genre became my favorite and that has never changed. Several years ago, I decided to try my hand at writing and I've been doing so with a passion ever since. Because I hate saying goodbye to characters who have lived with me for months, I usually create a series so they can be revisited from book to book.

title: The Broken Clock is Right Thrice: Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective #4
description:
Season 4 of Confessions of a Fake Psychic Detective

Zandra, a famous "psychic" who grifts the grifters using only her wits, gave the worst of society plenty of reasons to want her dead during her long career. When she discovers someone from her past wants to put her in a grave, there's only one way to narrow down the long list of suspects: invite her most notorious former clients to a haunted mansion for a dinner party of the damned.

Also available on YONDER, the next-generation reading app from the Wattpad family.

authorBio:
* Two-Time Watty Award Winner *

Benjamin Sobieck is a writer, inventor, entrepreneur, former GLAMOUR magazine hand model, and champion pie baker.
